subject: First Elon Musk, now THIS?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We can’t stop MSNBC from becoming a far-right Trump channel like Fox News if Democrats aren’t even watching anymore...
| **Wait, first Elon Musk threatens to _BUY_ MSNBC, and now _THIS?_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250119_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=18610%2E878179%2Ep_u6ut) [We can’t stop MSNBC from becoming a far-right Trump channel like _Fox News_ if Democrats aren’t even watching anymore — so we need to know if you still watch and support MSNBC:](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250119_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=18610%2E878179%2Ep_u6ut) | [I PROUDLY STAND WITH MSNBC »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250119_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=18610%2E878179%2Ep_u6ut)
---
**If Democrats sit back and ignore these warnings,** Elon Musk WILL buy MSNBC and destroy one of the only media sources we can always depend on!

**But if top Democrats (like you!) step up in support of MSNBC,** we will have the people-powered fuel we need to save the day for our beloved news programs!

[We need at least 2,000 signatures from your state to protect our news from MAGA ruin: Will you add your name to our list of Democrats who still watch and support MSNBC? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250119_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=18610%2E878179%2Ep_u6ut)
[I PROUDLY STAND WITH MSNBC »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250119_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=18610%2E878179%2Ep_u6ut)
---

The Voter Protection Project

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18610%2E878179%2Ep_u6ut). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18610%2E878179%2Ep_u6ut).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18610%2E878179%2Ep_u6ut) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=18610%2E878179%2Ep_u6ut). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18610%2E878179%2Ep_u6ut)

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Where we go from here:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100652982/523477612/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzcwYjVmNy1jNGQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rzIOj1xIAkabcY6feX6gaRiC-6kANknnPBR9amrb8lk=&emci=33f6dca6-04d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3770b5f7-c4d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Tomorrow, Donald Trump will be inaugurated for the second time. It's a terrifying and enraging moment in which we find ourselves, **but it is also a moment in which we cannot let ourselves give in to despair or resignation.** As a party, Democrats still have a lot of reflection to do in the wake of November's election. How do we reach voters across new channels of information? How do we show that we're responding to people's concerns? How do we take on the new political landscape without abandoning our core values? Here's the thing: any pundit who claims to have easy answers to these questions isn't telling the truth. Finding the answers is going to take a lot of trial and error as we work to mobilize against Trump and the GOP's agenda. It's going to take many conversations with people across the country. I hope you can be part of these conversations. **The process of rebuilding and recalibration doesn't start with politicians or pollsters claiming they know what's best — it starts by listening to folks like you.** [**So will you take our short survey? I'd love to hear your thoughts about where we go from here, and what your top priorities are.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100652983/523477613/-1480555909?ms=2025-01-19-survey&refcode=2025-01-19-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzcwYjVmNy1jNGQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rzIOj1xIAkabcY6feX6gaRiC-6kANknnPBR9amrb8lk=&emci=33f6dca6-04d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3770b5f7-c4d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9818364) [Add Your Voice](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100652984/523477614/-1480555909?ms=2025-01-19-survey&refcode=2025-01-19-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzcwYjVmNy1jNGQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rzIOj1xIAkabcY6feX6gaRiC-6kANknnPBR9amrb8lk=&emci=33f6dca6-04d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3770b5f7-c4d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9818364) More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011925_2&amount=25]
You are invited to join our one-click response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Throughout his first term, we have kept track of how our supporters feel about Joe Biden and his performance as President, and we'd like to ask you to rate how he's doing as his presidency ends tomorrow.
Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: How would you rate Joe Biden's performance as President?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011925_2&amount=25]

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: re: Trump's inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible
body:
I need to hear from you directly.
I'm counting on your response. // I need to hear from you directly.
| | |
---
Friend, tomorrow, Donald Trump will be inaugurated for his second term in the White House.

Listen, I get it – it's tempting to tune out this moment and disengage from updates about the incoming administration. But with Republican majorities in Congress and a Supreme Court that's been stacked with ultraconservative justices, Trump has more power than ever to implement his most dangerous policies.
**That means we cannot tune out. We cannot disengage. The stakes are too high – and it's exactly what Trump is counting on. Because if we bury our heads in the sand, he has a clear path to do whatever he wants – completely unchecked. And that's a thought I just can't stomach.**
So we _must_ fight to hold Trump and his allies accountable. We _must_ fight to defend our fundamental freedoms. And we _must _fight for a better future for our families. I'm not saying it will be easy, but I'm ready to put my all into it – and I need you with me.
**My team put together a brand-new focus group for you to share your thoughts with me directly so we can align on our priorities for the first months of the Trump administration.[As one of my most engaged supporters, will you please take a moment now to share your input in this crucial focus group? It won't take more than a minute.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100653469/523495871/-1133207435?code=jtk3049-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmRiMmU5My1jYWQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W8eEHFfA7Ae8AbIwb50EAWgPqTJ_PxGgfyi9L9G-nyk=&emci=756568db-3ad4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=72db2e93-cad6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=858201)**

name: Larry P. Arnn
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
Your input is needed

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | |
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=21a0c487875046c3bd16ee5431e87ea6&_e=-Rkd43XgHAzzDyhGDGH6TElUoHSVz6qIV0pAnyP95paPtwLjuZlbWae66H-fDBePFlVjWktOPokM6--2tFrojxrPwv0hzhjQEVHresFQ1iLOxgniRazud-m1gM-aM_SOmlVrQpfkn9_s0lGZTW_OBzixVfT7cFUkhDkgzcfObTTEMdmWjRmd1wFdpzJpPH6e0ON3PrBcIg7DpVrYD58ltZp4whNwk7JgjluXjM1spxPWxumU2itP28jD6XBsRJTPHBRylXppEXkGf0rOdLGiBtwnjeAVUlY6Kgq8S164xAqOVttGrhWQiDlTO-LxkvUCPFRpPtL2zR02r6bFjeu-HD_rw9RCfIlr4MWejptIPG5OtRtWc0rR5jl0sxMlG5O2-Y5wmBUupbQ4931vo4x7j4g1nmYsfSWsiajMBjt-6Pc%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=21a0c487875046c3bd16ee5431e87ea6&_e=-Rkd43XgHAzzDyhGDGH6TElUoHSVz6qIV0pAnyP95paPtwLjuZlbWae66H-fDBePFlVjWktOPokM6--2tFrojxrPwv0hzhjQEVHresFQ1iLOxgniRazud-m1gM-aM_SOmlVrQpfkn9_s0lGZTW_OBzixVfT7cFUkhDkgzcfObTTEMdmWjRmd1wFdpzJpPH6e0ON3PrBcIg7DpVrYD58ltZp4whNwk7JgjluXjM1spxPWxumU2itP28jD6XBsRJTP4HZM-0iV8Ax2Oi6PN4SXKIV8G_2oC0rlLCxlhws00TiMk_zgOkal18zCX4yK5XNI8kzY5COWgCFjXdgR15Fss84FjN4eeRNfJRIVDjgT-UoETPF90NI15G1eOYsBe4oSKH8ASSi_eE5JomdMvDnRWHVelc6TroT3HYuMgNRB0gg%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=21a0c487875046c3bd16ee5431e87ea6&_e=-Rkd43XgHAzzDyhGDGH6TElUoHSVz6qIV0pAnyP95paPtwLjuZlbWae66H-fDBePFlVjWktOPokM6--2tFrojxrPwv0hzhjQEVHresFQ1iLOxgniRazud-m1gM-aM_SOmlVrQpfkn9_s0lGZTW_OBzixVfT7cFUkhDkgzcfObTTEMdmWjRmd1wFdpzJpPH6e0ON3PrBcIg7DpVrYD58ltZp4whNwk7JgjluXjM1spxPWxumU2itP28jD6XBsRJTPKk61MTrTjok8YfzUyhR9G5C53FqzmJw2rdkaOGuwIk2JE8jHsLKZOI0_L0ks8-uLt5oRhhWmbfs0yjS-2OpV-r0GSNvIoPKOBvyfLFgklmt-RoqXmrhdozuvWcBR3dN0tB1NkJYF6MyX8XMGXLYM3JUbsC0y0ZK0i6XfCZuM8bc%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=21a0c487875046c3bd16ee5431e87ea6&_e=-Rkd43XgHAzzDyhGDGH6TElUoHSVz6qIV0pAnyP95paPtwLjuZlbWae66H-fDBePFlVjWktOPokM6--2tFrojxrPwv0hzhjQEVHresFQ1iLOxgniRazud-m1gM-aM_SOmlVrQpfkn9_s0lGZTW_OBzixVfT7cFUkhDkgzcfObTTEMdmWjRmd1wFdpzJpPH6e0ON3PrBcIg7DpVrYD58ltZp4whNwk7JgjluXjM1spxPWxumU2itP28jD6XBsRJTPyJLiyeydIuYK6CShUeAty2x4ojaanfQBcapDgJZnBp53hgQrtaVYLclJfvX1gzG-xwWCtO3-nGYUjZj4gEph7t3MXqT431rLZ5d-DU4sCWAwVbv94AlU8Hb4bcaQW7UF8sQysMdPvshdHWXRT7EzzI_XuFJRxtNAmpRRK-pgNJY%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

[Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=21a0c487875046c3bd16ee5431e87ea6&_t=CmbT3s9PFDm5DAM86JBB5lFTGZrJOItGk1cLHvLrwi8I_6pg6UjVT-0kg7k8OvBZlDshTGtQ3PEGKplSStd4VYeFsiRNjwAs-evhFS1ICkbcjq9eWLj_uzU2KGfBAdWS)

subject: Trump And Congressional Republicans Have A Mandate To Rein In Spending

The three freed hostages, Romi Gonen, Doron Steinbrecher and Emily Damari, were released by Hamas to the IDF on Sunday, the military announced on X. The trio entered Israeli territory soon [...]...Click to read more Read More The Prime Minister’s Office says that despite the delays in signing the deal and its approval by the government, hostages are still expected to be released from Gaza on Sunday as planned. According to a statement from the PMO, once the ceasefire deal has been approved by both the security cabinet and the full cabinet, [...]...Click to read more The losses keep stacking up for the U.S. wine industry. Wine sales in the U.S. last year tumbled approximately 6% from 2023, according to data from the industry data group SipSource. The drop is the latest in a long-term decline in wine demand in restaurants, bars and stores that some are calling an “existential threat” [...]...Click to read more Israel repeatedly said throughout Saturday night and Sunday morning that it was yet to receive the list of hostage names from Hamas as agreed. name: Steel River Tomahawk
subject: Unleash YOUR Adventure: Steel River Tomahawk Complimentary - Just Cover Shipping!
body:
Please, allow us to introduce the Steel River Tomahawk...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19910/6374453/525495d9c3dffbd4bed07bc2fe2adfaafe91b071/e3ba79a150d44fadc3d413eaabbd5aecc6064816)
---
| | |
---
_January 20th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
Hey there, Meet the Tomahawk that’s a cut above the rest - a tool that perfectly merges rugged durability, slick design, and multi-purpose functionality. Please, allow us to introduce [the Steel River Tomahawk. ](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19910/6374453/525495d9c3dffbd4bed07bc2fe2adfaafe91b071/e3ba79a150d44fadc3d413eaabbd5aecc6064816) But be warned, this isn't your run-of-the-mill tool - it's a workhorse wrapped in sleek sophistication, ready to accompany you on your most exciting adventures. Crafted from top-notch forged steel, this tomahawk isn't just built to last; it's built to conquer. Its 3.5” blade provides precision cutting, chopping, and hacking capabilities. It's finished with a sexy black coating, giving it a distinct, stealthy appeal. No more unnecessary exertion - whether you're felling small trees or splitting firewood, [the Steel River Tomahawk](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19910/6374453/525495d9c3dffbd4bed07bc2fe2adfaafe91b071/e3ba79a150d44fadc3d413eaabbd5aecc6064816) is designed to work with you, not against you. And that's not all. The handle of our tomahawk is wrapped in **military-grade paracord**. You never know when you might need some sturdy cordage in the wild. Want to see it for yourself? name: Jessica Hamilton, Evergreen
subject: Today is not a good day
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
MLK Jr.'s memory deserves better
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3257824/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi Friend,

On this day of remembrance for Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and all he stood for, a climate denier and serial liar who is wholly unfit to be president will stand on stage with his oil-drenched donors and lackeys to be inaugurated as the 47th president.

So, I am filled simultaneously with grief, and with a furious determination.

I am awash in grief—grief for all those powerful policies, investments, and commitments we fought so hard to secure and now may lose.

Grief for all the people living through wildfires, hurricanes, floods, heat waves, poisonous fossil fuel extraction...everyone living through the consequences of a too-long delay in climate action.

And grief for how far we still have to go to further MLK Jr.'s own tireless work for civil rights and economic justice. Climate action is not separate from those fights, and in fact we know humanity _must_ rebalance the world toward a fairer and more sustainable future.

**And even in my grief, I am more determined than ever to toil on, and to do what we must do next.**

You see, it has long been true that most of the real progress on these issues does not come first from our federal government. The pioneering policies that led the way on investing in workers, addressing historic wrongs, cleaning up our air and water, and protecting our climate _came first from states, counties, and cities—they came from us._ From our neighbors and our communities, working together in solidarity.

**I believe that we will now see a great uprising of historic state and local action on the climate crisis and the many intersecting crises which oppress our communities.**

And Evergreen will be there. We're going to do what we do best, and make sure that decision-makers have the most ambitious and actionable policies and the political space to make those policies real.

Local action is the primary way we will keep making tangible progress. So I'm asking you to send a message to your state elected officials that our movement will not let up. [**Write to your state reps right now to tell them to prioritize climate.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3257825/87SdQ4wZ) Do it today, on Martin Luther King Jr. Day.

As the man himself said: |
---
| _"Now let us begin. Now let us re-dedicate ourselves to the long and bitter, but beautiful, struggle for a new world."_ |
---
| Glad to be in this with you, |
---
| | |
---
### Jessica Hamilton
Director of Digital Advocacy and Platforms
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support. |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3257826/87SdQ4wZ)

---

name: Josh Weil
subject: Today, it begins – but I’m fighting back.
body:
I’m a dad and public school teacher, and possibly the only thing standing between Trump and total MAGA control of our government.
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_G7vq87-xg6Ep9TEbEHWwd6DnPobm9nyRx-cUZPO_01ZZ3ua9Zw2QwbSYuMkDAbrPd0s0h9_1IGg0Y9oNfDnzo5A009wIkIj6xJu-FVnCfK5jhur6-p1LNC2pPUiQyNy3UjL2yKRpFxjFTMbRIQOT8XE5PpjLCratvNU0C8mjegtH0q6BOOQGL4-TGvvj6rQH_OiOQ754VYcRHTXAaPd6hjnOW7Z67_B&c=tFQd4MSDE9nUirmJ43AD6B-37ML0RELZ9cQC5Gm0m9fiPOmk_5u1Aw==&ch=ftC1wr2Y4W2oKcRx_GQHjNP7_PRMtBKHXbBqlQDqt60VxK1Fn6IL1Q==)
---
| | | | Team,
Today, Donald Trump returns to Washington as president, ready to unleash his dangerous MAGA agenda on America.
Book bans. Reproductive freedom under attack. Democracy on the line.
It all starts now. But here's the good news: we can fight back immediately.
I'm Josh Weil, a public school teacher and Democrat running in Florida's 6th Congressional District. This is the first major election of 2025, and we have the power to flip this seat and destroy Trump's razor-thin majority in Congress.
Make no mistake: this isn't just about one seat. A win here stops Trump's Project 2025 plan before it even takes off.
---
| | | | [That's why I'm asking for your support today. We need to show strength right out of the gate--and the quickest way to do that is by reaching our mid-month fundraising goal. Will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can right now?](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_G7vq87-xg6Ep9TEbEHWwd6DnPobm9nyRx-cUZPO_01ZZ3ua9Zw2QwbSYuMkDAbr0tjDgtL4JG0nVwl1pV6eQsarUfQXB4hwLq7RLu8M7hBKKQbji0Ng2elbroNS2Qr8bB0lIMworfD-hGjVjwxwZGiap3nwbePCsV3tiIiMZRGJkaezD1GciOquWUHQrFKOczPVBS8j-1IkDvln8rQrzMtC5PAFPPnO4qXHfJk5y5Y=&c=tFQd4MSDE9nUirmJ43AD6B-37ML0RELZ9cQC5Gm0m9fiPOmk_5u1Aw==&ch=ftC1wr2Y4W2oKcRx_GQHjNP7_PRMtBKHXbBqlQDqt60VxK1Fn6IL1Q==)
---
| | | | | [Defeat MAGA extremism >>](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_G7vq87-xg6Ep9TEbEHWwd6DnPobm9nyRx-cUZPO_01ZZ3ua9Zw2QwbSYuMkDAbrNKZjODNW1CUwYChucHi9_-D03DAjJew3SEYSJpEPhXRKUoI6IqbyIB40WoP8Bb6gVblBzQoXIXUrpv_1TxzvUVn__fdlAfv47gjGF64adP6z499KF-4fFwJ0CwLqZiw3vB6BQgqbzMbotrGKqmZnwQlqOfSIkWDH&c=tFQd4MSDE9nUirmJ43AD6B-37ML0RELZ9cQC5Gm0m9fiPOmk_5u1Aw==&ch=ftC1wr2Y4W2oKcRx_GQHjNP7_PRMtBKHXbBqlQDqt60VxK1Fn6IL1Q==)
---
| | | | This is about standing up for everything we believe in: free speech, public education, and a democracy that works for everyone.
Trump's allies, like my opponent, Randy Fine, are counting on us to give up. Let's prove them wrong by FLIPPING this seat into Democratic hands in 2025.
[This is THE most immediate way to make an impact. Chip in now to power our campaign and fight back against Trump's agenda.](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_G7vq87-xg6Ep9TEbEHWwd6DnPobm9nyRx-cUZPO_01ZZ3ua9Zw2QwbSYuMkDAbr0tjDgtL4JG0nVwl1pV6eQsarUfQXB4hwLq7RLu8M7hBKKQbji0Ng2elbroNS2Qr8bB0lIMworfD-hGjVjwxwZGiap3nwbePCsV3tiIiMZRGJkaezD1GciOquWUHQrFKOczPVBS8j-1IkDvln8rQrzMtC5PAFPPnO4qXHfJk5y5Y=&c=tFQd4MSDE9nUirmJ43AD6B-37ML0RELZ9cQC5Gm0m9fiPOmk_5u1Aw==&ch=ftC1wr2Y4W2oKcRx_GQHjNP7_PRMtBKHXbBqlQDqt60VxK1Fn6IL1Q==)
---
| | | | | [Defeat Trump's crony! >>](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_G7vq87-xg6Ep9TEbEHWwd6DnPobm9nyRx-cUZPO_01ZZ3ua9Zw2QwbSYuMkDAbrOZzGw0X2ROWntI0aKN3plh-7faw5mstMqAXNekauGTyNpC74QA3nMN8bU5VWFTW7B3T4NUSP9KeEjVMJ-NzBD5ylx3D_PZWz_3ZILOqzilJZfKE5zhAI5gdEfag7wXP84lzebG1XgPvVaR-mt175z83vPpYn6-ty&c=tFQd4MSDE9nUirmJ43AD6B-37ML0RELZ9cQC5Gm0m9fiPOmk_5u1Aw==&ch=ftC1wr2Y4W2oKcRx_GQHjNP7_PRMtBKHXbBqlQDqt60VxK1Fn6IL1Q==)
---
| | | | This is our moment. Let's rise to meet it.
Gratefully, Josh
---

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Winter Keeps Coming, Rugby Players Rescue Cockatoo, and the 'Engagement House'
body:
Houston and Southeast Texas could receive up to six inches of snow and ice beginning tonight. With temperatures hovering at or below freezing until Thursday, the region is likely in for a few days of canceled classes and hazardous travel conditions.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80DGP4yAQBeBfg7tYMGCwC4qTonS59kprYsY2EmALcC759ytH2nK3nk-j996_-3hHH3xa_mIkW1_zNgKH7sLFBfjo0If3qBpnH9wNoiErjDTSgBl0s1rZqQ5RY9_3wnWougfAYzKdmjXHWcjG2_MZF8CFkJJ3LZEglCSmCUij00xxcr5uua0rVXphmcN7e1Jupy02wa617oXJPwxuDG4-PanUlhLlZTvKac6DvB01jmU78kRMXl3M3yJgcj4tOy7EQJ8qkvNHZPK6Y66Jcln9Lnp-UdyMn84MdE0YqfxiRoBhMEoAgGmydft_H4Iv2jDFl4g-fNLXH-d8WvgKAAD__2Sndn8) | |
# Monday, January 20, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1881, the _[San Antonio Light](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GurCAQxvGngU4zDChuQXEbu73tKc0Io5KgbJSs69ufuP2p_tX3S76f5_CkmOI2_6eVXflMeUDApgJVIQyBYroGI4MbITyUZKesttqifbRycY1HaCxY4qmbRnyY4DvtSXeTacEaI6O7MVAISmkNTc2smDQr75FbCq0wwCGWvNdl4cIfOqZ05Tfvtc-rTG4p5XUI_U9gL7A_z7Mux0J5S3HjOu-zwP67qgJd1XjdEdjzVva7nbJyd-F1xpTi0VphYF4ppi9e_nz7dvgbAAD__5tVVy0)_ published its first issue. Purchased by William Randolph Hearst in 1924, it grew to become one of his company's largest newspapers in the 1970s. It discontinued publication in 1992, a few years after Hearst Communications acquired the _San Antonio Express-News_. For the [third time in U.S. history](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOqzAQheGnsTsjzxjsULi4DV1uuyWaxENsrcEROCG8_Yrttz7Sd6T_6zpeKeW0PP7TzL5-pjKixk5pUKjHQCkfYyuDv-nQg2QPzjjj0PVWRk9TTwi90aHVN9eZ6UZorbkAWrh0DmXyJ6YBNYAxumuYgckw3O_IloIVreaQalmbGrnyh7YpH-XNa3Mvs8w-1vrchPkncBA47PveHBRLOVeBw8L7JnBIC70er5VqKoua87cKdKgTyfRUNaY1KLB4wd4CNLHOWa4-PPeUc9qsE61-zJTy72P9M8Hb408AAAD__8KbXgE), Inauguration Day coincides with Martin Luther King Jr. Day. In today's edition, read about Trump's recent picks with [ties to Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGTgyAUBOBfAx3Oe6ASC4pr7HLtlQ7CMzJBcZCL5t_fmP66LXa-nf25D3cbYlgf33YhU84pDRJkIwCFhMHbEN9Dzb0ZwXfIyaBWWmmpu5bPZlQ3cOBqq9ChasB7RHVD23SouwkcD-bCACUgKgVNRYRkFaFzklrrW1YD-VBSrspMhU67T_GdXpQrlxYezVzKtjP1xWTPZH8cRzWls17p2K8Ck_0VmexL_l02MabsKYslPEmMdn3u4kPybPx2hBjD3mpWw2OxIX4Gyr-PX0b-BQAA___9Ellr), and see if you can answer the trivia question about the second university in the nation to install a statue of MLK. We're flying today with [Energous](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80DGP4yAQBeBfg7tYMGCwC4qTonS59kprYsY2EmALcC759ytH2nK3nk-j996_-3hHH3xa_mIkW1_zNgKH7sLFBfjo0If3qBpnH9wNoiErjDTSgBl0s1rZqQ5RY9_3wnWougfAYzKdmjXHWcjG2_MZF8CFkJJ3LZEglCSmCUij00xxcr5uua0rVXphmcN7e1Jupy02wa617oXJPwxuDG4-PanUlhLlZTvKac6DvB01jmU78kRMXl3M3yJgcj4tOy7EQJ8qkvNHZPK6Y66Jcln9Lnp-UdyMn84MdE0YqfxiRoBhMEoAgGmydft_H4Iv2jDFl4g-fNLXH-d8WvgKAAD__2Sndn8). Be sure to check them out in today's edition.
* * *

## Southeast Texas Braces for Winter Storm
Houston and Southeast Texas could receive [up to six inches of snow and ice](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO6yAUBNCvgQ4LLtgkBcVr3OW1W1oYLgEJGwujkPz9yum3HI10Rpqfx_KwKaf9-d9uaNo7lAU4jIwLBnzxNuXPoqg3K_d3QdEILbXUoO8TjQak0866CRUEP-KqAmitwujcza1BIU3mwrgALoSUfBwQBVqJwjnAyfqJKI4-tVKHFrHh254hf8oL6-DKRrOJrR0nkf8IzATm3vvgYi371V4ZbYtYCcy2tuQyEpi_COtpb1jZ2Urd2LmXzoBzJUa4DUc8aDX-6CnndE6aKP7cbMrfxfbnBS8DvwEAAP__LMpfog) beginning tonight. With temperatures hovering at or below freezing until Thursday, the region is likely in for a few days of canceled classes and hazardous travel conditions. "_Travel is going to be very difficult, if not impossible_ ," said Harris County Meteorologist Jeff Lindner. The Texas Department of Transportation has [pretreated area roads with a salt-based solution](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGS4yAQRL8GZaiYQRLngOASMl96oQrDyKIWCZcYG_vvt-zadPPufl3v_3k--5TTfv3nN7L8XMqMCkepQKKao0_5NQ9dtBcVT9CRBaONNmhOU7daMH9GP1IcwQzLMuhpGUGZqHwIarpcQpfse0wBKgCt1dgTAXlNEALS5OMkBkUxcTl6Xonp6euSX-VBRx_K1mW7Mt-q0H8FOoGutdaHnMIXruVeuezvlEC3U6sCXS7BZ4HuzRToFAh0cBLo6EVVll3ySvIoPlbpq2xpZzpk5XJssiVeZd1LkzUTsfw07jf5wxHousPGW0s5pzoZMajr5lP-vORftT0sfgcAAP__VzFweQ) to prevent accumulation, and snow plows are being relocated from other parts of the state more accustomed to the wintry weather. CenterPoint Energy has [prepped 1,200 crews](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8Gb1hw_RcPDF3Y0rWjdQ3X8VWxiQwNSZ--ctW1-9F3Pp2P63RFDrzf3nEjk59LnEBBJ5WWoCaPHF5TW3kzKz_qiowemqEZYBj7ajUdzaO_uHZG1XfUk--Uo0s7O8RuWfxcsTnHlAalddOoribShA1p54B69L1oFXnO8ajzSpmemJbwig86ahe3Kpg153sSzZsAK8CWUmoX2H3CGr9SjvtJCbA7lSTAhugwCLCnU4BVWoDVowDraM903CPvWW5x5sDflKQGpaQ7qCSJK6GXcZGFT1KmHI9N8i7_PBIPQgG2Ooy_Fw6BUz-IVt025PB7Nf_b7mHgJwAA__-2BHLj) to respond to outages caused by the storm, and dozens of school districts in the area have [already canceled classes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1u6yAUx58Gb1hwcOB6YLgLW7p2tAicxKjYRHASkrevXHXt_P_U7_O8nH3Kab99-A0tva5lAQEnLiQHsUSf8nuZhmgvIs5yQCuNMsqAmfWw2qAm1MIoEPISLmC0lhBOUcQZJ6P-zUOyR5mQIKRUSpxGRIleoQwBUPuo2SQwJip1pBUJX75d87s8sY6hbEO2K9G9MfWfgWPgeu9jyCl8wVoejcp-uBi4HXtj4HIJPjNwxyYDJyQDJ80hpEb8N8J9Rc9bWEvJPKZGNQVqPOTSMHJ6YIv-zeMDORWOL6q4Ie9pJ6y8o6cVKwM3VBvvPeWcmjZsErfNp_zzmf6E-LTwHQAA__9MeXWY) for Tuesday. Unlike those served by utility systems that rely on water towers to maintain pressure, residents who get their water from the city of Houston are advised not to drip their faucets because doing so could [lower the pump-fed system's pressure](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdKCZMeBQuHgNXV67JRrwEFtyYmSckOzXr9h-y6srnSOdr-t05RDD4_af72LLe00TAXU1YE0wOQ7xM7WVszO4ASuxaLTRhszQV94SD-wMXjrTzRc3DzjDbBwy9OtsCLEK9oQBEiBqDV0jgsJacFlIena9akFcKCk3xUuRN-9r_KSX5GZJ9ypaX8q2K_1P0ahoPI6jWXxOj_M9t3DxkhWNnEtYoigafXruJT3qNYt8S-1y2OqVn4uUvSaAFkljs_mtytZtR4gx7L1RLdzuHOKvtfyZ4WXpJwAA___bUWAI) too much.
## More Texans Picked to Serve in Trump Admin
Donald Trump has reportedly [picked Texas border czar Mike Banks](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGTgyAUBOBfAx3Oe6ASC4pr7HLtlQ7CMzJBcZCL5t_fmP66LXa-nf25D3cbYlgf33YhU84pDRJkIwCFhMHbEN9Dzb0ZwXfIyaBWWmmpu5bPZlQ3cOBqq9ChasB7RHVD23SouwkcD-bCACUgKgVNRYRkFaFzklrrW1YD-VBSrspMhU67T_GdXpQrlxYezVzKtjP1xWTPZH8cRzWls17p2K8Ck_0VmexL_l02MabsKYslPEmMdn3u4kPybPx2hBjD3mpWw2OxIX4Gyr-PX0b-BQAA___9Ellr) to lead U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP), signaling the state's importance in securing the border and enforcing federal immigration law. Sen. Cornyn praised the move, saying, "_Nobody understands the border better than Texans_." Banks has overseen the implementation of Operation Lone Star since he was [appointed by Gov. Abbott](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00D-P4yAQBfBPg7uJYOzgS0FxDV2uvdIamyFGwQYB-beffpUU2239nn56ev_P05lCDPvlH21s2tOnCSUeQSpAOTkK8TUNnTOzdCfVsVFjP_YjjifdrebPQp70IkfplXeDx2FUs5oHrbTzGucumDcmFUql-l4eD8yKqWe1LMianBaDZBdaKoe2cuMnVR9f6c7lsKSti2ZtLVfR_xVoBdr9lVNt70igfcsCrVQCrdIC7a3Czo8q0PpUNi4wZ6AL7w1od_DBYU7FcYHliwps4cow036tQDmnsDd2QBVauW35p5qplRRhWQN7gbYrxuVHiDFUPYpBXjYK8TO2_fre3eB3AAAA__-R1HNb) as the state's first-ever border czar in 2023. At the time, he said he would aim to "make the State of Texas the least desirable place for illegal immigration to cross." Trump also [picked Penny Schwinn](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOtCAUhZ8GOwxcRMaC4m_s5m-3NCjXkQSVwHUc337jJltue05ycr7v6zk8XYhhe_13K1r6zPsAAjQXkoMYvAvxGprK21H4TlZopVFGGTBdWy12nLXQs_LtiPqhtQL9GDtjhGjGTj9aXQV7jwkJQkqlhK4RJTqFcpoAW-db1gj0gfZc04KEH1fmeO1vzPW0r1W0C1EqTP1j0DPoz_OsMx6Eudz9new5egb9URj0lI81cXKp8ITbdvEyLWfYNu4xHXTxglNGcvni6I_JUdg3_gsrOwZ9la1PZ4gxlNawRrxWF-LPE_pTzdvCdwAAAP__e55mtA), a former high-ranking official for the Texas Education Agency, to be the next Deputy Secretary of Education. She previously served as the Commissioner of the Tennessee Department of Education. "_A former teacher herself, Penny became the founding principal of a charter school, because she believes in the power of School Choice, and is committed to delivering the American Dream to the next Generation by returning Education BACK TO THE STATES_ ," [wrote Trump on social media](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DHPqyAUxvFPgxsGDortwHAXt971jgbhUMlFjwGs9du_afd3f_LLk_-_x_SwMcXt-deuaOo70AQCei4kBzF5G9M1dY03s_B32aCRgxrUAMNdN4vBXsGtwyD0DGHWshfuJmbZDR5720nVRPPBhAQhpVKibxElWoXSOUBtvWadQB8r5bYuWPFtS0gXvTC3jtYmmaXWvTD1h8HIYDzPsw30Br3QUSptnxGDccOzMBhrPtad79H9LzxQXjHzr8iLW4gSpxCiizZxj_tRL17QZaw2Xxz94WyNtPFMCZts_H7GlGLRA-vEc7Uxff_UXwO9DPwEAAD__yDLbCI).
## Mistakes Doom Texans
The Houston Texans [came up short](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z72O6yAQQOGngS7WMBAwBcVtkG6Rbbe0MAw2Ev6RjeLk7VfZfusjfdL5fgyPUGpZp6-wkGuvvA0IeL-BuCEMKZT6HhRPboRkBScnjDTSoLGazw7IRqtB297anEOO0Y69oqyQ0IxZ8OI-GAgEIaSEe0ckKEgSMSLpkDRTQKm07ejaTI1e4cz1vT3p6OK28Orm1vaTyX8MPUN_XVdH575-IkO_5srQHxTDztAPDP0UFvqfGHoFQhvR94ofLu1XqbWc2jAF0xJK_cXbn7dPhz8BAAD__2XLVXs) in their divisional round matchup against the Kansas City Chiefs on Saturday, falling 23-14 to the AFC's No. 1 seed in a contest that saw Texans quarterback C.J. Stroud sacked eight times and their kicker Ka'imi Fairburn miss a PAT and two field goals. Houston became the [first team in NFL history](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OwyAQhJ8Gd7aWBf9QUFzjLtdeaRG8BCQSEKA4fvuTr79upNHMJ30_t-1mQgyvx7d5km4flzYEHHvgPcK2mxDPTXa7vsOueEeaz2IWM85q6rwWI5ejUgKkImkcqEWpOy524nKW95G6oK8z4AicCwHjQMTJCOLWIk1mn5gE2kNLZWieGn1MdfFMbyqDTc8uat9arkx8MVwZrsdxDNaX9LpahmvNqbTKcL2WryuY0oKNxHC1PpCrfY7mTM71MdXa12Za7RFAimVchuxzV_SejxBjqNPMJDyeJsQ_dvtXxlvjbwAAAP__bYhhXg) to lose a playoff game while outgaining their opponent by at least 100 yards (the Texans had 394 yards of offense compared to Kansas City's 227) and not committing a turnover. Things went south from the start. Kansas City had a 63-yard return on the opening kickoff and got even closer to the end zone when Texans special teams player Kris Boyd was penalized for throwing his helmet to the ground after he forced a fumble, and Houston failed to recover the football. After the penalty, Boyd shoved special teams coordinator Frank Ross, who was yelling at him for the costly mistake. Boyd [apologized after the game](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAQRb8GdxPBYGOloNiG7m27ZYRhHFCwJwJenOzXr7z9a0dnztW9f75uXz6XvN9_-41sf698Q4kTSAUob9Hn8rmNQ7SLjFc1kFWznvWM89UMyeplUtNi9DRSXMJqENc1xBAwGLNoGodsT5lUKJXSWk4XIkVekwoByfhoxCgp5s710hN1evu2lg-_qF4Cb0OxqfdnE_qXQCfQHcdxCSWHByb-bp33kxLo2pNrbwLdmSbQSSXQqatAdyr3Bo-aGyz8ieCfXPie_1KDlSskKht16NwatMSvvN9hrX5_QD1PGQ7foDMDvUPuFKHxRj2dWD4fvkvcOyT_Ioi8k0A3VBufRy4lNzOLUd43n8v_Nv3HeV8W_wUAAP__8JyA_w), saying he "was just too excited." Several Texans players and coach DeMeco Ryans indicated they thought [some questionable calls favored the Chiefs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGSnDAMQL_GdNqxZQ5CQZGG7tKm3NFiGTTnxQwWx-7fZ5z-er2nJ_39vH-SJNmWP_TkUV8x39HiB1gHaO-BJL3vbRPGhw2Da3h0ve99j_3QNetoH8iE0Q-hG8j3Pf7yMbTY9hQeLc3cyFhl1qF1znv7cWN2TJ7dPCN3FDrTWg6i-bjpysovKjG98zcftzk_mzSuqnsx_rfByeB0XddtTjJ_4ZrPonmrUwansudDi8GpbjM4WWdwckMlGL42vkAULiqwZNkW0AwPhrMALSRbUdCV4eBYoBZsBc69sMIlukKOUWYhrZxssJNs8UywJ3rnGCHlUqpvXoVjLWiOMeyXpCSl601rlydJ-n-M_vjd7xH_BQAA__-ETH-K). | Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80DGP4yAQBeBfg7tYMGCwC4qTonS59kprYsY2EmALcC759ytH2nK3nk-j996_-3hHH3xa_mIkW1_zNgKH7sLFBfjo0If3qBpnH9wNoiErjDTSgBl0s1rZqQ5RY9_3wnWougfAYzKdmjXHWcjG2_MZF8CFkJJ3LZEglCSmCUij00xxcr5uua0rVXphmcN7e1Jupy02wa617oXJPwxuDG4-PanUlhLlZTvKac6DvB01jmU78kRMXl3M3yJgcj4tOy7EQJ8qkvNHZPK6Y66Jcln9Lnp-UdyMn84MdE0YqfxiRoBhMEoAgGmydft_H4Iv2jDFl4g-fNLXH-d8WvgKAAD__2Sndn8) **Say Goodbye to the Power Cord** Nikola Tesla said powering the world without wires was of "all-surpassing importance." This technology wasn't possible in Tesla's time, but one company is helping to make it a reality today--and [you can invest for a limited time](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80DGP4yAQBeBfg7tYMGCwC4qTonS59kprYsY2EmALcC759ytH2nK3nk-j996_-3hHH3xa_mIkW1_zNgKH7sLFBfjo0If3qBpnH9wNoiErjDTSgBl0s1rZqQ5RY9_3wnWougfAYzKdmjXHWcjG2_MZF8CFkJJ3LZEglCSmCUij00xxcr5uua0rVXphmcN7e1Jupy02wa617oXJPwxuDG4-PanUlhLlZTvKac6DvB01jmU78kRMXl3M3yJgcj4tOy7EQJ8qkvNHZPK6Y66Jcln9Lnp-UdyMn84MdE0YqfxiRoBhMEoAgGmydft_H4Iv2jDFl4g-fNLXH-d8WvgKAAD__2Sndn8). Their patented technology is like Wi-Fi for power. It [transmits power to devices through the air](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80DGP4yAQBeBfg7tYMGCwC4qTonS59kprYsY2EmALcC759ytH2nK3nk-j996_-3hHH3xa_mIkW1_zNgKH7sLFBfjo0If3qBpnH9wNoiErjDTSgBl0s1rZqQ5RY9_3wnWougfAYzKdmjXHWcjG2_MZF8CFkJJ3LZEglCSmCUij00xxcr5uua0rVXphmcN7e1Jupy02wa617oXJPwxuDG4-PanUlhLlZTvKac6DvB01jmU78kRMXl3M3yJgcj4tOy7EQJ8qkvNHZPK6Y66Jcln9Lnp-UdyMn84MdE0YqfxiRoBhMEoAgGmydft_H4Iv2jDFl4g-fNLXH-d8WvgKAAD__2Sndn8), eliminating the need for cables and batteries and providing a constant, reliable energy source for IoT devices that track and deliver data in real time. It's such a powerful innovation, that it earned ["IoT Innovation of the Year"](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80DGP4yAQBeBfg7tYMGCwC4qTonS59kprYsY2EmALcC759ytH2nK3nk-j996_-3hHH3xa_mIkW1_zNgKH7sLFBfjo0If3qBpnH9wNoiErjDTSgBl0s1rZqQ5RY9_3wnWougfAYzKdmjXHWcjG2_MZF8CFkJJ3LZEglCSmCUij00xxcr5uua0rVXphmcN7e1Jupy02wa617oXJPwxuDG4-PanUlhLlZTvKac6DvB01jmU78kRMXl3M3yJgcj4tOy7EQJ8qkvNHZPK6Y66Jcln9Lnp-UdyMn84MdE0YqfxiRoBhMEoAgGmydft_H4Iv2jDFl4g-fNLXH-d8WvgKAAD__2Sndn8) honors. Data is the oil that keeps retail, manufacturing, and logistics operations running smoothly. Thanks to these wireless power network transmitters, all of these industries could get a 24/7 flow of data without depending on batteries or cords--it's potentially a [combined $650B market opportunity](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80DGP4yAQBeBfg7tYMGCwC4qTonS59kprYsY2EmALcC759ytH2nK3nk-j996_-3hHH3xa_mIkW1_zNgKH7sLFBfjo0If3qBpnH9wNoiErjDTSgBl0s1rZqQ5RY9_3wnWougfAYzKdmjXHWcjG2_MZF8CFkJJ3LZEglCSmCUij00xxcr5uua0rVXphmcN7e1Jupy02wa617oXJPwxuDG4-PanUlhLlZTvKac6DvB01jmU78kRMXl3M3yJgcj4tOy7EQJ8qkvNHZPK6Y66Jcln9Lnp-UdyMn84MdE0YqfxiRoBhMEoAgGmydft_H4Iv2jDFl4g-fNLXH-d8WvgKAAD__2Sndn8). That's why this company has already landed a contract to supply wireless power network solutions to a **Fortune 10 multinational retailer** , opening them up to 4,700 retail locations across the U.S. You now have a unique opportunity to [invest in Energous](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80DGP4yAQBeBfg7tYMGCwC4qTonS59kprYsY2EmALcC759ytH2nK3nk-j996_-3hHH3xa_mIkW1_zNgKH7sLFBfjo0If3qBpnH9wNoiErjDTSgBl0s1rZqQ5RY9_3wnWougfAYzKdmjXHWcjG2_MZF8CFkJJ3LZEglCSmCUij00xxcr5uua0rVXphmcN7e1Jupy02wa617oXJPwxuDG4-PanUlhLlZTvKac6DvB01jmU78kRMXl3M3yJgcj4tOy7EQJ8qkvNHZPK6Y66Jcln9Lnp-UdyMn84MdE0YqfxiRoBhMEoAgGmydft_H4Iv2jDFl4g-fNLXH-d8WvgKAAD__2Sndn8) by purchasing investment units that include 1 convertible preferred share (convertible into 2 common shares on Nasdaq: WATT) and 3 warrants to purchase additional common shares at a fixed price. Sounds like it's time to cut the cord and [**become an Energous shareholder as they work to scale nationwide**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80DGP4yAQBeBfg7tYMGCwC4qTonS59kprYsY2EmALcC759ytH2nK3nk-j996_-3hHH3xa_mIkW1_zNgKH7sLFBfjo0If3qBpnH9wNoiErjDTSgBl0s1rZqQ5RY9_3wnWougfAYzKdmjXHWcjG2_MZF8CFkJJ3LZEglCSmCUij00xxcr5uua0rVXphmcN7e1Jupy02wa617oXJPwxuDG4-PanUlhLlZTvKac6DvB01jmU78kRMXl3M3yJgcj4tOy7EQJ8qkvNHZPK6Y66Jcln9Lnp-UdyMn84MdE0YqfxiRoBhMEoAgGmydft_H4Iv2jDFl4g-fNLXH-d8WvgKAAD__2Sndn8).

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1981, the [Iran hostage crisis ended](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zz9rwzAUBPBPI20xT0_WHw8aWkrokkKn0knI1nOsIkfBUWz87Yu7l9vu4Af3dfGXkHK6XT_CTK6OxSOgOoE4IfgYUt59y6MbiZAkJyeMPCIA-eSs7tqoZGeHwQiFEMGOGm3oojQmKuDJHRoIBCGkFaIhgg6UDmR7aKUC1gLFVMvS_JR0qxONeS8rLc1QZp7dVOv9weQLwzPD87ZtzV6e9dnTsR9NqMPE5Hll8u3VfPuSdR_fP_ni4n1LOaeHNqyF6xxS_iPrfxdXh78BAAD__2-rUQs) with 52 American hostages freed after 444 days in captivity, on the same day Ronald Reagan was inaugurated as the 40th President of the United States. More than two decades later, it's Inauguration Day again, with President Donald Trump taking the oath of office on another freezing cold day in Washington. You can find a [schedule of events in our top story below](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAUhJ8GOqLjY2NM4eI26XLbLZExQzgr8yMwifL2K7ZfTTUaafTp-3p0jyBJluf_MMPnce2YuK5IVUzdECR9OlMOfgQYuoRXjb6iiMvJxzrEnq0GnAsRvekNlDMRSrWaI5firzdSTEppp9QNoJZqG-B6MrqmwhAGyet--15lyRPG9Flf2G9xncvkp5y3o9D_Cr4XfA_bgvdxTVfZs8SEgu95P-etkiWcz3MPWdalOuKE4Uyo8MKSj4rbtonWup7ZMJw1No5DpCYGDeaxKXc_bG9JSQ7bFIaec5D0y5D_cvLy_BMAAP__LhJixQ). For our part, we're excited to announce that our newest state edition, _**The Arizona Flyover**_ , will launch tomorrow, offering daily coverage of news and events across the Grand Canyon State. You can sign up to [start receiving it automatically by clicking here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwjAQhX-NvYHuznYwgwcklKmwVuoSmfhM3DoxSlwq_n0VtQNDq5vu6fve8F5P3cmnnKbr2Y_saiwdAZkN4IagCz7lR6dlcJGZWEl2uFPrIZAcnN1doDcYvfUGkXxkbRlDY80-attrmdzaBkiAqCzilhn2YBrP9gJaGRAaOKRa5u17SVMdOOZHufO87csosxtqvS1CHQS1gtox_0EJan-_lfDX1Oc0fQjV8uhTFuoYbl8p57Q0O0FGw3WNf8Rmqb5y15fAQh0Pb4KazzoKdXw5y9k9eU-WrP-NdHf0HQAA__-502h-). ## Trump Inauguration Today
Donald Trump is set to be [sworn in for his second term as president](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFvwyAUBOBfA1usxwNsMjB08ZauHS3AzzEtNo6NQtNfX7l7dctJJ33SfdyGm4sprvd3t5AtUx4QUF9AXBCG0cX0GhQf7USEJDlZ0ckzApDPlrRslbh249Rp3xoxYTCtV0ppY1zwhkd7aiAQhJBGiIYIrqBbR8aDkhqYAhpjyXvzmeNaZprSKz9pb0JeeLJzKdvB5BvDnmFfa228D-fGsF-pHgx7t5cYEp014Nf3z1YfD9SZ73bcakwpHm3HFNwXF9OfWv57-bT4GwAA___Ig1L-) today inside the Capitol Rotunda due to freezing temperatures—the first time in 40 years the inauguration has not been held outside. Trump and First Lady Melania will attend a church service at St. John’s Episcopal and then have tea with Joe and Jill Biden before the inauguration. [Here's a schedule of the day's events.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAUhJ8GOqLjY2NM4eI26XLbLZExQzgr8yMwifL2K7ZfTTUaafTp-3p0jyBJluf_MMPnce2YuK5IVUzdECR9OlMOfgQYuoRXjb6iiMvJxzrEnq0GnAsRvekNlDMRSrWaI5firzdSTEppp9QNoJZqG-B6MrqmwhAGyet--15lyRPG9Flf2G9xncvkp5y3o9D_Cr4XfA_bgvdxTVfZs8SEgu95P-etkiWcz3MPWdalOuKE4Uyo8MKSj4rbtonWup7ZMJw1No5DpCYGDeaxKXc_bG9JSQ7bFIaec5D0y5D_cvLy_BMAAP__LhJixQ) Trump was welcomed to Washington on Saturday with fireworks and hosted a MAGA rally on Sunday night. The GOP is [distributing 220,000 Inauguration Day tickets](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j71ugzAUhZ_GbEb32vwkg4cubOnaETn2JdzKYGScOPTpK7pXZzzSOd_3dRtvlgOvj0-7kMlTHBWoVgJKBaO3HI6xqbyZiBTpigz2-gyCqmbjPKJrNOp7Z-Fue3STn_q2c77Bq6ZrxeZcA1SAqC-INRFcoe0sXe7Q6BZEA-Q5x1R_R17zTFM44otS7eJSBTPnvO1Cfwg1CDWUUuopvtv1OGuhhpXKLtTAq30-nslmjqt0KRYvd_4hWWabJb03clnm9Fw2edJUyfitcAi8d71o4LFYDn9_-T__l1G_AQAA___GaV2U) but many more are expected to show up. Inaugural events are drawing crowds of performers and celebrities, from Kid Rock and Carrie Underwood to [billionaire tech moguls](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAUBOCnwR3W4TdOQXEbd7ntltYxHAIrDJGNEvntV95-Ne2nGWm-HssDc8n1-R83cj22RYI0HASXsATM5Vz0EFwkkqQGcuKmrgiQQ3LmrmMIEwVFZKPR1t48rkZ40itqj0N2VxsICUKoSYiRCO5gLNK0glYGmAYKubd9_G659kSxnO1N--jbNhSXen8dTP1jcmZyjrli9TSemFq7BJNzpc_B5LxhPfmaS8mtYt6Jd_KJe2oHD61iCVxoUAAa7Jj6Vobdhdfn8oe9MQ3PDXP5He1_nfB28icAAP__0h9epg) to Chinese Vice President Han Zheng.
## TikTok Restores U.S. Service
TikTok restored service on Sunday after President-elect Donald Trump announced plans to issue an executive order Monday to delay a federal ban. Read an [explanation of the legal complexities here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAUhH-N2Yyen0mAwUMWtnTtiEx4Tl5jbAQv0PTXV3SvbriTTjqdvs9rf_UcOd0__EROQu4R8KTBaIR-9BzffVWMLhAh2YKcqe0hA1g8HJoWGxwG2_i2boeAVQh1SxDqcajQ2ILdsQYGwRjbGFMSQQuns6dmgMqeQFVAI0teyq_MSR4U4jtvtJS3PBXRPUTmVdmLwk5ht-97Oa3p6BR2lPRrVdgl2g-bc2Th2xFleU2zXvUcfdKS9eo30sJPyU-dvHBOPvIPaRaFnV_05WK-xYZQLG6cd46R13OtKrhPnuPfE_mPzObwNwAA__8uU2W8). The app [went offline Saturday night](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00M1q6zAQBeCnkXdjRuO_ZKFF4GK4hXTbpZnU41iNLBlJiZu3L27WZVbDgY_D-TgPZ7bO-us7L2LyFAZCagA1EA4jW_cc6mI0kwhJVYjRXbWfRipmw4wXjUzdhY51Wx26icYWp0ajHusjd4U1u4aaUOvqoHUpgkdsWpbDBeuqQVWjjDaHWH4F6_Msk3uGh8TyMyyFM3POa1LVSVGvqN-2rVyS3zNFvXi4J0V9jvwQp6j3sr3--7JC4meCWWCzzoFN6S7AHkIcJUIOECWs4iHbWw43sB7yLC-OI5xO-ju-_ftfRDOuO2BT26karwtb99ss_7XUw9BPAAAA__-LtGrn) when the law requiring ByteDance to divest its U.S. operations took effect. App stores and internet service providers faced daily fines of $5,000 for every user who accessed TikTok—penalties that could amount to billions of dollars. Trump proposed a joint venture giving [the U.S. a 50% ownership stake](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uhDAQhJ8GOp92bWND4SLNdZc2JbLZ5dic-RE4d7q3j0gfTTUaaT7p-7r1tyhZlvtnnDmUce016EYBKg09Rcnv3tYURmbNpuaA3pxB0PUUkjOWbOs7atuhY20oppSIfOocR4O1hPMNUAOiaREvzNBB4yK3CaxpoLLAJGXdL9-rLGXiMb_XJ--XYZ3rHKZStqMyH5W-Vvoat4VfxzmdZS8yZK70tcijrA-V4qLK_jNvKgnxooZJlqgSDb5LfmBvMbboHY7Oc2wcWQQEU--BtpfkLIfzlYX7HCX_0ct_Np5B_wYAAP__h3BfzQ), while Chinese officials have reportedly discussed selling TikTok to Elon Musk. Other potential buyers include billionaire Frank McCourt and "Shark Tank" star Kevin O’Leary, who reportedly met with Trump to gain his support for a bid.
## Israel-Hamas Ceasefire Goes Into Effect
Three [Israeli hostages were released](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j71u6zAMRp9G2hSQtBTHg4a7eMtdOxpMRCcs5B9YqoP06Qt3L77xA87B-bgOV9as8-M_TxLruAwEFBygIxgSa34P3qY4ipA0ViK2zTEEss_Ivu1u4Du8C48BkYXH9sadIKdWAluNBw2QALG5IJ5EoINwZrncwDcBjAdJWpft9LnoXJ8y5veyy3a6L5PN8VnrWkzzz1BvqOd1llc5LkN91l0M9ZMm4VKdlo0luwd_s_taE1cpDh12joLdYlpfmrOWc2s8PCbW_CuofwXvkX4CAAD__2I-V38) by Hamas on Sunday as the ceasefire agreement between Israel and Hamas took effect. The hostages, three women who appeared in good health, were greeted by their mothers and by large crowds celebrating the handover. [You can see photos here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2u4zAMhE9jdwpEyrbsQsU26bLtlgYtUTEX8g8kIUFu_-D0D6yIwQzmm3-P-UGSZH_-pY1djceMGnulQaGeA0n6zF0bXGRGNi07sOY60NiuznuYcLCgtR-Z7LgMduQQwVic-jAMrbgrTQNqADMC3Jj1pPuBeFx0Z3rddJqD1CPf_h-y15Vj-hwvzjd_bG1ya61nacyfBu8N3unc-V0u6XpyFZ-4wbuUTJzUSYlLlV1oL2qljYp6U1aXRXmmwlEyq_UolZ5cLkKY1Be2MzbaCEvsJj8FnMxgYfTRjkuIaNG32YXzLSlJGWzT6edGkr4N62-LvRz-BAAA__-Nm2tA) Ninety Palestinian prisoners were also released. Many who had been displaced since the start of the war began returning to Rafah as the ceasefire deal held throughout the day. President Joe Biden [addressed the nation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQRL_GdEb2Yjhf4SIN3aVNifbwAhsZG9nWocvXR6SPphnpjUaj-XpMD-TAcf3EnVxd0gQKeqm0BDV55PCeTOPdQgTUNeT0rbukFTSbs3foPRDRAERgvYabN6bX3uLQ2dk27K42pUFp3VmtWyJ1V_2AZJ_KdL0SRpHnmnL7nTjWjZbwTi_K7Zz2Jrit1qOI7kPAKGA8z7ONzznSWS4uYLzsBVIOXsA4ExZaOJPkkpGC3HDHIlf8QbmlUnElmSlcKXlgoFI5MkaZ54jaWjC2yc4fJ4fAZbgJo9YdOfyNqf-d83LwGwAA___PBGeG) after the hostage release, saying, _"Today, the guns in Gaza have gone silent,”_ while Israel’s ambassador to the U.S., Michael Herzog, credited President-elect Donald Trump for making the ceasefire happen.

name: History Facts
subject: MLK was born with a different name
body:
Some of America’s most famous names weren’t birth names. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cgpd9pl9l9i921316ynbq0dgja42qql464ek6q6ac55bx98jvasuq06vg34qfct1ro0668ao6ap7jxtgo5109ie4bkdp7dh8qx6bm0mqo456c8od9xc575r83raj98qa9nsja2lr9k7h596&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqdyx5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Martin Luther King Jr.’s birth name was Michael.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqdyx5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqdyx5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqdyx5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| S ome of America’s most famous names weren’t birth names. Bill Clinton was born William Jefferson Blythe III, John Wayne was originally Marion Robert Morrison, and Martin Luther King Jr. was [Michael King Jr.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqdyx5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) until he was 5 years old. The change was prompted by his father, Reverend Michael King. In 1934, King Sr. attended the Fifth Baptist World Congress in Berlin. In response to the rise of Nazism, the BWA put out a fierce proclamation condemning all racial discrimination and oppression.
---
The elder King traveled throughout Germany during his stay, learning more about the German theologian Martin Luther in the process. Born in the town of Eisleben in 1483, Luther began the Protestant Reformation when he posted his _Ninety-five Theses_ on the door of a castle church in 1517. Reverend King was so inspired by the reformer that he changed both his own name and that of his son, though the younger King’s [birth certificate](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqdyx5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) wasn’t officially amended until July 23, 1957, when he was 28 years old.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqdyx5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqdyx5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Martin Luther King Jr. was a devoted Star Trek fan.
One fateful Friday in 1967, Nichelle Nichols made one of the toughest choices of her career: resigning from _Star Trek_. The actress, who played Uhura on the groundbreaking sci-fi series, delivered the news personally to series creator Gene Roddenberry, who urged her to take the weekend to reconsider. She agreed, and was at an event in Beverly Hills that same weekend when one of the organizers told her an admirer of the show wanted to meet her. [It was Martin Luther King Jr.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqdyx5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), who introduced himself as her biggest fan and explained that _Star Trek_ was the only TV show he and his wife allowed their children to stay up late to watch. When she told him she was leaving the show, he was taken aback. “This is the future,” he said of _Star Trek_. “He [Roddenberry] has established us as we should be seen... When we see you, we see ourselves, and we see ourselves as intelligent and beautiful and proud.” The following Monday, Nichols returned to Roddenberry’s office and told him she was staying.

clean_body: Some of America’s most famous names weren’t birth names. | S ome of America’s most famous names weren’t birth names. Bill Clinton was born William Jefferson Blythe III, John Wayne was originally Marion Robert Morrison, and Martin Luther King Jr. was until he was 5 years old. The change was prompted by his father, Reverend Michael King. In 1934, King Sr. attended the Fifth Baptist World Congress in Berlin. In response to the rise of Nazism, the BWA put out a fierce proclamation condemning all racial discrimination and oppression. The elder King traveled throughout Germany during his stay, learning more about the German theologian Martin Luther in the process. Born in the town of Eisleben in 1483, Luther began the Protestant Reformation when he posted his Ninety-five Theses on the door of a castle church in 1517. body:
let’s defeat Jon Ossoff

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl4j6nupanj47an09rolngj4890a8udpcr6jvu88_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie2oj4c5h2bs)

This needs your immediate attention, friend.

**[Georgia's Senate seat is maybe our biggest pickup opportunity in 2026, but it could also be the most expensive Senate race in the country.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv5onl996jk8tnattmvreqvebmf0ivuf88p9o0s8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie2oj4c5h2bs)**

_Georgia is a Trump state, but right now it 's stuck with Jon Ossoff in the Senate._

**[Want to change that? Take early action now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvkgef530q28rdsihut2mlmongghfc9pgpi41880_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie2oj4c5h2bs)**

Ossoff pretends he's a moderate. Give us a break.

**[Ossoff sat around and did NOTHING while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris opened our border... but he did cast a deciding vote for their INSANE big spending agenda.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3rvof7n2gjldfi1tm3meh0fu675lge4d5e90olg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie2oj4c5h2bs)**

The last thing Georgia, or America, needs is six more years of Jon Ossoff in the Senate.

name: Office of Delegate Briana D. Sewell
subject: Delegate Briana Sewell's Weekly Newsletter
body:
| |
---
# District 25 Weekly Session Update
---
## Session Week 1
---
Dear Inquirer,
---
The first full week of the 2025 Legislative Session is in the books!
---
|
---
I am so honored to be representing our community in the House of Delegates and am excited to be working on a host of bills to address the issues and concerns of the residents of the 25th District. While the Virginia General Assembly officially gaveled in for the 2025 Legislative Session on Wednesday, January 8th, as required by the Constitution of Virginia, the body was in recess until Monday, January 13th due to a water outage and infrastructure challenges in the City of Richmond.

---
This past Monday, we reconvened the House and the Governor gave his State of the Commonwealth address. As we look towards reconciling the Governor's Budget with the Legislative Budget, I will always prioritize the fight to make sure Virginia families can put food on the table, a roof over their head, time to take care of loved ones, and have just one job to pay for it all. In this newsletter, I will introduce my legislative staff and lay out my bills for the 2025 session. I want to thank all the residents and neighbors who provided feedback at my bill workshops last year. You are always welcome to meet with me or my staff in Richmond to share your views, and my office is always a call or email away!
---
# **Meet the Legislative Staff**
---
|
---
I’m excited to introduce my Team for the 2025 Session! They are here to help you, so please don’t hesitate to reach out. Whether you need assistance navigating the state government, want to share your opinion on a bill, or learn how you can comment on a bill in front of committees, our office is here to serve.
---
**2025 Legislative Agenda**
---
Below are the 15 Bills I have filed for the 2025 Session. If you would like to speak in support or opposition for the bills in committee, please email [joe@sewellfordelegate.com](mailto:joe@sewellfordelegate.com) for further information.
---
**Advocating for Veterans and Service Members:**
---
[**HB1911 Veterans Services Protection Act**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/WWmT4rUDU3msvG_vSpCJvw~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjE5MTFXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) Our veterans are entitled to the benefits they have earned in service to our country free of charge. The Veterans Services Protection Act would prevent predatory practices around Veterans Disability Benefits. Veterans deserve to keep every dollar of their hard-earned benefits, not be charged $6,000, $10,000, or even $25,000 for services the Veterans of Foreign Wars or the Virginia Department of Veteran Services offers for free.
---
[**HB1880 Military Family IEP Help**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/J4pUL_O6fxZNgJEMJpYemw~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjE4ODBXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~)[](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/J4pUL_O6fxZNgJEMJpYemw~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjE4ODBXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) [](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/J4pUL_O6fxZNgJEMJpYemw~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjE4ODBXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~)Highly mobile children, including military children, are more likely to experience recurring educational disruptions and challenges, particularly those who need access to special education and related services. Virginia must assist military families by ensuring the timely establishment of special education services upon relocation and reducing burdens associated with due process proceedings. **I am pleased that this bill has already been approved by the K-12 Education Subcommittee and full Education Committee unanimously. On Tuesday, January 21, 2025, the bill will be voted upon on the House floor.**
---
[**HB1881 Military Family School Enrollment Support**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/T1XkWOdTP70Gum77iWdjKQ~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjE4ODFXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) This bill specifically addresses the educational needs of children whose parents are full-time active-duty members of the uniformed services. It ensures these students have the ability to enroll in Virginia public schools, regardless of the school division’s geographic boundaries, recognizing the unique challenges military families face.**I am pleased that this bill has already been approved by the K-12 Subcommittee and Full Education Committee unanimously. On Tuesday, January 21, 2025, the bill will be voted upon on the House floor.**
---
[**HB1882 Military Protective Orders**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/cTJJMx1CjPYxt5ugo5dm1w~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjE4ODJXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) This bill seeks to help active duty service members and spouses who have received protection from Base Commanders relating to matters of sexual and/or domestic violence. This effort will hopefully streamline the process of having Military Protective Orders (MPOs) recognized in the Commonwealth to ensure those protections are not lost when moving from one base to another.
---
[**HB1685 Military Family Early Childhood Care Fix**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/cTJJMx1CjPYxt5ugo5dm1w~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjE4ODJXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) This bill would expand on my 2024 Legislative Session bill which was passed in a [bipartisan vote and signed into law last year. ](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/zd3I5h9gXvdh7HRKNw3skw~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0SmaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFpcmZheHRpbWVzLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9mYWlyZmF4X2NvdW50eS9nb3Zlcm5vci1zaWducy1iaWxscy1zdXBwb3J0aW5nLWJ1aWxkaW5nLWJsb2Nrcy1mb3ItdmEtZmFtaWxpZXMvYXJ0aWNsZV85ODY3NDUyOC02MGI0LTExZWYtYTNjMC1mNzZhZmJmMGI3ZTMuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnf2dEjmfp4xdXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAK7g~~)I am striving to ensure that more Early Childhood Care Centers who care for children of military families can avoid duplicative and disruptive administrative requirements.
---
**Investing in Our Children’s Futures**
---
[**HB2530 Shackling Ban for Minors**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/-TeTlHboTvNK1OdacKsw8Q~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjI1MzBXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) Everyone deserves due process and the right to a fair trial, regardless of age or circumstance. This bill seeks to ensure that minors are not subjected to restraints in the courtroom unless it is absolutely necessary to prevent harm, stop disruptive behavior, or ensure safety—when no other less restrictive alternatives are available. As our Commonwealth continues to make strides in supporting the mental and emotional well-being of our children and families, it is essential that we recognize that not every young person who enters the courtroom is a threat to themselves or others. One bad decision, especially in a moment of vulnerability, should not define a child’s future. We must approach these situations with compassion, understanding, and a commitment to helping them learn, heal, and grow.
---
[**HB2532 Drone Bill**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/dMT0HR5hnIZm_aygrRQLeA~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjI1MzJXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) This bill aims to streamline the process for law enforcement to obtain search warrants for using drones in critical situations. It would enable drones to quickly assess crime scenes, provide real-time information during incidents, deliver essential supplies, and assist in emergency responses, helping to improve overall public safety and efficiency.
---
[**HJ0436 Sound Camera Study**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/zWx4avqvb-Ekm-O8XSVuHQ~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QxaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9ISjQzNlcDc3BjQgpnf2dEjmfp4xdXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAK7g~~) As residents of the 25th District are well aware, excessively loud vehicles with modified exhaust systems have long been a persistent nuisance in our community. These disruptions, particularly near our local schools, have escalated from a simple annoyance to a significant safety concern. This bill seeks to fund a comprehensive study to identify the most effective methods for monitoring and regulating vehicle noise levels. By addressing this issue, we aim to reduce noise pollution and create a safer, quieter environment for our neighborhoods and schools.
---
[**HB2534 DMAS; crisis stabilization services**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/HXTeEQMZZCz6EWf9IIE_ZA~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjI1MzRXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) This bill seeks to request a critical waiver to ensure that the soon-to-open Crisis Receiving Center in Prince William County has all the necessary resources to effectively support individuals in mental health crises. By securing this waiver, we can guarantee the center is fully equipped to provide timely and comprehensive care to those in need without further delay.
---
[**HB1878 SCHEV; director title change**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/yoCmDpjFwIbRy3JX9sLIDw~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjE4NzhXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) This bill proposes to rename the Director of the State Council of Higher Education for Virginia (SCHEV) to Executive Director. This technical adjustment will streamline internal operations and enhance communication with key partners, while also elevating SCHEV’s role in advocating for our public colleges and universities.
---
**Supporting Working Families**
---
[**HB2531 Paid Family Medical Leave**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/fBFPjqXZjSib_ECfmDjfUQ~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjI1MzFXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) In times of crisis, families should not have to choose between their loved ones and their livelihoods. That’s why I introduced legislation to create a paid family and medical leave insurance program, ensuring that Virginians can take the time they need for a child's birth, medical treatment, or to care for a loved one—without the fear of losing their job.
---
[**HB1879 5000 Families**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/KpjDGlwE9wjUxVIv75T2_A~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjE4NzlXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) The high cost of housing continues to be a problem for Virginians, and housing instability hits families with school-age children the most. The 5,000 Families pilot program would provide rental assistance to qualifying households to help families with children in schools stay where they are, and provide data on how we can address the housing crisis.
---
[**HB1683 Dealers; recall costs**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/tfq8q4ZeCls8bKrJbQDJIw~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjE2ODNXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) This bill would clarify rules for reimbursing car dealers for recall and warranty costs. It also sets a timeline for manufacturers or distributors to notify dealers if they are using their right of first refusal on a dealership sale or transfer.
---
[**HB1684 Licensees engaged by buyers**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/uG3HvUye2tEulAf64e9nwg~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjE2ODRXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) This bill would clarify rules for reimbursing car dealers for recall and warranty costs. It also sets a timeline for manufacturers or distributors to notify dealers if they are using their right of first refusal on a dealership sale or transfer.
---
[**HB2533 Accessory Dwelling Units**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/ymUYO-WuImxb8CIfix86Zg~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QyaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9IQjI1MzNXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) Accessory Dwelling Units, or ADUs, are livable areas on a property such as a fully furnished basement or outdoor add-on and are an important tool in addressing the ongoing housing affordability crisis. This bill would allow localities to consider ADUs in their strategic plan, granting local governments more options in increasing housing stock.
---
**Constitutional Amendments Update**
---
On Tuesday, the House considered three bills related to constitutional referendums. [HJ1](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/gLdIFyyK74gg-cPClYgCqw~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QvaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9ISjFXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~), the fundamental right to reproductive freedom, [HJ2](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/9yAJnuXCLgoo_FSksi17SQ~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QvaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9ISjJXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) the automatic re-enfranchisement of those with a felony conviction, and [HJ9](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/2EC2PSgE5C-AIrQCfQL5tw~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QvaHR0cHM6Ly9saXMudmlyZ2luaWEuZ292L2JpbGwtZGV0YWlscy8yMDI1MS9ISjlXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) repealing the ban on same-sex marriage, all were agreed to by the House of Delegates. My office heard from many residents on different sides of these issues, and I thank everyone who shared their views with my office for their engagement and activism. Ultimately, I voted yes to advance all three of these amendments with the intent that each voter in Virginia should have a voice on these pivotal issues. While I know that this decision will be met with gratitude by some and disappointment by others, I believe that giving Virginians the opportunity to vote on these issues in 2026 will ensure the will of the people will be done.
---
# **Advocates in the Office**
---
I am always grateful when people make the time to come to the Virginia State Capitol and make their voice heard. Last week, my Legislative Team and I were so fortunate to meet with members representing Virginia Emergency Managers, Virginia Association of Recovery Residences, the United Campus Workers of Virginia, the Baptist General Association of Virginia, Virginia Justice Forward, CASA, and many others groups of engaged Virginians. My office will always strive to make every accommodation to hear from any group who wishes to share their views, so please email [delbsewell@house.virginia.gov](mailto:delbsewell@house.virginia.gov) with meeting requests.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
# **Events in and around the 25th District**
---
While I am hard at work on your behalf in Richmond, there are still plenty of local events underway for you to enjoy. Please find a curated list of events in and around the 25th District below. [**Dog Man Movie Party - Wednesday, January 22 - All Day - Chinn Park Library**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/mfMEWay8Ceve9y2kDoLTVg~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QpaHR0cHM6Ly9wd2Nnb3YubGlibmV0LmluZm8vZXZlbnQvMTE5NTIzNjhXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) Stop by Chinn Park library throughout the day to celebrate the upcoming release of the Dog Man Movie with crafts and a scavenger hunt. [**Spanish Conversation - Wednesday, January 22 - 1:00pm-2:30pm - Chinn Park Library**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/_R1y9zPmXC93wcZUT1W1KA~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QpaHR0cHM6Ly9wd2Nnb3YubGlibmV0LmluZm8vZXZlbnQvMTE4Mzk5MTdXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) Improve your speaking skills in a friendly, relaxed atmosphere where speakers of all languages are welcome. First come, first served until capacity is reached unless otherwise stated. [**Off the Wall, High School Art Exhibit & Competition - Exhibit dates: December 18th - January 25, 2025. Awards Ceremony: January 25 - 2:00-4:00pm - ARTFactory, 9419 Battle St, Manassas, VA**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/3dfToV0suG8Mkb_6FdYhWQ~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0QwaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudmlyZ2luaWFhcnRmYWN0b3J5Lm9yZy9vZmYtdGhlLXdhbGwvVwNzcGNCCmd_Z0SOZ-njF1dSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAru) The ARTfactory in Manassas has extended the exhibition date of its annual Off the Wall High School Art Exhibit and Competition. The 21st annual exhibit features the artwork of area high school students invited to share their talent by participating in a high school art competition presented by the ARTfactory. [**For the Love of Art & Chocolate - Saturday, February 8 - 11:00am-7:00pm - Art A La Cart Gallery**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/5avUF2nDro7hivrLQlBmUg~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudmlzaXRvY2NvcXVhbnZhLmNvbS9ldmVudHMjOn46dGV4dD1Gb3IlMjB0aGUlMjBMb3ZlJTIwb2YlMjBBcnQlMjAlMjYlMjBDaG9jb2xhdGVXA3NwY0IKZ39nRI5n6eMXV1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~) Cultivate a sparkling connection with your date at our Gallery, where you can appreciate the works of 29 talented artists. Savor complementary refreshments and rich chocolate treats. Enjoy art demonstrations. [**Seussical Jr. - Shows every Tuesday, Thursday, and Saturday through the month of February - Riverside Center for the Performing Arts**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/PTyxYkaKAxOQMTPs0e4b0A~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpcMlnP0SKaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucml2ZXJzaWRlZHQuY29tL2NoaWxkcmVucy10aGVhdHJlLXNldXNzaWNhbC0yMDI1Izp-OnRleHQ9R3JvdXAlMjB0aWNrZXRzJTIwZm9yJTIwVHVlc2RheSUyMGFuZCxkb29ycyUyMG9wZW5pbmclMjBhdCUyMDEyOjMwUE0uVwNzcGNCCmd_Z0SOZ-njF1dSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAru) Children’s Theatre is back this spring to present Seussical Jr., a fantastical musical extravaganza that brings your favorite Dr. Seuss characters to life on stage! Under 3 years of age welcome and no ticket needed.
---
# **News You Can Use**
---
[Big Beam Weekend JAN 24-27](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/HrIc_8-2V7f5NiE_tqrANA~~/AAS2ygA~_Z0SOZ-njF1dSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAru) Crews are preparing to install five lines of massive steel girders extending 295-feet in length across northbound I-495 (Capital Beltway) for a new express lanes ramp that will connect the Dulles Toll Road to northbound I-495.
