clean_body: | | District 25 Weekly Session Update Session Week 1 Dear Inquirer, The first full week of the 2025 Legislative Session is in the books! | I am so honored to be representing our community in the House of Delegates and am excited to be working on a host of bills to address the issues and concerns of the residents of the 25th District. While the Virginia General Assembly officially gaveled in for the 2025 Legislative Session on Wednesday, January 8th, as required by the Constitution of Virginia, the body was in recess until Monday, January 13th due to a water outage and infrastructure challenges in the City of Richmond. This past Monday, we reconvened the House and the Governor gave his State of the Commonwealth address. As we look towards reconciling the Governor's Budget with the Legislative Budget, I will always prioritize the fight to make sure Virginia families can put food on the table, a roof over their head, time to take care of loved ones, and have just one job to pay for it all. In this newsletter, I will introduce my legislative staff and lay out my bills for the 2025 session. I want to thank all the residents and neighbors who provided feedback at my bill workshops last year. You are always welcome to meet with me or my staff in Richmond to share your views, and my office is always a call or email away! Meet the Legislative Staff | I’m excited to introduce my Team for the 2025 Session! They are here to help you, so please don’t hesitate to reach out. Whether you need assistance navigating the state government, want to share your opinion on a bill, or learn how you can comment on a bill in front of committees, our office is here to serve. 2025 Legislative Agenda Below are the 15 Bills I have filed for the 2025 Session. If you would like to speak in support or opposition for the bills in committee, please email mailto:joe@sewellfordelegate.com for further information. Advocating for Veterans and Service Members: ~ Our veterans are entitled to the benefits they have earned in service to our country free of charge. The Veterans Services Protection Act would prevent predatory practices around Veterans Disability Benefits. Veterans deserve to keep every dollar of their hard-earned benefits, not be charged $6,000, $10,000, or even $25,000 for services the Veterans of Foreign Wars or the Virginia Department of Veteran Services offers for free. ~ mobile children, including military children, are more likely to experience recurring educational disruptions and challenges, particularly those who need access to special education and related services. Virginia must assist military families by ensuring the timely establishment of special education services upon relocation and reducing burdens associated with due process proceedings. I am pleased that this bill has already been approved by the K-12 Education Subcommittee and full Education Committee unanimously. On Tuesday, January 21, 2025, the bill will be voted upon on the House floor. ~ This bill specifically addresses the educational needs of children whose parents are full-time active-duty members of the uniformed services. It ensures these students have the ability to enroll in Virginia public schools, regardless of the school division’s geographic boundaries, recognizing the unique challenges military families face.I am pleased that this bill has already been approved by the K-12 Subcommittee and Full Education Committee unanimously. On Tuesday, January 21, 2025, the bill will be voted upon on the House floor. ~ This bill seeks to help active duty service members and spouses who have received protection from Base Commanders relating to matters of sexual and/or domestic violence. This effort will hopefully streamline the process of having Military Protective Orders (MPOs) recognized in the Commonwealth to ensure those protections are not lost when moving from one base to another. ~ This bill would expand on my 2024 Legislative Session bill which was passed in a am striving to ensure that more Early Childhood Care Centers who care for children of military families can avoid duplicative and disruptive administrative requirements. Investing in Our Children’s Futures ~ Everyone deserves due process and the right to a fair trial, regardless of age or circumstance. This bill seeks to ensure that minors are not subjected to restraints in the courtroom unless it is absolutely necessary to prevent harm, stop disruptive behavior, or ensure safety—when no other less restrictive alternatives are available. As our Commonwealth continues to make strides in supporting the mental and emotional well-being of our children and families, it is essential that we recognize that not every young person who enters the courtroom is a threat to themselves or others. One bad decision, especially in a moment of vulnerability, should not define a child’s future. We must approach these situations with compassion, understanding, and a commitment to helping them learn, heal, and grow. ~ This bill aims to streamline the process for law enforcement to obtain search warrants for using drones in critical situations. It would enable drones to quickly assess crime scenes, provide real-time information during incidents, deliver essential supplies, and assist in emergency responses, helping to improve overall public safety and efficiency. ~~ As residents of the 25th District are well aware, excessively loud vehicles with modified exhaust systems have long been a persistent nuisance in our community. These disruptions, particularly near our local schools, have escalated from a simple annoyance to a significant safety concern. This bill seeks to fund a comprehensive study to identify the most effective methods for monitoring and regulating vehicle noise levels. By addressing this issue, we aim to reduce noise pollution and create a safer, quieter environment for our neighborhoods and schools. ~ This bill seeks to request a critical waiver to ensure that the soon-to-open Crisis Receiving Center in Prince William County has all the necessary resources to effectively support individuals in mental health crises. By securing this waiver, we can guarantee the center is fully equipped to provide timely and comprehensive care to those in need without further delay. ~ This bill proposes to rename the Director of the State Council of Higher Education for Virginia (SCHEV) to Executive Director. This technical adjustment will streamline internal operations and enhance communication with key partners, while also elevating SCHEV’s role in advocating for our public colleges and universities. Supporting Working Families ~ In times of crisis, families should not have to choose between their loved ones and their livelihoods. That’s why I introduced legislation to create a paid family and medical leave insurance program, ensuring that Virginians can take the time they need for a child's birth, medical treatment, or to care for a loved one—without the fear of losing their job. ~ The high cost of housing continues to be a problem for Virginians, and housing instability hits families with school-age children the most. The 5,000 Families pilot program would provide rental assistance to qualifying households to help families with children in schools stay where they are, and provide data on how we can address the housing crisis. ~ This bill would clarify rules for reimbursing car dealers for recall and warranty costs. It also sets a timeline for manufacturers or distributors to notify dealers if they are using their right of first refusal on a dealership sale or transfer. ~ This bill would clarify rules for reimbursing car dealers for recall and warranty costs. It also sets a timeline for manufacturers or distributors to notify dealers if they are using their right of first refusal on a dealership sale or transfer. ~ Accessory Dwelling Units, or ADUs, are livable areas on a property such as a fully furnished basement or outdoor add-on and are an important tool in addressing the ongoing housing affordability crisis. This bill would allow localities to consider ADUs in their strategic plan, granting local governments more options in increasing housing stock. Constitutional Amendments Update On Tuesday, the House considered three bills related to constitutional referendums. ~, the fundamental right to reproductive freedom, ~ the automatic re-enfranchisement of those with a felony conviction, and ~ repealing the ban on same-sex marriage, all were agreed to by the House of Delegates. My office heard from many residents on different sides of these issues, and I thank everyone who shared their views with my office for their engagement and activism. Ultimately, I voted yes to advance all three of these amendments with the intent that each voter in Virginia should have a voice on these pivotal issues. While I know that this decision will be met with gratitude by some and disappointment by others, I believe that giving Virginians the opportunity to vote on these issues in 2026 will ensure the will of the people will be done. Advocates in the Office I am always grateful when people make the time to come to the Virginia State Capitol and make their voice heard. Last week, my Legislative Team and I were so fortunate to meet with members representing Virginia Emergency Managers, Virginia Association of Recovery Residences, the United Campus Workers of Virginia, the Baptist General Association of Virginia, Virginia Justice Forward, CASA, and many others groups of engaged Virginians. My office will always strive to make every accommodation to hear from any group who wishes to share their views, so please email mailto:delbsewell@house.virginia.gov with meeting requests. | | | | Events in and around the 25th District While I am hard at work on your behalf in Richmond, there are still plenty of local events underway for you to enjoy. Please find a curated list of events in and around the 25th District below. ~ Stop by Chinn Park library throughout the day to celebrate the upcoming release of the Dog Man Movie with crafts and a scavenger hunt. ~ Improve your speaking skills in a friendly, relaxed atmosphere where speakers of all languages are welcome. First come, first served until capacity is reached unless otherwise stated. The ARTfactory in Manassas has extended the exhibition date of its annual Off the Wall High School Art Exhibit and Competition. The 21st annual exhibit features the artwork of area high school students invited to share their talent by participating in a high school art competition presented by the ARTfactory. ~ Cultivate a sparkling connection with your date at our Gallery, where you can appreciate the works of 29 talented artists. Savor complementary refreshments and rich chocolate treats. Enjoy art demonstrations. Children’s Theatre is back this spring to present Seussical Jr., a fantastical musical extravaganza that brings your favorite Dr. Seuss characters to life on stage! Under 3 years of age welcome and no ticket needed. News You Can Use Crews are preparing to install five lines of massive steel girders extending 295-feet in length across northbound I-495 (Capital Beltway) for a new express lanes ramp that will connect the Dulles Toll Road to northbound I-495. This major bridge girder operation - the Big Beam Weekend - is scheduled to occur Friday night, January 24 through early Monday morning, January 27, and will impact travel significantly on northbound I-495 near Tysons and at the I-495 and Dulles Corridor interchange area. Motorists are urged to STAY AWAY throughout the weekend as northbound I-495 will be reduced from six to two lanes near Tysons, and multiple ramps at the I-495 and Dulles Corridor interchange will be closed and detoured. In the event of inclement weather, the Big Beam Weekend will be rescheduled for the following weekend, Jan. 31 through Feb. 3. Thanks again for reading our weekly update and staying in touch with our office. As always, if there is anything we can assist you with, please do not hesitate to call our office at 703-261-4787 or email us at DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov. In Service | | The Honorable Briana D. Sewell \-- 25th House District DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov from future updates

subject: MassGOP Celebrates President Donald Trump’s Inauguration and Looks Forward to Better Days Ahead
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nsBHGYg5B_D32-nQW_RHSXUGHeDXH32d_pO4W3xDWz86xq13FQv5G9FETKwPRiJgYOTe6rn8pyTw7v0T0N9_GkzspPpZ7e3Sj7QDkxt8vQ8S3sdz_QbPxADPNgN7iIZtVb2NiMcwtrQj_3PFfcYLBg==&c=KoHl8p_QR1XJnSeHWZ5Y7gTZRsd5wLOLIHuFC6_onM0jG9d5epg1gw==&ch=ds8jcLoSBpDwEA8FjtMSFVg2dtgqUWW14GRGBpQwvXtp7wwAuFGmvA==)

| MassGOP Celebrates President Donald Trump's Inauguration and Looks Forward to Better Days Ahead
---
---
| Washington, DC- The Massachusetts Republican Party proudly extends its heartfelt congratulations to President Donald J. Trump on his inauguration as the 47th President of the United States. This moment marks a pivotal step toward restoring America's strength, security, and prosperity under the banner of America First policies.
"This past election, Americans in Massachusetts and across the country made it resoundingly clear: it's time for a new direction for our nation," said MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale. "Voters have sent a strong message that they want a secure border, an economy where prices stabilize and wages rise, and businesses that are free to prosper. They want America to be respected on the world stage and our citizens to come first. This includes addressing the issue of criminal illegal immigrants by ensuring deportation efforts are prioritized for those who endanger our communities at taxpayer expense."
Under President Trump's leadership, the MassGOP is optimistic about the future. Americans have chosen a path forward that prioritizes secure borders, economic opportunity, energy independence, and a renewed commitment to fairness in hiring practices and governance. These policies align with the values of hardworking families across Massachusetts who are ready to see real solutions to the challenges they face every day.
"This is a moment of renewed hope for our Commonwealth and our country," Carnevale added. "We are confident that President Trump's vision will empower communities, protect our freedoms, and ensure that every American has the opportunity to thrive. The MassGOP is ready to support this administration in bringing about the positive changes our country needs."
The MassGOP remains steadfast in its mission to amplify the voices of Massachusetts Republicans and hold government leaders accountable to the people they serve. With President Trump at the helm, we look forward to the days ahead with hope, determination, and a shared commitment to building a stronger, more prosperous America.
###

---
---

Friend,
When I woke up this morning knowing I’d be sworn in as President AGAIN, I started reflecting on every moment that brought me here.
This journey has been long, but I wouldn’t trade it for the world because it means we get to save America together.
**I guess the fun really started when they ARRESTED ME in Fulton County, Georgia.** That was truly a dark day in American history.
They even took my mugshot which became an iconic symbol of the MAGA movement’s fight to NEVER SURRENDER under the tyranny of the Biden Harris regime.
**Then, they REMOVED ME from the ballot in Colorado.**
Democrats launched hoax after hoax and witch hunt after witch hunt in Florida, New York, Georgia, and Washington DC!
One of my favorite nights was our historic LANDSLIDE on Super Tuesday. True Trump patriots responded in RECORD numbers.
That’s when they CONVICTED ME of 34 felonies in New York.
**THEN THEY TRIED TO ASSASSINATE ME, NOT ONCE BUT TWICE!** Your love is the only thing that kept me going through it all.
I was still bandaged up when I secured the nomination at the Republican National Convention!
I made a promise to never quit. I WILL NEVER SURRENDER, so I made my triumphant return back to Butler, PA where **I WAS SHOT!**
Finally, the American people spoke loud and clear and helped me deliver a **__HISTORIC ELECTION LANDSLIDE!__**
As I reflect on this moment, it’s you that I can stop thinking about. THANK YOU!

clean_body: Before I’m sworn in today, please read them. It’s a beautiful day to save America! | | | | Friend, When I woke up this morning knowing I’d be sworn in as President AGAIN, I started reflecting on every moment that brought me here. This journey has been long, but I wouldn’t trade it for the world because it means we get to save America together. I guess the fun really started when they ARRESTED ME in Fulton County, Georgia. That was truly a dark day in American history. They even took my mugshot which became an iconic symbol of the MAGA movement’s fight to NEVER SURRENDER under the tyranny of the Biden Harris regime. Then, they REMOVED ME from the ballot in Colorado. Democrats launched hoax after hoax and witch hunt after witch hunt in Florida, New York, Georgia, and Washington DC! One of my favorite nights was our historic LANDSLIDE on Super Tuesday. True Trump patriots responded in RECORD numbers. That’s when they CONVICTED ME of 34 felonies in New York. THEN THEY TRIED TO ASSASSINATE ME, NOT ONCE BUT TWICE! Your love is the only thing that kept me going through it all. I was still bandaged up when I secured the nomination at the Republican National Convention! I made a promise to never quit. I WILL NEVER SURRENDER, so I made my triumphant return back to Butler, PA where I WAS SHOT! Finally, the American people spoke loud and clear and helped me deliver a HISTORIC ELECTION LANDSLIDE! As I reflect on this moment, it’s you that I can stop thinking about. THANK YOU! This was not possible without your devotion and your hard work. The battle to save America starts today, and it won’t be easy! This message was brought to you by Donald J. Today we honor the life and legacy of Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. Dr. King spent his life in pursuit of building a country where everyone was free and equal, no matter their race or background. His legacy inspires so many of us here in his home state of Georgia and across the country to fight for a Beloved Community where everyone is cared for, absent of poverty, hunger, and hate. In a world still riddled with the same evils that Dr. King stood against — voter suppression, white supremacy, hatred, and poverty — we must continue his legacy ourselves and take bold, consistent action for the betterment of our community, especially as we prepare for a second Trump presidency to begin just a few hours from now. It's up to us — _all of us_ — to carry on Dr. King's fight for justice and equality for all, and we’re proud to be in that fight together with you. Georgia Democrats
* * *

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Today we honor the life and legacy of Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. Dr. King spent his life in pursuit of building a country where everyone was free and equal, no matter their race or background. His legacy inspires so many of us here in his home state of Georgia and across the country to fight for a Beloved Community where everyone is cared for, absent of poverty, hunger, and hate. In a world still riddled with the same evils that Dr. King stood against — voter suppression, white supremacy, hatred, and poverty — we must continue his legacy ourselves and take bold, consistent action for the betterment of our community, especially as we prepare for a second Trump presidency to begin just a few hours from now. It's up to us — all of us — to carry on Dr. King's fight for justice and equality for all, and we’re proud to be in that fight together with you. Georgia Democrats | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. name: Shontel Brown
subject: We cannot take our rights for granted.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Today, we must honor and commemorate the legacy of Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100659953/523510572/-211760203?refcode=EM_C_250120MLK_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzY4MDM3OC0yZWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gCdUVOIMe0SurKStNlwpzTly-faKASb3I4pTEkRR2r0=) Peter,

As we begin a new chapter in our nation’s history, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on the past. Today, we honor and commemorate the legacy of Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., a trailblazer for civil rights and justice for Black Americans.

Dr. King Jr. and many other civil rights leaders are the reason why we have our voting rights today. They sacrificed and put their lives on the line to ensure every American has the ability to exercise the right to vote – regardless of who they are or where they’re from. But now, our democracy is under threat, and we cannot _for a moment_ take these fundamental rights for granted.

As we enter the next four years, we must remain vigilant. The Republican Party has made it clear that they intend to reverse the progress that we have made and enact new obstacles in our fight for a more just and equitable world. It’s up to us to defend our rights and ensure that our nation moves forward, not back.

In Martin Luther King Jr.’s memory, let’s commit to continuing to bend the arc toward justice.

Together,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---

name: David Hogg
subject: How I’ll be fighting back in the Trump years
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Today, Donald Trump will be inaugurated as the 47th president.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250120-1&t=1&akid=1647%2E587540%2Eu7mMXR)
Peter,
**Today, Donald Trump will be inaugurated as the 47th president of the United States.**
We can’t sugarcoat or hide from the fact that this will be a challenging four years. But it’s also an opportunity.
Trump’s presidency is an opportunity for us to organize, mobilize, and push for real change — because the status quo got us to this point.
That’s why I’m spending every waking moment of the next four years and beyond working to elect progressive young people and build a better future in this country.
**[If you’re with me, please pitch in $5 today to help us build our bench of progressives to fight for us — during Trump’s presidency and beyond.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250120-1?refcode=em20250120-1647&amount=5&refcode2=1647_587540_u7mMXR&akid=1647%2E587540%2Eu7mMXR)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250120-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250120-1647&refcode2=1647_587540_u7mMXR&akid=1647%2E587540%2Eu7mMXR)**
Today is a sad day, but I’m proud to be in this fight with you. Thank you.
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250120-1&t=2&refcode2=1647_587540_u7mMXR&akid=1647%2E587540%2Eu7mMXR)**

name: A.G. Holder
subject: Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Ours cannot be the first generation that fails to defend and enhance our democracy.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100661044/523512813/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwYWUwY2RiLTJmZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DiFyMuWLKVlvn3X0ibXMvfwl6C9F7z_v3SUZgDscmvQ=&emci=3413e195-07d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f0ae0cdb-2fd7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=8431045)
---

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100661047/523512815/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HolderInauguration_email_20250120-NDRC-Tier1-HolderInauguration_NoHdshot&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250120-NDRC-Tier1-HolderInauguration_NoHdshot&utm_campaign=HolderInauguration&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwYWUwY2RiLTJmZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DiFyMuWLKVlvn3X0ibXMvfwl6C9F7z_v3SUZgDscmvQ=)
---

Team,
Today, Donald Trump will take the oath of office once again. Let me make this very clear: he and those who surround him are a real danger to our democracy.

But now is not the time for acceptance and resignation. This is — yet again — a time for commitment and action. It's fitting, then, that today we also honor Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., whose life shows us the power of principled resistance.

Dr. King is often quoted as saying that “the arc of the moral universe is long but it bends towards justice.” That is true — but it only happens when caring, committed people put their hands on that arc and pull it toward justice. **We must be those people. Now it is our time. **

With Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in power in many parts of the country, I have no expectation that our goals will be simple to achieve or that needlessly complex challenges will be easily overcome. I know that our road will be long, and that many obstacles will stand in our way.

But I have no doubt that — if we stand together; if we walk together; if we believe as we always have in the power of our ideals and the potential of our shared community; if we recognize and use our citizen power — not only will our cause overcome, but our country shall be made better.

**So do not despair over where we are today, as hard as that may be. Instead, set your sights on where we need to go and on determining how we are going to get there. **

It's the same destination Dr. King was marching towards in Selma, the same destination that Thomas Wilson Dorr was marching towards in Rhode Island, the same destination Ida B. Wells was marching towards in Washington — a destination where the promises in the documents that shaped this nation aren't empty words on paper but a lived reality for every single American.

**The journey may be arduous, but we have no choice but to embark upon it. Ours cannot be the first generation that fails to defend and enhance our democracy.**

If America's history is any indication, this progress won't come in a straight line — and there will be days when we grow weary, when pessimism seems justified, when we are tempted to let up.

But when those moments come, when the road ahead of us seems too steep and the weight starts to feel like too much to bear, I hope you will remember the giants who came before us, like Dr. King — who carried more on their shoulders than we could ever imagine but kept on marching, one foot after the other, no matter what stood in their way.

[**And I hope you will choose to fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100661054/523512822/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HolderInauguration_email_20250120-NDRC-Tier1-HolderInauguration_NoHdshot&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250120-NDRC-Tier1-HolderInauguration_NoHdshot&utm_campaign=HolderInauguration&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwYWUwY2RiLTJmZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DiFyMuWLKVlvn3X0ibXMvfwl6C9F7z_v3SUZgDscmvQ=)

Thank you,

Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

But when those moments come, when the road ahead of us seems too steep and the weight starts to feel like too much to bear, I hope you will remember the giants who came before us, like Dr. King — who carried more on their shoulders than we could ever imagine but kept on marching, one foot after the other, no matter what stood in their way. = Thank you, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:
let’s defeat Jon Ossoff

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zptspm7qrsuq06f9nmqoain5kg6ch75d182qa1ng_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie6pr0cph2bs)

This needs your immediate attention, friend.

**[Georgia's Senate seat is maybe our biggest pickup opportunity in 2026, but it could also be the most expensive Senate race in the country.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6bj8tve35nb041cr9788hb14550ap4jdum6cdf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie6pr0cph2bs)**

_Georgia is a Trump state, but right now it 's stuck with Jon Ossoff in the Senate._

**[Want to change that? Take early action now.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvhr1v5ko7kf2elu1bhd2mbmekfdhi6v0kdppsm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie6pr0cph2bs)**

Ossoff pretends he's a moderate. Give us a break.

**[Ossoff sat around and did NOTHING while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris opened our border... but he did cast a deciding vote for their INSANE big spending agenda.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z692dscrvd4ih4rc5pu4migqbce0d3jc79vr4fbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie6pr0cph2bs)**

The last thing Georgia, or America, needs is six more years of Jon Ossoff in the Senate.

But there's a hitch, friend. _**[Ossoff raised $156 MILLION](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5sst4ro39mg96apufq4q7kvocpnbrfgh7djis6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie6pr0cph2bs) **_**[🤯](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1sd8qguspcvlo5q2qkua1h5qbots6310c675jp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie6pr0cph2bs)** when he ran for Senate in 2020. Odds are, he's going to raise even more this time.

**[That's why we need an early investment from EVERY conservative reading this, friend. The earlier you donate, the further your donation goes to FLIPPING Georgia in 2026.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcqlqusnk44gep27clnko7i0hn0518me5fgl6cm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie6pr0cph2bs)**

Peter—

Today is Inauguration Day in the U.S., marking a pivotal moment as bodily freedom, privacy, and gender equity face their greatest threats in generations.

From the second the incoming administration is sworn in, we’re hitting the ground running. That means we need all hands on deck to fight the Trump administration's anti-rights agenda.

**If you want to protect our reproductive rights, now is the time. Thanks to our Board of Directors,** [**your annual gift to the Center for Reproductive Rights will go twice as far up to our $25,000 goal**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100661310/523513260/1474386068?sourceid=1150306&utm_campaign=25emrge-0104aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzA0MjkxZS0zMWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a10CDlaZDukHMn28RJMI1C2cKn_nU6lN948rXLYO9zg=&emci=f89d3346-36d4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=9c04291e-31d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237) **for the next 24 hours ONLY!** | [**$50 = $100**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100661318/523513262/1474386068?am=50&sourceid=1150306&utm_campaign=25emrge-0104aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzA0MjkxZS0zMWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a10CDlaZDukHMn28RJMI1C2cKn_nU6lN948rXLYO9zg=&emci=f89d3346-36d4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=9c04291e-31d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237 "$50 = $100")

Don't wait to double your gift— _because time is already running out._

Unhinged extremists in the new administration are poised to suppress reproductive freedom nationwide. We've already seen the devastating—and, in some cases, _deadly_ —impact of President Trump's first term on our reproductive freedoms, and we know what's at stake.

[**The Center is ready for this fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100661326/523513269/1474386068?sourceid=1150306&utm_campaign=25emrge-0104aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzA0MjkxZS0zMWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a10CDlaZDukHMn28RJMI1C2cKn_nU6lN948rXLYO9zg=&emci=f89d3346-36d4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=9c04291e-31d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237) Every attack on abortion access, every attempt to roll back our rights, every regressive policy—we'll be there, defending our fundamental rights with everything we have.

[**Double your impact for reproductive rights now and send a message to the Trump administration: we will never back down!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100661328/523513271/1474386068?sourceid=1150306&utm_campaign=25emrge-0104aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzA0MjkxZS0zMWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a10CDlaZDukHMn28RJMI1C2cKn_nU6lN948rXLYO9zg=&emci=f89d3346-36d4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=9c04291e-31d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237)

Center for Reproductive Rights

clean_body: ⏱️2X FLASH MATCH ⏱️ | | | ---|--- Peter— Today is Inauguration Day in the U.S., marking a pivotal moment as bodily freedom, privacy, and gender equity face their greatest threats in generations. From the second the incoming administration is sworn in, we’re hitting the ground running. That means we need all hands on deck to fight the Trump administration's anti-rights agenda. If you want to protect our reproductive rights, now is the time. Thanks to our Board of Directors, for the next 24 hours ONLY! | "$50 = $100" "$100 = $200" "$500 = $1000" "MATCH YOUR GIFT 2X" Don't wait to double your gift— because time is already running out. Unhinged extremists in the new administration are poised to suppress reproductive freedom nationwide. We've already seen the devastating—and, in some cases, deadly —impact of President Trump's first term on our reproductive freedoms, and we know what's at stake. Every attack on abortion access, every attempt to roll back our rights, every regressive policy—we'll be there, defending our fundamental rights with everything we have. Center for Reproductive Rights P.S. If this administration thinks they can push extremist policies without a fight, they're sorely mistaken. name: Seth Magaziner
subject: as we reflect on Dr. King’s legacy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=mwA59pKrBnx%2BOrzkpKQkOsDJRO0JRBOyrA66C59MUseCbtgLSCSH2HxDMISHN9iZQx1iCmkg3Xa1I35d73qGEmamm3G%2FZcLo0LslWza%2F8eZxW%2FRYISqSP0xX3jfOQys9kpWIKACRgBWqCsLHBFKs8nujW4sxVmP8Hwu1Zd6ee1NhDo2sR2Ex%2BjXKkyMDBQ7keP8GDTrm%2FdliBGuHopviENf1B%2BDHTnBm01EOcLTdQjOaXhcaiDvq4ouIFpEXn1rpd6L9bVzCVZnNHihwO0xTGBsbOrfKMx8tJdkaXgqpuiwk7SGukm0kkUrxP3EkkDri30YkCrKQozBeyaCHjyirSP%2Fm5Rp2YEn0npm8JSSuSIod8zbO5LAKXU1Y7obsa8MRXz%2FeSMm4zXB6sdHlF73cBgZQ0Qp1CB0U%2Fm64bvfoVSIgasuaUqdEasFt3CSB0OaT)
---
| |
---
Peter,

I hope you’ll join me in celebrating Martin Luther King, Jr. as we reflect on what his legacy means for our country today and every day.

Dr. King fought for equality, for voting rights, and for labor rights relentlessly. His vision for our country was never deterred by politics or partisanship.

As we reflect on the words and actions of Dr. King, we must also work towards his hope for a more equitable and just world. **The work is far from over.** Today, I am reaffirming my commitment to make MLK's dream — of freedom, economic opportunity, and justice for all Americans — a reality.

Thank you,

Seth

**TO: President Biden
FROM: Peter Willis
SUBJECT: THANK YOU!**

Dear President Biden,

I can’t thank you enough for your years of service.

**You will go down in history as one of the greatest American Presidents, and I am so glad to be able to contribute a small part to that.**

From your incredible work as a Senator, to serving alongside President Obama, to leading our great nation away from MAGA extremism these past few years, you’ve had an amazing impact on our country.

[I have had your back since Day One, and I will continue to defend your legacy from the Republicans that seek to destroy it. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $1 to keep electing incredible Democrats who will defend and uphold your legacy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100663113/523513999/-881335964?amount=1&refcode=UD_20250120_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxMzMzYmE3LTMyZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1wC0acig5DGp_6Kjm8KbSLNhonPbQF3LO1mhlfRnv1M=)

Thank you for everything, Mr. President,

**_X Peter Willis_**

subject: Limited Spots Left to Sign >>>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Add your name to our exclusive card to President Biden!
| Folks, in the final hours of President Biden’s historic presidency, we’re sending him a card to thank him for his service over the past 4 years...

[**We have just 142 spots left for top Democrats. Sign on NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86271?t=6&akid=18611%2E878179%2E_ihGbx) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86271?t=7&akid=18611%2E878179%2E_ihGbx) | [142 SPOTS LEFT: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT NOON TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86271?t=8&akid=18611%2E878179%2E_ihGbx)
---
Dear President Biden,

I have one thing to say to you: **Thank you.**

You have accomplished so much, and saved our country from the nightmare that Donald Trump left behind.

I remember how excited I was when you won in 2020.

I have had your back since you became President, and I am so proud of everything you've done for working families in our country.

✅ You capped prices on prescription drugs.

✅ You protected good-paying union jobs.

✅ You passed historic legislation addressing climate change.

✅ You have done everything in your power to strengthen our Democracy.

I have zero doubt in my mind: **You will go down as a truly GREAT American President.**

**I truly thank you for putting the country and our Democracy first — _that is something that Trump and the Republicans will NEVER do._**

[**I'm signing this letter and sending a small donation of $3 with VPP now to show that I'm still fighting — for our country and for your legacy, Mr. President. With a MAGA trifecta, it's more important than ever that Democrats stand united together. I’m chipping in $3 to do my part. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86271?t=9&akid=18611%2E878179%2E_ihGbx) | [142 SPOTS LEFT: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT NOON TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86271?t=10&akid=18611%2E878179%2E_ihGbx)
---
__X A grateful American__
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18611%2E878179%2E_ihGbx). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18611%2E878179%2E_ihGbx).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18611%2E878179%2E_ihGbx) to request fewer emails. body:
And thwart the MAGA agenda

Friend,

Today, America First fighter JD Vance will make history as the first millennial and first Marine Corps veteran to become Vice President of the United States.

We couldn't be more excited for President Trump and JD to Make America Great again, but there's just one problem: **[In 2026, there will be a hotly contested special election in Ohio to fill the Senate seat JD is vacating, and Democrats are sure to spend MILLIONS to try and buy the election.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3jngu97mo22os72neeg99ok1dn8u2sl13o0412g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpieeo74cdh2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmk3867e71ac8f8h129pcthlq346a58dst623h28_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpieeo74clh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrd8eh4nsa00oht52dosiuss93hu7r4aamokfr7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpieeo74clh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq5l2ojs7il05jk94jrjfg22i7csbvnp2b0535b8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpieeo74clh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi5qeoa394l61i8s5e1utosmclnfkjhm68ajumuo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpieeo74clh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: Before Donald Trump is sworn in
body:
This afternoon, Donald Trump will be sworn in as the next President of the United States.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2770?t=1&akid=313%2E2563979%2Ex7kinU)

This afternoon, Donald Trump will be sworn in as the next President of the United States. He will do-so with a Republican House and Senate ready and eager to do whatever he wants.
There has NEVER been a more important time to have a strong, united Democratic Party.
If you agree, Kamala Harris is asking you to make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today. Especially today.
It can be a $5 donation, $500 donation, or anything you can afford. The amount isn't as important as the number of donations the Democratic Party receives today. Even a few bucks adds up fast and each contribution will be put to work stopping Trump and the Republican Party when we must, while organizing to win elections up-and-down the ballot in 2025, 2026 and beyond.
So please. The VP is asking, humbly:
[**Please contribute to the Democratic National Committee today. Their average online donation is around $40. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is lots of people are donating today. Because it all adds up fast when we're in this together.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250120&refcode2=313_2563979_x7kinU&akid=313%2E2563979%2Ex7kinU)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em250120&refcode2=313_2563979_x7kinU&akid=313%2E2563979%2Ex7kinU)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250120&refcode2=313_2563979_x7kinU&akid=313%2E2563979%2Ex7kinU)**
---
****
Thank you for everything,
Team Kamala

Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But we don't want to bother you. If you’d like to unsubscribe, you can **[click here.](https://harris.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=313%2E2563979%2Ex7kinU)**

The VP is asking, humbly: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | Thank you for everything, Team Kamala Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: We’ve been here before
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250120-1189-foote&t=1001&akid=1189%2E342411%2EQ2ugm3 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’ve been here before.

Eight years ago, Donald Trump’s inauguration marked a turbulent chapter
for our country. It was a time of uncertainty, fear, and challenges.

On that day and every day moving forward, we’ve dedicated ourselves to
fighting for those most impacted by the greed and chaos of the far-right.

In the face of every attack, we’ve built something stronger: this
movement. We’ve grown our financial and mutual aid support, we’ve built a
community of like-minded progressives, and we’ve fostered a hope for a
better future.

No matter what the far-right has thrown our way, our Squad is still
standing.

Now, Peter, imagine four years from today — on the eve of a new
presidency and the end of the Trump administration. Though we can’t know
exactly what that day will look like, we do know it will come.

We are all working towards that day together. While these next four years
will be an uphill battle, we know that there will be an end to Trump's
chaos. In the meantime, we’ll do all that we can to set a foundation of
care, compassion, and progress for us all and not just the privileged
few.

Thank you for your strength, your hope, and your belief in what we can
achieve, together.

The Squad Victory Fund

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250120-movement.eY7MSf&refcode=em20250120-1189&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1189%2E342411%2EQ2ugm3 ]Contribute ››

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1189%2E342411%2EQ2ugm3

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Wesley Bell
subject: Today, we reflect. Tomorrow, we act.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

This MLK Day, we honor the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., a leader who taught us that progress is possible when we stand together for justice, equality, and the dignity of every human being.

Dr. King’s dream wasn’t just about hope – it was about action. He challenged systems of oppression, marched in the face of danger, and spoke truth to power even when the stakes were high. As we reflect on his legacy, _let’s remember that the work isn’t over._

Today, the fight for voting rights, economic justice, and racial equality continues – and it’s up to us to carry Dr. King’s message of equality forward. **In Congress, I will always fight to uphold the values Dr. King stood for.** From ensuring every vote is counted to creating pathways to opportunity for all, I am committed to building a better future for our communities.

Let’s honor Dr. King’s legacy by recommitting ourselves to this work. Together, we can be the change that Dr. King dreamed of and ensure his vision of justice and equality becomes a reality for future generations.

Onward,

Wesley

| PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
---
PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119
---

Hi Peter,

Today, open misogynist and sexual predator Donald Trump is being inaugurated as our next president. Meanwhile, ratification of the ERA is still unlikely despite President Biden’s declaration that he has always believed that men and women deserve equal rights...🙃 We **need** more women in our government, and it will be up to _**us**_ to assert our rightful place in this country.

**We’ve heard the way Trump and his coalition talk about women. Starting with phrases like “grab her by the pu**y” and, most recently, referring to any accomplished woman in power as a “DEI hire.” We are bracing ourselves for what these ideologies will look like as policies.**

We thought today would be a good time to share our plans for the next four years to ensure women do not lose any more of our hard-fought progress under this administration.

**We have an exciting twofold strategy for 2025 to increase women’s political power and improve representation:**

**1\. Support candidates in underserved races:** We don’t want ANY women to get left behind, regardless of their zip code. We’re not afraid to support candidates running in red, abortion-ban states or other unexpected parts of the country. (As you’ll see below, we know how to win in those places.)

**2\. Build infrastructure in underserved places:** We’ve conducted a deep analysis of the political landscape in many of the states with abortion bans and found that most of them simply don’t have any infrastructure or support systems in place for pro-choice women candidates. Her Bold Move is well-positioned to be the organization that will change that.

**We have _proven_ that we can do EVERYTHING we laid out above:** Last year, we supported 80 pro-choice, pro-women women candidates from 23 states + 1 U.S. territory against their extremist, anti-choice, anti-women opponents. Many were shocked and impressed to learn that **44% of 2024’s HBM winners came from RED STATES, and 47% were women of color.**

2025 will be a year that tests us. It will test our patience, our determination, and our commitment to a better country. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: we must keep up the fight. Women have made SO MUCH PROGRESS over the last century. We must defend that hard-fought progress on behalf of our mothers, our grandmothers, our daughters, and our friends. [**You can join our fight today by donating $20.25 or more right now. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100666693/523517119/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250120rightful_N_JZ_90DO_10_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ZWFlNmQ3LTM2ZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UO4OiDgCeLPAIZtt0O6TbgBUAJp6gCT3zUbMlFLPl4s=)

Onward,

Jordan Zaslow
Founder & Executive Director
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures.

**Support this work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100666694/523517120/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250120rightful_N_JZ_90DO_10_NG_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ZWFlNmQ3LTM2ZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UO4OiDgCeLPAIZtt0O6TbgBUAJp6gCT3zUbMlFLPl4s=)

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: checking in, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Today, I reaffirm my commitment to protecting a woman’s right to choose, ensuring we have clean air to breathe and water to drink, protecting our kids from gun violence, supporting policies that help families thrive, and so much more.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100668033/523520968/591366052?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-01-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWNlNjBmZC0zNmQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tMwJ2X2usuSEPBIuHQWVlx0L957K3POX_0V4oLxaYG8=)
---
| Today marks Trump’s second presidential inauguration. As disappointing as the outcome of this election was, it’s nothing we’re not ready to take on.

There is no doubt that fighting back against regressive and harmful policies will be an uphill battle, but there is hope in the smaller wins, including right here in MI-03. We overcame unimaginable odds in 2022 when we flipped this 50-year stronghold and elected the first pro-choice woman to represent West Michigan. Then, last year, despite a rightward shift across the country, voters sent a Democrat back to Congress.

It will take time to rebuild trust with voters and reinforce our democratic process amidst relentless attacks, but I stand firm in that our commitment to our values will overcome attempts to strip us of them. Today, I reaffirm my commitment to protecting a woman’s right to choose, ensuring we have clean air to breathe and water to drink, protecting our kids from gun violence, supporting policies that help families thrive, and so much more.

**I’m not backing down in the face of infringements on our democratic process, our freedoms, and the rule of law. I’m also not slowing down my efforts to claim another victory here in MI-03 next election cycle. Our team is already working on building the momentum needed to take on my Republican opponent, and we could use your help.[_Anything you can contribute to my campaign will go a long way in helping us set the foundation to fight back._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100668037/523520969/591366052?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-01-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWNlNjBmZC0zNmQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tMwJ2X2usuSEPBIuHQWVlx0L957K3POX_0V4oLxaYG8=)**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100668039/523520970/591366052?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-01-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWNlNjBmZC0zNmQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tMwJ2X2usuSEPBIuHQWVlx0L957K3POX_0V4oLxaYG8=)

Hillary

CHIP IN $7 TO SIGN THE THANK YOU PRESIDENT BIDEN LETTER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q12025_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7]

TO: President Biden
FROM: Peter Willis
Subject: Thank you for your service to the American people
Dear President Biden,
Thank you for your extraordinary leadership over the past four years.
When you took office, our nation was reeling from division, a global pandemic, and an economy in crisis. You immediately set to work cleaning up the chaos left behind and put the needs of everyday Americans first.
You didn’t just promise change—you delivered:
✅ You signed the Social Security Fairness Act this week, expanding Social Security benefits to MILLIONS!
✅ You took bold action to LOWER prescription drug prices, making life-saving medications more accessible to millions of families.
✅ You passed the BIGGEST climate solutions investment bill in history, laying the foundation for a cleaner, more sustainable future.
✅ You created MILLIONS of good-paying jobs, providing opportunity to workers across the country.
In just four years, you’ve transformed our nation – but I know our work isn’t done. That’s why I’m contributing $7 to Democracy On the Line to ensure that we can build on the progress you’ve made and elect Democrats that will protect our Democracy from Trump’s agenda. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q12025_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7]

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcf737j7v6cdir7gpsi245pi523u2mgk9817pnv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie9or4clh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z93qdiojlq920jk6udr87mbh3mnc38skcq2ccck0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie9or4clh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhjj253iin06diopooblo90s1t3c76h8lfodojr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie9or4clh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zitlc0fu6ntjnjlkiqmnnt8a63pc823r0450njbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cpie9or4clh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.” Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the National Referendum on Religious Liberty by using the secure link below: Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty." Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. The first step is ...EDUCATION. Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America. These efforts include: Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country. Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon. Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty. Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. * **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today.
