clean_body: You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty. This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty. The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open. Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation. The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.” Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the National Referendum on Religious Liberty by using the secure link below: Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty." Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. The first step is ...EDUCATION. Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America. These efforts include: Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country. Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon. Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty. Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a contribution to help us build the strongest possible Democratic Party, this is it. Elon Musk **[stole the show briefly](https://substack.com/redirect/a981d4ed-d817-4359-9d08-3b0002b465e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from President-elect Donald Trump during last night's inauguration-eve rally speech, brining his young son, X, on stage to greet the crowd.
"Little X just followed me on the stage here, he's a very enthusiastic supporter as you can see," **[Musk told the crowd with a big smile.](https://substack.com/redirect/a981d4ed-d817-4359-9d08-3b0002b465e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a981d4ed-d817-4359-9d08-3b0002b465e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
A man of few words, Musk proceeded to whip of the crowd with short but powerful speech.
"Thank you Elon," Trump told his friend. "I always say we got to be protective of our geniuses because we don't have too many!"
Watch the incredible MAGA moment below:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a981d4ed-d817-4359-9d08-3b0002b465e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Hello Friends Bill O 'Reilly Here,**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8807e406-0f34-4f22-b4c0-48c9191393d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.**
And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
• More than 2 million lost jobs
• Stocks plummeting over 20%
• IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling
**We can 't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it.**
That's why I've put together **[a concise guide to help you protect your finances](https://substack.com/redirect/8807e406-0f34-4f22-b4c0-48c9191393d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during this downturn.
**[Request your free guide now to recession-proof your life](https://substack.com/redirect/8807e406-0f34-4f22-b4c0-48c9191393d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings.
[Get my free guide](https://substack.com/redirect/8807e406-0f34-4f22-b4c0-48c9191393d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# _Don 't miss it!_ Confronting anti-Trump protesters with one simple question: "Has the left gotten too woke?"
PolitiBrawl's Matt Miller asked anti-Trump protesters marching in D.C. against Trump's inauguration "Has the left gone too far and gotten too woke?"
To say they hated this question is an understatement...

# Trump's Cabinet picks stood like spartans against a bitter democrat onslaught
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7e016e11-1454-4f92-9205-5e08d24f3176?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
Support Mayor Giuliani and get access to his latest exclusive content by becoming a PolitiBrawl paid subscriber
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..FGRLku8TCR5kK5BrYwLS1RLOWM8vKaCqWJHIpBADuuw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155246582)
This week, we witnessed the kind of political theater that Washington loves; the democrats were utterly humiliated by Trump's new team of spartans. Trump has chosen some of the brightest stars for his Cabinet, and they've more than proven their mettle during the Senate confirmation hearings. I'm talking, of course, about Pete Hegseth, Pam Bondi, and Kristi Noem - three individuals who not only demonstrated their qualifications but also showed the Democrats a thing or two about toughness and resilience.
Let's start with Pete Hegseth, Trump's pick for Secretary of Defense. The Democrats tried to throw everything at him - from personal smears to questioning his credentials. But Hegseth, a decorated combat veteran and a voice of reason on Fox News, stood firm...

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7sa3hadpah208gc4pb7o5d473lpivnfrmm9jcbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5g60pb2c9h2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znh0viaufvmhb2g6b6m08dfjul1u5060rmlv5cqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5g60pb2c9h2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt4fjvdrqg7pkvm6c4or60aqgrm6to4l3rt3dsd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5g60pb2c9h2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3r9ank3k7huv7kumk0bk9fdgj3k55dokeqma3b8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5g60pb2c9h2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zro2ie8uvkafkhob8a43i9g1bepq26dpudvu55kg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjklo72d1hekr76dtiesp7ad1hegqracjkmoq37djjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj4s1j64o7246h22sh2s8i6epj7c5g60pb2c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm6daaaj00p7a6ue5o82k5pefimm8jbfgbc8cfmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5g60pb2c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zla24osui3jlji4ep40608v9omkrb582aqeadgbo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6ctgm0o35c9h649fg)

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I need to loop you in on this ASAP

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6e70ca01456b4999a2dfb6f4966c0ad7&_e=xD4Ha7_Pm89gcro4giu8lC0wblu0iCgTkSxVwcEpdyZVh-NiYjgbqTASGbBam74yMeizdLWkXjanl4kC911eluWlCxhWXUflBiBKqrcJCfyO-6s9MiN6VMAw6X5nEicr_9Nzy8PoHQ7aWOU3ESv3icekn7IHnDNjKWNSxd9a4bz2yXRWXUCPRXuo6jYUL6LpPiiA-jX1KqtE3ikKSsG_Iu1rArN4GCpQF4hAgOi_hq22TUtgHDIGVNcxonnKy30k9bMXRal1UYlg2srO8YyDAeIhFaBNQ8nNAIddmngf8b_w6CPrqVxU-5qIEu1KEFu-51Hv-47h7Rep2leLavbvd_hFnGfLTuy0Q4v6A0i47AmlQL8WE-Zt8zUSlA2M-nLIvg9u7riUKYQIQLL7pbO8qc3PxiycoyZi04C4XPVmDTQ%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6e70ca01456b4999a2dfb6f4966c0ad7&_e=xD4Ha7_Pm89gcro4giu8lC0wblu0iCgTkSxVwcEpdyZVh-NiYjgbqTASGbBam74yMeizdLWkXjanl4kC911eluWlCxhWXUflBiBKqrcJCfyO-6s9MiN6VMAw6X5nEicr_9Nzy8PoHQ7aWOU3ESv3icekn7IHnDNjKWNSxd9a4bz2yXRWXUCPRXuo6jYUL6LpPiiA-jX1KqtE3ikKSsG_Iu1rArN4GCpQF4hAgOi_hq22TUtgHDIGVNcxonnKy30k0DesriMD9_4xf0eGQrOLf6i7tvW9ZASXNXK6ZnuvvtsNOj_vjbuYjbilEpCOaFGWNcV4_Zg4Wgn88nuBtQ9fWlo0-Q7yDpbglB4zU5J_EEqi6V5_GEMzA6cZp3y8Mp-wYroFNwQKjtbI_e0UWW_DVwVwPC_eHIlSBTjGOVBOjwY%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6e70ca01456b4999a2dfb6f4966c0ad7&_e=xD4Ha7_Pm89gcro4giu8lC0wblu0iCgTkSxVwcEpdyZVh-NiYjgbqTASGbBam74yMeizdLWkXjanl4kC911eluWlCxhWXUflBiBKqrcJCfyO-6s9MiN6VMAw6X5nEicr_9Nzy8PoHQ7aWOU3ESv3icekn7IHnDNjKWNSxd9a4bz2yXRWXUCPRXuo6jYUL6LpPiiA-jX1KqtE3ikKSsG_Iu1rArN4GCpQF4hAgOi_hq22TUtgHDIGVNcxonnKy30kA_67W9TZWWSXyTkvRl3eZmw5ag2RpFHxfuI4O3lM2vmzBmZVIdv4QxQe339FLU7xuoIRFqPEUJHem17Fk6-eE-zhzwK5PxhxF2pQnwxvXVCcn8IYUoyjEqxyUUlG8yYheVt2ICMZGIRXrosE-WBRCPKTBzXTWQn36sJNHdwUVpo%3D)**

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: My thoughts on Inauguration Day
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Take it from me: We cannot lose hope
#

Friends, in just a few hours, Donald Trump will be sworn in as President once again. Even though we knew this day was coming, today is a difficult day.
The next four years will be challenging, and we are going to have to work harder than ever to defend the progress we’ve made in our gun violence prevention movement. But I want you all to remember that nothing we’ve accomplished in our movement for gun safety has happened easily.
When GIFFORDS was founded just 12 years ago, most elected officials didn’t want to talk about gun violence out of the fear that the subject was too politically divisive. But together, we changed that narrative. Today, candidates run on gun safety—and win. We’ve helped pass over 700 gun safety laws in states across the nation. In 2022, we helped pass the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act._
So as we enter into what will be a difficult time for us and our gun safety movement, we must remember all of the progress we’ve been able to make together. Take it from me: We cannot lose hope. After being shot in the head and nearly killed, it would have been easy to lose hope—but I never did. Despite all the pain, I held onto my hopes for this country every bit as tightly as I did the hope that I would one day take a walk or talk with my family. I learned that trying times bring out the power of the human spirit.
[**I’m ready to get to work because a future free from gun violence is worth fighting for. If you’re with me, I’m hoping you will consider making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250120-1-b&t=1&akid=9851%2E3935704%2EgA3ttV)
Thank you for all that you do for the gun violence prevention movement. Please, take care of yourself today.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250120-1-b&t=2&akid=9851%2E3935704%2EgA3ttV)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9851%2E3935704%2EgA3ttV) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: Take it from me: We cannot lose hope Friends, in just a few hours, Donald Trump will be sworn in as President once again. Even though we knew this day was coming, today is a difficult day. The next four years will be challenging, and we are going to have to work harder than ever to defend the progress we’ve made in our gun violence prevention movement. But I want you all to remember that nothing we’ve accomplished in our movement for gun safety has happened easily. When GIFFORDS was founded just 12 years ago, most elected officials didn’t want to talk about gun violence out of the fear that the subject was too politically divisive. But together, we changed that narrative. Today, candidates run on gun safety—and win. We’ve helped pass over 700 gun safety laws in states across the nation. In 2022, we helped pass the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. So as we enter into what will be a difficult time for us and our gun safety movement, we must remember all of the progress we’ve been able to make together. Take it from me: We cannot lose hope. After being shot in the head and nearly killed, it would have been easy to lose hope—but I never did. Despite all the pain, I held onto my hopes for this country every bit as tightly as I did the hope that I would one day take a walk or talk with my family. I learned that trying times bring out the power of the human spirit. Thank you for all that you do for the gun violence prevention movement. Please, take care of yourself today. With courage, Gabby Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

Peter, a quick note on a dark morning.
Today, Donald Trump begins his second term in the White House.
Now, our real work begins.
[**And before Trump takes the oath of office, we’re asking you to make a donation to VoteVets.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.34Pqeh&refcode=em250120-1-120&t=1&akid=34096%2E3013755%2EtEnVVr)**

Folks, in the hours ahead of Donald Trump taking office, I want to assure you that I will never stand down from attacks on our values, our families, or our freedoms. The extreme and divisive agenda pushed by the Trump Administration will present numerous challenges to our cause, but I am laser-focused on my commitment to the progress we’ve made. From defending reproductive rights and protecting access to health care, to reducing costs for working families, to securing the most meaningful gun safety measures in three decades — a brighter, fairer future is still possible for New Mexico and our nation. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and continue the work to deliver that future. Over the next four years, I will work with leaders from both parties to get results without compromising our core values or leaving our communities behind. [**The stakes are high. We need to meet every attack from the Trump Administration with a strong base of grassroots support. If you’re still in this fight with me, will you chip in $10 before Donald Trump takes office?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100674360/523537328/-2015060710?amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250120_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjIzMjkwNi0zYmQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A05TDjHe9K88WFrCmJcnAjrOEk5Z3cbn2cmeKAD6zuY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100674376/523537344/226891441?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250120_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjIzMjkwNi0zYmQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A05TDjHe9K88WFrCmJcnAjrOEk5Z3cbn2cmeKAD6zuY=)

name: Andrew Yang
subject: MLK Day and Trump's Inauguration
body:
I’m not someone who regards Trump and his followers as universally malignant. I hope good things happen in the next 4 years under his watch. | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=2d889333b4&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
| Trump is getting inaugurated for the 2nd time on Martin Luther King’s Birthday.

I had the privilege of visiting Martin Luther King’s birthplace and childhood home with his son several years ago in Atlanta. It was an incredible experience. Dr. King’s book, _Where Do We Go From Here: Chaos or Community?,_ with its call for Universal Basic Income had a profound impact on me. Dr. King dedicated his life to combating three great evils: Racism, Poverty and War.

On the other hand, Trump is coming back to office and many who found him beyond the pale 8 years ago will be in DC to join the celebration and try and get on the administration’s good side this time around.

I’m not someone who regards Trump and his followers as universally malignant. I hope good things happen in the next 4 years under his watch, particularly when it comes to government bloat and waste. There’s a chance the enhanced child tax credit returns and lowers the poverty rate for millions of children. I see Trump’s re-election in large part as a repudiation of a Democratic regime that was overly bureaucratic and had insulated an unpopular, aging Joe Biden from accountability.

The announcement of the return of hostages and a cease-fire in Gaza is an example; there will be unreservedly positive things that unfold under Trump’s rule.

That said, I do fear an unfettered cult of personality that will cater to some of Trump’s lesser impulses. Mass deportations, crony capitalism, Cabinet picks that are more about loyalty than anything else, a continued erosion of institutional norms and a coarsening of the culture that extends well beyond politics. An America where the strong thrive and the weak are sidelined.

Wokeness had gone way too far and had failed to improve the lives of those it claimed to represent. I won’t miss it at all.

But we live in a country that is failing to live up to its promise for more and more. We certainly aren’t approaching the ideals that Dr. King championed and died for. We yet have so much potential that is going unrealized.

Can Trump improve the circumstances of the millions of Americans who voted for him and the millions who didn’t, beyond catering to their feelings and sense of identity? That is the test for the next 4 years. We will all find out the answer soon enough.
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=e3d63db60b&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=aa447b7e63&e=0f227c2ae3)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: What can we do now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Warren for Senate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/370?source=em-header&t=1001&akid=2463%2E4032634%2E_V0AXJ

Today should be about honoring the legacy of Dr. Martin
Luther King Jr. The heart and hope of the civil rights movement — Dr.
King’s dream shocked the conscience of our nation and challenged us to
live up to our highest ideals.

That hope for a better America is Dr. King's legacy — and as heirs of that
legacy today we are called upon to take a stand against racial and
economic injustice.

That’s what I’ll be thinking about today. I’ll be at the inauguration — I
believe it’s important to see it with my own eyes. This is a serious
look-in-the-mirror moment for our country.

Donald Trump’s swearing-in will initiate an era where our nation will be
tested at every turn. It's also the starting block for what Democrats will
need to do over the next four years to limit his damage and win back
working people.

Look, if Trump’s recent promises to bring down costs for working families
and unrig our economy are legitimate, then I’ll do anything it takes to
see those promises follow through.

But I’ve seen this one before.

During Trump’s 2016 run, he swore he would drain the swamp. He talked the
talk of economic populism and rooting out corruption. That version of his
presidency didn’t come to pass.

In reality, he surrounded himself with the lobbyists and billionaires who
run the swamp and feed off government favors. Trump and his circle
collectively control billions of dollars of wealth. While running the
government, they had the power to scratch each other’s backs and turn
those billions into hundreds of billions more.

In reality, the $2 trillion in tax breaks he passed was mostly sucked up
by billionaires and giant corporations — and offered the very worst of
trickle-down economics. Our tax code today allows the 1,000 billionaires
in America to pay an average federal tax rate that's far less than the
vast majority of Americans pay.

He turned the keys to our government over to a group of Wall Street
insiders, billionaires, and CEOs.

All while giving a wink and a nod to right-wing extremists and white
supremacists — his version of making America great.

He described the participants of a deadly white supremacist rally in
Charlottesville as very fine people.

After a violent mob of domestic terrorists — incited by Trump — attacked
the Capitol and tried to overturn the results of a presidential election
that he lost, he called it a beautiful thing, a day of love.

He made one racist remark after another, and applied that rhetoric to
racist policies — from the “total and complete” ban on Muslims entering
the country to his ongoing effort to build a monument to hate on our
southern border.

He did everything he could to 1) tip the economic scales toward
billionaires and corporations and 2) stir up racial hatred in this
country. Then he turned those two initiatives into a political strategy.

Donald Trump’s central message is that if there’s anything wrong in your
life, if you’re struggling to get by, you should blame “them” — and “them”
means people who aren’t the same color as you, weren’t born where you were
born, don’t worship the same way you do, or don’t live their lives the way
you would.

So today, on Martin Luther King Jr. Day, a day where we are called upon to
uphold his legacy and take a stand against racial and economic injustice,
we will inaugurate a man who is a walking antithesis of that legacy.

What can we do now?

There will be no shortage of horrifying initiatives over the next few
years. But as the party out of power, there are still levers Democrats can
pull to limit the damage of this administration — from Congressional
oversight to the courts.

While we do that, we must earn back the trust of working people to start
to chart a different direction for our country.

We do that by embracing bold economic policies that will make a
considerable difference in the lives of working people. We know these
ideas are popular. American voters showed up for Democratic economic
policies last year — approving ballot initiatives to raise the minimum
wage in Alaska and guarantee paid sick leave in Missouri, for example.
We’ve got to keep championing those ideas and not shy away to avoid
upsetting corporate billionaires.

For inspiration, think back to Franklin Roosevelt. When FDR said he would
take on corporations and Wall Street, he didn’t mince words. He called out
the “privileged princes” and “economic royalty” running corporate America.
And when the titans of commerce went after him with vicious attacks, he
didn’t back down. Instead he declared, “I welcome their hatred.”

What did we get out of this approach? Social Security. Unemployment
insurance. Abolition of child labor. Minimum wage. The right to join a
union. Even the very existence of the weekend.

All we need today is that courage. Courage to stand up to billionaire and
corporate donors. Courage to make the wealthiest and most powerful people
in this country a little uncomfortable. Courage to shake off any instinct
to show how eager we are to compromise and stand by a half-baked plan.

At every turn, Democrats need to expose the hypocrisy between what Trump
says he’ll do for working families, and what he actually does. Like how he
made big promises on the campaign trail last year to make groceries less
expensive, and then, after getting elected, he began to say it would
actually be "hard" to bring down grocery prices.

And we need to be unwavering when it comes to standing up for immigrant
families, trans people, patients seeking an abortion, and everyone else
who will be targeted by this administration.

To everyone who is afraid of what happens next, I share your fears. But we
need to remember that the political position we’re in is not permanent.

Every step toward progress in American history came after the darkness of
defeat. Abolitionists, suffragists, Dreamers, advocates for marriage
equality, and marchers for civil rights behind Dr. King all faced
impossible odds, but they persisted, and they won. What we do next is
important, and I need you in this fight with me.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: Warren for Senate: Today should be about honoring the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. The heart and hope of the civil rights movement — Dr. King’s dream shocked the conscience of our nation and challenged us to live up to our highest ideals. That hope for a better America is Dr. King's legacy — and as heirs of that legacy today we are called upon to take a stand against racial and economic injustice. That’s what I’ll be thinking about today. I’ll be at the inauguration — I believe it’s important to see it with my own eyes. This is a serious look-in-the-mirror moment for our country. Donald Trump’s swearing-in will initiate an era where our nation will be tested at every turn. It's also the starting block for what Democrats will need to do over the next four years to limit his damage and win back working people. Look, if Trump’s recent promises to bring down costs for working families and unrig our economy are legitimate, then I’ll do anything it takes to see those promises follow through. But I’ve seen this one before. During Trump’s 2016 run, he swore he would drain the swamp. He talked the talk of economic populism and rooting out corruption. That version of his presidency didn’t come to pass. In reality, he surrounded himself with the lobbyists and billionaires who run the swamp and feed off government favors. Trump and his circle collectively control billions of dollars of wealth. While running the government, they had the power to scratch each other’s backs and turn those billions into hundreds of billions more. In reality, the $2 trillion in tax breaks he passed was mostly sucked up by billionaires and giant corporations — and offered the very worst of trickle-down economics. Our tax code today allows the 1,000 billionaires in America to pay an average federal tax rate that's far less than the vast majority of Americans pay. He turned the keys to our government over to a group of Wall Street insiders, billionaires, and CEOs. All while giving a wink and a nod to right-wing extremists and white supremacists — his version of making America great. He described the participants of a deadly white supremacist rally in Charlottesville as very fine people. After a violent mob of domestic terrorists — incited by Trump — attacked the Capitol and tried to overturn the results of a presidential election that he lost, he called it a beautiful thing, a day of love. He made one racist remark after another, and applied that rhetoric to racist policies — from the “total and complete” ban on Muslims entering the country to his ongoing effort to build a monument to hate on our southern border. He did everything he could to 1) tip the economic scales toward billionaires and corporations and 2) stir up racial hatred in this country. Then he turned those two initiatives into a political strategy. Donald Trump’s central message is that if there’s anything wrong in your life, if you’re struggling to get by, you should blame “them” — and “them” means people who aren’t the same color as you, weren’t born where you were born, don’t worship the same way you do, or don’t live their lives the way you would. So today, on Martin Luther King Jr. Day, a day where we are called upon to uphold his legacy and take a stand against racial and economic injustice, we will inaugurate a man who is a walking antithesis of that legacy. What can we do now? There will be no shortage of horrifying initiatives over the next few years. But as the party out of power, there are still levers Democrats can pull to limit the damage of this administration — from Congressional oversight to the courts. While we do that, we must earn back the trust of working people to start to chart a different direction for our country. We do that by embracing bold economic policies that will make a considerable difference in the lives of working people. We know these ideas are popular. American voters showed up for Democratic economic policies last year — approving ballot initiatives to raise the minimum wage in Alaska and guarantee paid sick leave in Missouri, for example. We’ve got to keep championing those ideas and not shy away to avoid upsetting corporate billionaires. For inspiration, think back to Franklin Roosevelt. When FDR said he would take on corporations and Wall Street, he didn’t mince words. He called out the “privileged princes” and “economic royalty” running corporate America. And when the titans of commerce went after him with vicious attacks, he didn’t back down. Instead he declared, “I welcome their hatred.” What did we get out of this approach? Social Security. Unemployment insurance. Abolition of child labor. Minimum wage. The right to join a union. Even the very existence of the weekend. All we need today is that courage. Courage to stand up to billionaire and corporate donors. Courage to make the wealthiest and most powerful people in this country a little uncomfortable. Courage to shake off any instinct to show how eager we are to compromise and stand by a half-baked plan. At every turn, Democrats need to expose the hypocrisy between what Trump says he’ll do for working families, and what he actually does. Like how he made big promises on the campaign trail last year to make groceries less expensive, and then, after getting elected, he began to say it would actually be "hard" to bring down grocery prices. And we need to be unwavering when it comes to standing up for immigrant families, trans people, patients seeking an abortion, and everyone else who will be targeted by this administration. To everyone who is afraid of what happens next, I share your fears. But we need to remember that the political position we’re in is not permanent. Every step toward progress in American history came after the darkness of defeat. Abolitionists, suffragists, Dreamers, advocates for marriage equality, and marchers for civil rights behind Dr. King all faced impossible odds, but they persisted, and they won. What we do next is important, and I need you in this fight with me. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth Donate: Facebook: Twitter: Instagram: YouTube: Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2025 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117 ________________________________________This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Peter, Today, Donald Trump will take the oath of office and be sworn in as President of the United States. **Let me be clear: This isn’t the time to back down.** Since Trump announced his first presidential campaign, he’s fought to divide our country, roll back progress, and put his own interests first. Now that he’s back in power, we know what’s coming — blatant attacks on our rights, our democracy, and the values we all hold dear. name: Valerie Foushee
subject: We must heed the words of Dr. King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=%2BBR%2BLpT6hs0ojawdZgnJ%2FFc2v%2BwUSZuXzu9%2FiQEjNSVA5ZnWCRQ0p72HSdzQsC4Ti7F82I%2FY3syiszmopJhQhdFDHUqPAWJd7fbLaxVP%2FogY3kTf%2BDpLQg8XQu%2FDBivcSCxDfY7pENZgh0yeXG3Oi1w%2BHmHnY75u%2BUsS%2BAejIsSlabaUKYv2VKnzQp8IwrdRw9ltcPY%2FwU0lp61LRuBNNplK9z6v1YHgGoTKFi%2FuCKSj8lVOCITWe85wK0rWPoPe2SwsNJpIIfBESVpAQ%2B8NufUEOcKzEyzY1W5kDoQlxSkaa0DjwYnLLligjbSyYMqH7NvXptLQgWKnnFyzOzs%2FKBkf35p5DFZgBYB2wLh4onvhDAY1k%2Bya9C%2FUdOD5XNhnTgeKoVznHUEm8nVOcd9eBih5jI4HsiuNXbLUe3T8AMo%3D)
---
| |
---
Peter, it’s Congresswoman Valerie Foushee –

Today, on Martin Luther King Jr. Day, we honor the life and legacy of Dr. King by continuing his fight for justice, equality, & opportunity for all.

I find myself reflecting on how far our fight for true freedom and equality for African Americans has come – and how far we still have to go.

I grew up during segregation. In North Carolina, we could not eat in the same restaurants as white people. When we went to the grocery store, we were taught not to look directly at a white person. **Almost everything was separate, nothing was equal.**

**I was almost 12 years old when Dr. King was assassinated, and over a year later, I would attend an integrated school for the first time.**

I had new books for the first time, as opposed to the worn-out ones we were accustomed to before. But, the integration of Black students into white society was far from equitable.

Following Dr. King’s example of nonviolent resistance, we conducted sit-ins and protests to fight for a Black marshall at graduation, the allowance of Black cheerleaders on the squad, reliable school bus schedules for Black students, and more. The progress was slow, but my peers and I persevered, fighting for what we deserved.

So as we commemorate the life and legacy of Dr. King, I am reminded of what all we have accomplished, while also looking ahead to the progress we will make for future generations.

Instead of conditioning my children to avoid eye contact, I taught them to look people in the eye and greet them with a firm handshake and a smile. The truth is, we have more in common with others than we have differences.

In the words of Dr. King: “The Arc of the Moral Universe is Long, But it Bends Toward Justice.” May those values guide our actions as we work to be good stewards & provide meaningful change in our communities each day.

Thank you,

Valerie Foushee
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100676826/523546103/-1546188038?source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_012025_1_MLK_Day&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDA3MTEzOS0zZmQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hT3Y--ucqQ8EdwRr-6zL2Ub7Zi1cTvzuiQkdT6CvAr4=)[CONTRIBUTE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100676830/523546115/-1546188038?source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_012025_1_MLK_Day&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDA3MTEzOS0zZmQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hT3Y--ucqQ8EdwRr-6zL2Ub7Zi1cTvzuiQkdT6CvAr4=)

name: Team NPPEF
subject: Commemorating the life of Dr. King.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
body:
Fellow Activist,

Today, the New PA Project Education Fund is commemorating the life and legacy of Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.

Dr. King dedicated his life to being a leader in the civil rights movement until his life was taken from us too soon, and at the height of his work to further justice and advocate for equality for all. He showed the world that community organizing can lead to critical changes in our democracy that lift up the most vulnerable and protect basic human rights and freedoms. While we once again find our democracy in peril, we are dedicated to honoring Dr. King’s legacy.

We can accomplish all things when we stand together for what’s right and what’s just. It’s what Dr. King did and what we are going through today. Democracy works best when all voices are included to ensure it works for everyone.

We are honored to commemorate Dr. King and Mrs. Coretta Scott King’s lives and legacy today and every day by actively engaging Pennsylvanians on the ground all across the Commonwealth to ensure full participation in the democratic process.

Thank you for joining us in this quest to ensure that voters across the Commonwealth can make their voices heard.

In solidarity,

Team NPPEF

The New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) is a non-partisan organization led by community leaders across the Commonwealth dedicated to centering underrepresented and underserved communities to embrace their power. NPPEF ensures full participation in the democratic process through civic education and year-round engagement by centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth - with intention - as they are the least represented and most impacted by decisions our government is making.

Will you support us with a contribution today?

DONATE NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nppef_24/?refcode=EM_F_250120King_N_TN_90DO_5_NG_N_PT

Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
New PA Project Education Fund
PO Box 443
West Chester, PA 19381
United States
The New PA Project Education Fund is a qualified 501(c)(3) tax-exempt organization and donations are tax-deductible to the full extent allowed under the law.

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: Trump inauguration BACKFIRES

body:
I emailed you on Friday.
I emailed you on Saturday.
I emailed you yesterday.
Now, I’m emailing you again before Donald Trump is sworn into office.

This moment is just too important to sit back and do nothing, Peter. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

That’s why I’m reaching out to 100 supporters from Cresco to help me raise $742 before Donald Trump is sworn in as President again in just 2 hours. Will you chip in an immediate $14 to upstage his inauguration with a huge fundraising day for Democrats and send an unmistakable message that this is his MAGA allies’ LAST term in power for YEARS to come? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

I won’t mince words, Peter.

Just last night, Trump hosted a high-dollar fundraiser with his special interest donors.

Peter: If just 100 grassroots supporters from Cresco chip in $14 in the next 2 hours, I can help Democrats have our best fundraising day yet on Trump’s inauguration day. Can I count on you to rush in $14? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter, I need you to make a choice:

We can either let Trump raise millions of dollars to help enable his extreme allies...

...Or we can stand up, do something bold, and help build a historic victory. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Even a donation of $14 on your part will make all the difference on this difficult day. Can I count on you? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Chip in $19 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=19]
Chip in $24 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=24]
Chip in $50 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=50]
Chip in $100 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=100]
Or chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=25]

Thank you,

RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?refcode=footer]

name: Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: Celebrating the Memory of Dr. King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

Happy Martin Luther King Day!

Today we celebrate Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.’s dedication to equality and justice. The memory of Dr. King should inspire us to continue our quest to build a more fair and prosperous society for all Americans.

His legacy, and the movement he catalyzed, underscore the profound impact that one person's determination along with collective action can have on our society. Today, I hope we can each reflect on Dr. King’s life and decide what positive change we can each make in our communities. We live in challenging times, and it's never been more important for each of us to create the positive change we seek.

Thank you again for your friendship, and best wishes to you and yours on this MLK Day.

Raja

Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress

Raja for Congress
PO Box 681202
Schaumburg, IL 60168
United States

name: The No Dem Left Behind Team
subject: Inauguration Day 2025
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w541l-u0oyw0-kyd76rh0/)
---
# **Inauguration Day 2025**
---
| | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w541l-u0oyw1-kyd76rh1/)
---
Hello friend, Today marks a new chapter in our country’s history—but it’s not the fresh start we had hoped for. Since November 5th, the country has felt different. There have been quiet days and there have been loud days, with a wild mix of emotions leading up to Trump's ceremony. As January 20th has arrived, **the uncertainty is palpable.** The questions that have haunted us over the past few months have only become more pressing. How much influence will billionaires truly have in a Trump presidency? Will these reckless cabinet picks actually take their seats in power? And, most chilling of all, what about Trump's imperialist agenda? His threats to Canada, his dangerous rhetoric about claiming Greenland, his talk about seizing the Panama Canal, and even his absurd notions of renaming the Gulf of Mexico—are they just random musings, or are they real threats? _The answers are no longer in question:_
* **Yes** , billionaires will shape this country, forcing us into an oligarchy for the next two years.
* **Yes** , these appalling cabinet picks will be confirmed, undermining the very principles of democracy.
* **Yes** , we must take Trump’s imperialist ambitions seriously—they will have consequences for our country and the world.

The next two years will be difficult, there’s no denying that. But we are not without hope. MAGA’s hold on power has weak spots at every level of government, and the opportunity to resist is right in front of us. The 2026 midterms are on the horizon, and it’s crucial we prepare now. [**_The uncertainty is real, but one thing remains undeniable: our fight is not over. Spirits may be low today, but they cannot be crushed. We need you with us, standing strong, because we are stronger together. This fight is far from over—join us today, and together we can make a difference._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w541l-u0oyw2-kyd76rh2/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---

---

---
Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.
---

---

---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: It’s Liberation Day: Let the Golden Age of America Begin!
body:
President Donald Trump has been sworn in and is officially our 47th President and it’s because of you.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** Donald J. Trump has been sworn in as the 47th President of the United States of America, and in his inaugural address, he declared that the golden age of our country begins now--and we agree.
This monumental victory would not have been possible without individuals like you. Without your resolve, determination, and embodiment of the American spirit, today we would have listened to Kamala Harris give her speech after being sworn in as President of the United States, and without her winning a single primary vote. Your phone calls, postcards, meetings, social media posts, and conversations, along with your refusal to back down from the overwhelming tide of hate and vitriol from the mainstream media, have brought us to this incredible day.
There are no words to adequately express our gratitude for answering the call, taking up the mantle, and pledging to save America. It's exactly what you did and we are all so grateful for you.
While we revel in this historic moment, let's not forget that our work has just begun. Enjoy this day as a vivid representation of what we can achieve when we unite behind a single cause: to Make America Great Again.
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for your perseverance. Welcome to the golden age of America.
God Bless America!
Jenny Beth Martin **__** **** ************
---

name: Trump Victory Rifle
subject: Inauguration Day Special: MAGA Victory AR-15 Alert!
body:
Alabama gun manufacturer announces extremely limited, custom-designed AR-15 to commemorate Donald J.
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19927/6374453/8340b08694f0ee8cad4fa17d67427115ef3d7e2f/36a097ea6daf95df31de58c8fbeec1d1f183fd51)

_January 20th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
| | | | | **HISTORIC INAUGURATION DAY ALERT:**
At exactly 12:00 PM est today...
As Donald J. Trump reclaims his rightful place as our 47th President...
Thousands of patriots are celebrating with THIS:
The [__MAGA Victory AR-15__](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19927/6374453/fac18f63bf037cbafaad4e67d3901bd5006fa7eb/36a097ea6daf95df31de58c8fbeec1d1f183fd51) \- already becoming the most sought-after rifle of 2025 - The One-of-a-kind 47th President Edition.
---
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19927/6374453/fac18f63bf037cbafaad4e67d3901bd5006fa7eb/36a097ea6daf95df31de58c8fbeec1d1f183fd51)
---
| | | [**_Click here to see it now >>_**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19927/6374453/fac18f63bf037cbafaad4e67d3901bd5006fa7eb/36a097ea6daf95df31de58c8fbeec1d1f183fd51)

While millions watch the inauguration ceremony... Smart collectors are quietly securing their piece of presidential history.
Why? Because each [__MAGA Victory AR-15__](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19927/6374453/fac18f63bf037cbafaad4e67d3901bd5006fa7eb/36a097ea6daf95df31de58c8fbeec1d1f183fd51) features:
**✓ Custom "45/47th President" laser-engraved artwork**!
**✓ American Flag Victory-themed Cerakote with Presidential seal**!
**✓ Built to presidential-level standards!**
Every detail of this brand-new, 2025 [__MAGA Victory AR-15__](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19927/6374453/fac18f63bf037cbafaad4e67d3901bd5006fa7eb/36a097ea6daf95df31de58c8fbeec1d1f183fd51) tells the story of Trump’s historic comeback and amazing triumph against ALL the odds:

**✓ Full-auto-tested reliability** (you get a LIFETIME WARRANTY!)
**✓ Proof-tested for “sniper rifle” accuracy** (You get a Sub-MOA precision guarantee!)
**✓ Hand-built by master gunsmiths** in Alabama (made in the USA baby!)
**Plus****:** You get a **FREE 2-Day LIVE Rifle Tactical Training Course**($1,500 value) and 5 MORE free bonuses! Make This Day Even More Historic: **> > **[**_Claim Your MAGA Victory AR-15 Now_**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19927/6374453/fac18f63bf037cbafaad4e67d3901bd5006fa7eb/36a097ea6daf95df31de58c8fbeec1d1f183fd51)[** _!_**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19927/6374453/549519b856435b6d9d2fcc24c4bac32e038f0b3d/36a097ea6daf95df31de58c8fbeec1d1f183fd51)
**WARNING****:** Don’t get pushed to the back of the line. Extended wait times apply the longer you wait to reserve your hand-built, one-of-one, collector’s rifle because only 20 rifles go into production at any one time.
~Gun News USA
P.S. P.S. Years from now, when they ask what you did on January 20th, 2025... make sure you can show them [**_THIS_**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19927/6374453/fac18f63bf037cbafaad4e67d3901bd5006fa7eb/36a097ea6daf95df31de58c8fbeec1d1f183fd51).
[**_> > Check availability while you still can._**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19927/6374453/fac18f63bf037cbafaad4e67d3901bd5006fa7eb/36a097ea6daf95df31de58c8fbeec1d1f183fd51)

name: April McClain Delaney
subject: Not backing down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
In the face of this disappointing electoral result, I am reminded of our smaller victories across the country, including right here in Maryland’s 6th District.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100677485/523547807/-1146661722?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTJlMjA5NjktM2ZkNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ejeB7oAKEizvjjwPMhRGZNreIQGOcGRExlY9ohmEB5c=)
---
| Peter,

Today marks Trump’s second inauguration and the start of a new administration.

I ran for office after what I saw as a complete abandonment of our democratic principles and commitment to bipartisanship. What we’ve seen in a Republican-controlled House over the past few years is critical legislation stalled in favor of extreme and hateful rhetoric.

Fighting back against Trump will be an uphill battle, but I remain committed to delivering results and fighting for our values. I’m not backing down in the face of challenges to our democracy and the rule of law, and will continue to stand up for the communities most harmed by the Trump administration.

In the face of this disappointing electoral result, I am reminded of our smaller victories across the country, including right here in Maryland’s 6th District. Despite being a top target by national Republicans and the most competitive race in Maryland, we defeated the odds and claimed a victory.

[_**Though I will be spending every moment fighting back against blatant abuses of power and protecting our communities, we’ll be working to secure another victory here in 2026. I would really appreciate it if you would help us get a head start and become a Founding Donor by contributing whatever you can today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100677488/523547810/-1146661722?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTJlMjA5NjktM2ZkNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ejeB7oAKEizvjjwPMhRGZNreIQGOcGRExlY9ohmEB5c=)

Despite being a top target by national Republicans and the most competitive race in Maryland, we defeated the odds and claimed a victory. = | = | = | = | = | = Grateful to have you by my side, April * | | = PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS April McClain Delaney for Congress PO Box 83940 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-83940 United States | = = We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. name: The Yellow Jacket
subject: BRAND NEW Yellow Jacket OTF Knife - Get Yours NOW!
body:
Here’s Why You Need This Knife in Your Arsenal...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19920/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/28be17e42e1383ca2f01dfd8d2519af8aac569ee). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19920/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/28be17e42e1383ca2f01dfd8d2519af8aac569ee?message_id=IjVmMmZhMjEwLWI5OTctMDEzZC0xODhkLTEyNTI5MzZhMzhmOEBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19920/6374453/a480fa97e008dedc078453e7f29ce4fae3d299a4/28be17e42e1383ca2f01dfd8d2519af8aac569ee)
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19920/6374453/2663c3c95ed7a2729355857ecd1cd9717e6ba40c/28be17e42e1383ca2f01dfd8d2519af8aac569ee)
---
|
---
| | When it comes to everyday carry (EDC), there’s no room for compromise.

You need a blade that’s quick, reliable, and built to handle whatever life throws at you. Introducing the **[Yellow Jacket OTF Knife](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19920/6374453/a480fa97e008dedc078453e7f29ce4fae3d299a4/28be17e42e1383ca2f01dfd8d2519af8aac569ee) **—the ultimate tool for anyone serious about their gear.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19920/6374453/a480fa97e008dedc078453e7f29ce4fae3d299a4/28be17e42e1383ca2f01dfd8d2519af8aac569ee)
---
Here’s Why You Need This Knife in Your Arsenal: **> Lightning-Fast Deployment**: With the Out-The-Front (OTF) mechanism, this knife is ready to go in an instant. Perfect for when every second counts. **> Superior Blade Quality**: Crafted with high-quality steel, this blade is sharp, durable, and designed to maintain its edge, making it a reliable companion in any situation. **> Rugged, Tactical Design**: [Built to withstand the toughest conditions, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19920/6374453/a480fa97e008dedc078453e7f29ce4fae3d299a4/28be17e42e1383ca2f01dfd8d2519af8aac569ee) is as tough as you are. It’s not just a knife; it’s a statement. **> Compact & Concealable**: Designed to be discreet yet always within reach, it’s the perfect size to fit comfortably in your pocket or clip onto your gear. **Limited Stock Alert:** These knives are in high demand, and we’ve got a limited quantity available. Don’t miss out on owning one of the most versatile and dependable OTF knives on the market. **Special Offer Just for You:** For a limited time, we’re offering an **exclusive discount** to our loyal subscribers. Don’t wait—this deal won’t last forever. [**Claim Your Yellow Jacket OTF Knife Here!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19920/6374453/a480fa97e008dedc078453e7f29ce4fae3d299a4/28be17e42e1383ca2f01dfd8d2519af8aac569ee)

This is more than just a knife—it’s a piece of gear you’ll be proud to carry every day. Whether you’re in the field, on the job, or just out and about, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife is the edge you need.

Stay sharp, stay prepared.

_~John G._ _Gunner Gear_ P.S. **Don’t wait!** Our stock is limited, and once these knives are gone, they’re gone. [Grab yours now before they sell out!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19920/6374453/a480fa97e008dedc078453e7f29ce4fae3d299a4/28be17e42e1383ca2f01dfd8d2519af8aac569ee)

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100678357/523550368/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzRjNzFlOC0zZmQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-oPfktk3zGSW2fZ1MwWIRrniXYtLwed-jiWndXhaENw=) Today is a hard day for many of us. In a democracy, it’s our duty to accept the results of our free and fair elections. And that means accepting that Donald Trump today assumes the position of President of the United States. But that doesn’t take away the pain and fear that so many Americans are feeling today. Trump and his allies in Congress campaigned explicitly on promises that will make life worse for working families — slashing Medicare and Medicaid to fund massive tax cuts for the wealthy, attacking abortion, discriminating against LGBTQ Americans, and taking funding away from public schools. **It’s so important to remember: We still have the power to fight back – and I’m ready to stand on the frontlines to defend Oregon families.** I’ve spent my career fighting to make life easier for working people — and fighting for progress on the biggest challenges our communities face, and I’m not going to stop now. I will seize every possible opportunity for bipartisan solutions — and I will do everything I can to stand up for Oregon when your rights, your freedoms, or your livelihood comes under attack. [_**But staying in this fight will take ALL of us. There’s no time to lick our wounds. I need you with me if we’re going to win these tough battles. Let’s show Trump that Oregonians don’t back down – and that we’ll keep fighting to protect our families and our future. If you’re ready to send that message loud and clear, can you pitch in today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100678358/523550369/-533866197?refcode=email_012025_inauguration&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzRjNzFlOC0zZmQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-oPfktk3zGSW2fZ1MwWIRrniXYtLwed-jiWndXhaENw=) | | [Donate Now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100678359/523550370/-533866197?refcode=email_012025_inauguration&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzRjNzFlOC0zZmQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-oPfktk3zGSW2fZ1MwWIRrniXYtLwed-jiWndXhaENw=)

name: State Representative Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Honoring Dr. King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Hi Peter,

Today, we honor and remember the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. As one of the most inspirational orators in American history, Dr. King contributed so many incisive observations about the state of our nation. One line that resonates with me the most is, “We shall overcome because the arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice.”

I firmly believe that the arc of the moral universe DOES bend towards justice, but it requires commitment from us with the progressive values that will bring us to a more just and equitable society.

This year, and today especially, we face a stark contrast between those of us who believe in pluralistic, inclusive democracy and MAGA extremists determined to weaponize the federal government against its own people.

As we honor the legacy of Dr. King, it’s more important than ever to recognize how much work we must do to confront the dark forces of discrimination and hate, which once again threaten the very foundations of our nation.

Here in Pennsylvania, we are committed to doing the work required to combat oppression and injustice as we work toward a future that works for all.

In solidarity,

State Representative Malcolm Kenyatta

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: A personal note before the inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, before Donald Trump takes the oath of office today to begin his second term in the White House, I wanted to personally share my steadfast promise to you:
**I know that this moment and the future are filled with uncertainty. But if there's _anything_ you can count on, it's that I will wake up every single morning and fight my heart out for you and your family.**
That means taking on the issues that matter most: expanding access to affordable health care, supporting our unions, bringing down everyday costs like groceries and protecting vital federal programs like Social Security and Medicare. When it comes to all of these and more, I have a proven track record of making progress by working across the aisle, and I'm ready to do it again in the months and years ahead.
It also means holding this administration accountable and being an unrelenting force against the worst parts of their agenda. During the Senate confirmation hearings for both secretary of defense and CIA director, I spoke out about my concerns with Trump's nominees — from Pete Hegseth's treatment of women to John Ratcliffe's ability to handle intelligence that would help us prepare for a future pandemic. I will work with them to achieve our goals but won't hesitate to hold them to account when necessary over the next four years.
When it comes to the next four years, I'm ready to face whatever comes our way head-on to serve _all_ New Yorkers and _all_ Americans. And as the new chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, I'll also be laser-focused on taking back our Senate majority so we can defend working American families from this administration's extremist policies.
**I'll be honest with you: The fights ahead of us won't be easy. clean_body: | | | Friend, before Donald Trump takes the oath of office today to begin his second term in the White House, I wanted to personally share my steadfast promise to you: I know that this moment and the future are filled with uncertainty. But if there's anything you can count on, it's that I will wake up every single morning and fight my heart out for you and your family. That means taking on the issues that matter most: expanding access to affordable health care, supporting our unions, bringing down everyday costs like groceries and protecting vital federal programs like Social Security and Medicare. When it comes to all of these and more, I have a proven track record of making progress by working across the aisle, and I'm ready to do it again in the months and years ahead. It also means holding this administration accountable and being an unrelenting force against the worst parts of their agenda. During the Senate confirmation hearings for both secretary of defense and CIA director, I spoke out about my concerns with Trump's nominees — from Pete Hegseth's treatment of women to John Ratcliffe's ability to handle intelligence that would help us prepare for a future pandemic. I will work with them to achieve our goals but won't hesitate to hold them to account when necessary over the next four years. When it comes to the next four years, I'm ready to face whatever comes our way head-on to serve all New Yorkers and all Americans. And as the new chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, I'll also be laser-focused on taking back our Senate majority so we can defend working American families from this administration's extremist policies. I'll be honest with you: The fights ahead of us won't be easy. And the only way we can win them is if we're fighting them together.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude, love and fierce determination, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Hi there, Travis Brimm here, DASS Executive Director. In just a few hours, Donald Trump will take the oath of office and become the 47th President of the United States. I know this wasn’t the outcome we hoped for after a hard-fought campaign, but it’s a reality we must confront together. Because the truth is the MAGA movement is more emboldened than ever **– and its efforts to undermine free and fair elections extend far beyond Trump.** In just the past week, we’ve already seen the consequences of Trump’s win...
* **In North Carolina,** Republicans are trying to overturn Democratic incumbent Allison Riggs’ election after she emerged with a narrow 734-vote lead.
* **In Minnesota,** Republicans defied the Secretary of State and illegally elected a Speaker of the state House.
* **And in Georgia,** a far-right MAGA lawmaker was arrested after forcing his way into the chamber despite being banned.

We’re now in a democracy-defining election cycle, and I'm not exaggerating when I say our last line of defense is Democratic Secretaries of State and election officials who are committed to safeguarding the integrity of our elections. **But they can’t do it alone.** The MAGA movement is already pouring resources into efforts to undermine them at every turn.
