This inauguration underscores the enduring truth of Trumpism: it was never about the people; it was about the vanity of one man and the elites exploiting it. In Trump’s first term, billionaires thrived, securing tax cuts, deregulation, and a compliant Supreme Court. Billionaires saw chaos as opportunity, manipulating Trump’s ego to enrich themselves while middle America watched the spectacle, unaware of the fleecing.**** **Now, they’re back for Trump 2.0,****_knowing everything is for sale._** [**We must act to stop this con. The greatest armed conflict in human history

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7dde7ade9a764328aae1dd3ad5c75ff1&_e=M_kd9z2S1TIq1-iILA1mlfX6TkibkGrBsPjPncaAxH6UbY40aL2TKYUjmsqbUW3WyduW6yZMuBXPdVQ651z692ADNUH-M7fBvVCB5XI7wmohNGwwVQSOKa7-Sghl77CJJbW8cj9NprSBwBXNYyZnZng3PtWK1f0PEc9aIisS0QXDBu9sIGzBJI2-4X7HtZWpBMudCk6sJHutKOihxC1bAnhmtqI0ugReB6qPr74fPU3Wxc_w4Tk-XVC_N7MLnKyCwyu_5tlC_T7M--qrPiYsYwSWlU04x0pZS8_aW_sTmCzpWYjt51ab02gzeSeCgLKlhBpr-QjxE7l020r8i56wF7jWa5lx98SHPARv_YRWr2GNcqW2WXktxcCEzMQoWVglWl-aYR3X9u6IGk7MLFoio4P8xH7PSvIVd5POBGqaVI4%3D)

| | Peter, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7dde7ade9a764328aae1dd3ad5c75ff1&_e=M_kd9z2S1TIq1-iILA1mlfX6TkibkGrBsPjPncaAxH6UbY40aL2TKYUjmsqbUW3WyduW6yZMuBXPdVQ651z692ADNUH-M7fBvVCB5XI7wmohNGwwVQSOKa7-Sghl77CJJbW8cj9NprSBwBXNYyZnZng3PtWK1f0PEc9aIisS0QXDBu9sIGzBJI2-4X7HtZWpBMudCk6sJHutKOihxC1bAnhmtqI0ugReB6qPr74fPU3Wxc_w4Tk-XVC_N7MLnKyCwyu_5tlC_T7M--qrPiYsY6WAmbXoyzA7Vp9vgz3P9QcDWA7sAmjqHzMR3Cxj1E1ig6I0Y9UKPycWUwRMjYd5VWB2RgaOigeuXpYWj_X1QBr3ltobJUkFdOmSuZFblahPt7RcHVNq_GPba86VeQY__vJsKAcLvaXIPBAhKNiS9Zk%3D)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7dde7ade9a764328aae1dd3ad5c75ff1&_e=M_kd9z2S1TIq1-iILA1mlfX6TkibkGrBsPjPncaAxH6UbY40aL2TKYUjmsqbUW3WyduW6yZMuBXPdVQ651z692ADNUH-M7fBvVCB5XI7wmohNGwwVQSOKa7-Sghl77CJJbW8cj9NprSBwBXNYyZnZng3PtWK1f0PEc9aIisS0QXDBu9sIGzBJI2-4X7HtZWpBMudCk6sJHutKOihxC1bAnhmtqI0ugReB6qPr74fPU3Wxc_w4Tk-XVC_N7MLnKyCwyu_5tlC_T7M--qrPiYsY6ULg6dOgW998sxemqoW77ohcU2g6SMcJLJSa7_JatICQCs1kokKFB24yLyzxc3hamkJvBpsOPSruN59adtqa1ITOrWW7U5KVahp_UVo2hQXeOQIJ1xs_6DaW10V2q9-fRIuzshQ4khImef5UCpIMDE%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

I’m going to need you by my side every step of the way.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100690138/523579882/985656371?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.20_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTM4YmE0Yy01MWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_INuNPDpDdSP7ZTO5TNwlxg4CT-spZaQ0Fgl7h4IFw=) Peter, just moments ago, Donald Trump was sworn in as the 47th President of the United States of America. Our country is at a turning point. In some ways, so much has changed and the path ahead of us seems unclear. But we have the same guiding star, Peter: **Fighting to ensure the government works for communities like ours.** I’ll do whatever it takes – **including fighting back against Trump’s harmful agenda** – to get things done for the people of Northeast Ohio. **Donald Trump and J.D. Vance’s extreme agenda must be stopped.** We know that Republicans will come for the progress House Democrats have been delivering to Americans – they will threaten our Social Security, try to raise taxes on working families, and strip away our voting rights. People here in Northeast Ohio deserve better – _which is why I’m not giving up the fight for even a second, Peter._ It won’t be easy. **[And it won’t be possible without the support of people like you, Peter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100690139/523579883/985656371?&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.20_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTM4YmE0Yy01MWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_INuNPDpDdSP7ZTO5TNwlxg4CT-spZaQ0Fgl7h4IFw=) That’s why I’m asking you to join my team.** [**This is the time to come together, Peter. We can get through the next four years by working in community with each other. So please, will you chip in $5 and join my grassroots team today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100690140/523579884/985656371?&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.20_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTM4YmE0Yy01MWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_INuNPDpDdSP7ZTO5TNwlxg4CT-spZaQ0Fgl7h4IFw=) I’m counting on you for the fight ahead. Yours in Service, _Emilia_

| **A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Are you ready to keep fighting?
body:
---
It's official, Derek: **Donald Trump has just been sworn in as our next president.** It’s clearer than ever that we’ve got our work cut out for us — to not only organize and mobilize against the Trump administration’s harmful agenda, but to build the infrastructure we’ll need in the long-term to elect as many Democrats as possible, ultimately winning back Congress in 2026 and the White House in 2028. Here’s the good news: Democrats like you are already showing they’re committed to the fights ahead. Since Trump’s inauguration began, we’ve received a huge number of contributions from people all over the country who are ready to do everything in their power to help build the strongest possible Party. Take a look: [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-100dayfightfund?amount=3&refcode=em_20250120_2604_fr&refcode2=2604_22930333_FlhKKY&akid=2604%2E22930333%2EFlhKKY) Every single dot on the map represents someone who is ready to keep fighting. Now they’re hoping _you_ will do the same. [**Can you please make a $3 contribution to the DNC’s 100-Day Fight Fund today? We’ll put it right to work building the resources we’ll need in the long run to organize, mobilize, fight back, and _win._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-100dayfightfund?amount=3&refcode=em_20250120_2604_fr&refcode2=2604_22930333_FlhKKY&akid=2604%2E22930333%2EFlhKKY) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-100dayfightfund?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250120_2604_fr&refcode2=2604_22930333_FlhKKY&akid=2604%2E22930333%2EFlhKKY)**

name: Pete Aguilar
subject: Donald Trump wants to throw me in jail while pardoning violent insurrectionists.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
I know that sounds crazy, but it’s the truth.

| Hey, it’s Democratic Caucus Chairman Pete Aguilar.

Now that Donald Trump is officially in office, he’ll finally be able to make good on his threats to throw me in jail.

_I know that sounds crazy, but it’s the truth._

_He has repeatedly stated that he wants to jail me and the rest of the January 6th Committee for our work._

**But I won't be bullied by Donald Trump.** I’m very proud of my work on the January 6th Committee and I refuse to be bullied into neglecting my oath to protect the Constitution and our democracy.

His MAGA enforcers in the House have already conducted a partisan investigation into the January 6th Committee and said that Liz Cheney be prosecuted.

**They’ve shown that they intend to be a rubber stamp for Trump’s dangerous agenda and fascist schemes.**

Now more than ever, we need to build the resources to combat the GOP so that we can respond at a moment's notice to their disastrous plans.

**[So please, split $10 between New Dems and me to help us hit our $50,000 fundraising goal to fund our work to protect our Democracy from the MAGA GOP »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100690414/523580605/2038503181?amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20250120_EMSPL_E1_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjQxNzlhYS01MWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NHkd39axWg9Jn_maV4fB0Jr7vv2IZ0E-Q1jTPJBy7-Y=)** | [CHIP IN $5 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100690415/523580606/2038503181?amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&&refcode=NDCAF_20250120_EMSPL_E1_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjQxNzlhYS01MWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NHkd39axWg9Jn_maV4fB0Jr7vv2IZ0E-Q1jTPJBy7-Y=)

name: Gage Hoekstra
subject: Indiana GOP Statement on the Inauguration of President Donald J. Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** January 20, 2025

**Contact:** Gage Hoekstra, Press Secretary, **[ghoekstra@indiana.gop](mailto:greid@indiana.gop "greid@indiana.gop")**

**Statement from Indiana GOP on the Inauguration of President Donald J. Trump** **INDIANAPOLIS (January 20, 2025)** – Indiana Republican Chairwoman Erin Lucas released the following statement upon Donald J. Trump’s inauguration to the office of President of the United States. **“On behalf of the Indiana Republican Party, it is my great pleasure to congratulate President Donald J. Trump on his historic inauguration. After four years of rising prices and growing government, the American people have made our voices heard, loud and clear, sending President Trump back to the White House with an overwhelming mandate. This is truly a monumental day for all Americans, and our party is proud to have done our part to elect the 47th President of the United States!”** **“President Trump has never backed down in fighting for the freedom and interests of all Americans and will once again prove that sensible and passionate conservative leadership is our country’s way forward. Our party thanks President Trump for the continued inspiration and direction he provides, and looks forward to working with the new presidential administration to make America prosperous, safe, and GREAT AGAIN!”** ###
---

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The New York Sun is Different
body:
It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.
And we need you to join us.

| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3c1e9df9edd14d5899e96a3c430f7968&_e=5B2azEUyMYomtVURPjfesxWXxSroHNFSytnh_jdrtfph0B8uxLHQSyl3WmKDksUbzvYFRpnp6Ex2dPtpBVskdxjQBhzUfLAvTmuzjYzAPHnqh341vuuhEMubTFiheRDfhnrogWMCijG5iUvbkCqzUaGZMSdHXSpYuriv9xV9W4Yuy4zpFSouLz5RfFxr_Kfqi_hXQoTrxTKRjDMAdDPXG8fMMHgkeQyNt0MCncXYfawewIHVCqUeBLgJI7rw6BoQndfdfWh2GpA73CtySvlC5SxurmH-hoUfz3HZYrQnG_KNGmnSLwJfVeR5zBXO3ms-c3fKriPvm3jgQaaC3Gjpsov2wAF8FqKvtvbeyfoWzFqsxPxdjSay-8o6xxgwUUW_)

---
# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

name: AMAC Action
subject: Democrats and RINOs CAN’Ttank this nomination!
body:
Senate Democrats are going to try anything and everything to coerce and bully any Republican who shows weakness into tanking this critical appointment.

| |
---
| | Today I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9pglcjdk508lr1jle4kujht3ldk2a49881fhntg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5i68pj6c9h2bs)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, The Senate confirmation hearing for Pete Hegseth just concluded and the real work begins **now** to get him confirmed!Senate Democrats are going to try anything and everything to coerce and bully any Republican who shows weakness into tanking this critical appointment. We refuse to let that happen. _**[_**That's why I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh2lvp6r8gh5bq21hu0kevi342dirpp6nanuu408_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5i68pj6c9h2bs)**_ Pete Hegseth is a decorated veteran, a proven leader, and a loyal defender of the America First agenda. He has what it takes to stand up to the deep state, protect our troops, and restore the integrity of our military—something sorely lacking under the Biden administration. America and her military are still reeling from the failed leadership of **Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin** , the architect of the disastrous **_Afghanistan withdrawal._** Under Austin’s watch, America endured one of the most humiliating moments in modern history:
---
| |
* **13 brave service members killed in Kabul.**
* **Thousands of Americans and allies left behind in enemy territory.**
* **Billions of dollars’ worth of U.S. military equipment handed over to the Taliban.**

---
My friend, **our military deserves better.** President Trump understands that. That’s why he’s nominated Pete Hegseth—a battle-hardened warrior who knows what it means to serve his country and will never bow to woke ideologues or globalist interests.But we know what’s coming: Democrats will unite to block his confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment.If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak Republicans could help the Democrats tank this nomination.We can’t let that happen. We won’t let RINOs undermine President Trump again! _**[_**If you agree that Pete Hegseth MUST BE CONFIRMED as Secretary of Defense, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH Response Form right away!**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6rh2i0no8v9okl4jtms7q9e4g1vbgu04ni08cdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5i68pj6c9h2bs)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Pete Hegseth. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**. If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen!AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – **but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**
---
[ ** CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi6iia691tklf2irsq5sivjl68scp0rmn0jfr16g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5i68pj6c9h2bs)
---
Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only _razor-thin margins_ , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second. It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen. And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you.And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Pete Hegseth will take time, money, and resources. **[That’s why I’m asking you to join AMAC Action with your very best CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH emergency contribution today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znf7o5kfjucst4i1nujs8r59rlg8oodopg4i8g88_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5i68pj6c9h2bs)** Let’s send a clear message:
---
* **The American people will not be denied.**
* **Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement.**
* **And Pete Hegseth will be confirmed as Secretary of Defense.**

---
No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.**_But we have got to move quickly. We have just weeks – maybe days –_**** _ to get out ahead of the radical Left and the RINOs – _****_So please don’t delay!_****** Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning.
---
| | Thank you, friend!
---
For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber****AMAC Action**

Peter,
Today, a convicted felon who tried to overturn a free and fair election, promised retribution against his enemies, and lavished praise on authoritarian leaders became President of the United States.
**Donald Trump won a second term because right-wing media amplified his lies and conspiracies, while the mainstream media stood by, too scared to call out the threat he represents.**
Now, as Trump returns to the Oval Office, social and corporate media are falling in line. Platforms like X and Meta have dismantled safeguards against disinformation and abandoned accountability—leaving the floodgates of propaganda wide open.
**In this critical moment, we need a strong, progressive media network willing to stand up for the truth. That’s why COURIER exists.**
[**We’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $50,000 before the end of January to fight far-right propaganda. Can you chip in $25 to fuel our work during the critical days and months ahead?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100691428/523582666/-1581427288?refcode=20250120-EM-Inauguration2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcyMWRkYmQtNTNkNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O5k5V8i80h1rlBiKWXuulnSLERNA_ZOCyW5mwzcYl8E=)

* **Expose Trump’s lies** and counter the far-right narratives flooding platforms like Facebook and X.
* **Deliver fact-based reporting** to millions of Americans, especially in the communities that are the most vulnerable to right-wing disinformation.
* **Build a progressive media network** strong enough to rival the right’s dominance and defend democracy.

Trump’s second term starts today, but so does our fight. With your help, COURIER can spread the truth and hold power accountable.
**[Can you kick off this new chapter with a $25 contribution today? _The unimaginable has happened: Donald Trump is being sworn into office for a second time._
Trump's inauguration marks a stark departure from the past inaugurations of Presidents like Jimmy Carter and Barack Obama who celebrated the American people, focusing instead on himself and his billionaire allies—a government of, by, and for the wealthy.
Now, we ALL face the consequences of electing an autocrat, surrounded by techbros and cronies equally lacking in ethics, decency, empathy, and expertise.
Big-name billionaires, whose combined wealth overshadows many nations, now control the levers of power, prioritizing their interests over those of ordinary citizens. This unethical alliance of economic and political power threatens the very foundation of our democracy.
**Today, we must begin the fight to reclaim our democracy. We cannot wait for someone else to challenge Trump, Musk, Zuckerberg, and their ilk.**

clean_body: | | | THE OLIGARCHY INAUGURATED ... THE RESISTANCE RETURNS TODAY! The unimaginable has happened: Donald Trump is being sworn into office for a second time. Trump's inauguration marks a stark departure from the past inaugurations of Presidents like Jimmy Carter and Barack Obama who celebrated the American people, focusing instead on himself and his billionaire allies—a government of, by, and for the wealthy. Now, we ALL face the consequences of electing an autocrat, surrounded by techbros and cronies equally lacking in ethics, decency, empathy, and expertise. Big-name billionaires, whose combined wealth overshadows many nations, now control the levers of power, prioritizing their interests over those of ordinary citizens. This unethical alliance of economic and political power threatens the very foundation of our democracy. Today, we must begin the fight to reclaim our democracy. We cannot wait for someone else to challenge Trump, Musk, Zuckerberg, and their ilk. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: looking forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
No matter what’s happening in the White House, I am committed to making sure that Virginia remains a place where our families can thrive, our schools are strong, and our kids are safe.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100692899/523585351/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzlhMmIxNDMtNTZkNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gbULxTFc0nYm40DgfyLDwUY_CTMML3tPBVWX6uVZuoU=)
---
| Peter,

As Donald Trump begins his second term in the White House, we face a moment of great uncertainty. We saw what his first term looked like — leading the charge to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , attacking the _Affordable Care Act_ , and undermining faith in our elections. Now, we need to prepare for the next four years.

**That’s why it’s critical that we flip the Virginia Governor’s office blue in November, but before I continue, let me tell you why:**

We know that with Trump back in office, our fundamental freedoms may be under attack. That’s why we need a Governor who will stand firm and protect the rights of all Virginians. From safeguarding our voting rights to protecting reproductive freedom, I’ll always put Virginia’s interests first. The job of the Governor of Virginia is to always stand up for our Commonwealth — no matter who the President is.

Virginia is a bellwether state. A strong Democratic victory here sends a powerful message to the rest of the country.

I know that for many, today might feel uncertain — filled with fear, frustration, or anxiety about what lies ahead. I share those emotions, but I’m still filled with optimism about the future of Virginia and the future of our country — what other choice do we have? I believe we owe it to our children and the next generation to make the future better for them.

No matter what’s happening in the White House, I am committed to making sure that Virginia remains a place where our families can thrive, our schools are strong, and our kids are safe.

**I know that when we come together, we’ll flip Virginia blue in November! But I can’t do it alone.[_Can I count on you to contribute to my campaign today to make sure we have the resources we need to win big in November?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100692901/523585353/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzlhMmIxNDMtNTZkNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gbULxTFc0nYm40DgfyLDwUY_CTMML3tPBVWX6uVZuoU=)**

clean_body: No matter what’s happening in the White House, I am committed to making sure that Virginia remains a place where our families can thrive, our schools are strong, and our kids are safe. | = | Peter, As Donald Trump begins his second term in the White House, we face a moment of great uncertainty. We saw what his first term looked like — leading the charge to overturn Roe v. Wade , attacking the Affordable Care Act , and undermining faith in our elections. Now, we need to prepare for the next four years. That’s why it’s critical that we flip the Virginia Governor’s office blue in November, but before I continue, let me tell you why: We know that with Trump back in office, our fundamental freedoms may be under attack. That’s why we need a Governor who will stand firm and protect the rights of all Virginians. From safeguarding our voting rights to protecting reproductive freedom, I’ll always put Virginia’s interests first. The job of the Governor of Virginia is to always stand up for our Commonwealth — no matter who the President is. Virginia is a bellwether state. A strong Democratic victory here sends a powerful message to the rest of the country. I know that for many, today might feel uncertain — filled with fear, frustration, or anxiety about what lies ahead. I share those emotions, but I’m still filled with optimism about the future of Virginia and the future of our country — what other choice do we have? I believe we owe it to our children and the next generation to make the future better for them. No matter what’s happening in the White House, I am committed to making sure that Virginia remains a place where our families can thrive, our schools are strong, and our kids are safe. I know that when we come together, we’ll flip Virginia blue in November! But I can’t do it alone.= | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

# Protecting each other after Jan 20th
---
|
---
Today is a day of celebrating the life and legacy of an extraordinary person, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. We're holding his words especially close as we also face the inauguration and incoming administration, **“Our lives begin to end the day we become silent about things that matter".** While many of us have been dreading today's event, we recommend getting through it in whatever way is healthiest for you. We’ll all be here tomorrow to put in the work to hold the Trump administration accountable.
---
While we know that following laws and putting the interests of everyday Pennsylvanians are both low on Trump's priority list, they’re at the top of ours! We’ve been regrouping to come back strong with a **year of programming that makes sure people in traditionally marginalized communities have the support and resources to get loud and demand that their voices are heard and their votes are counted!**
---
# Repro Roundup
---
|
---
When the attacks on reproductive rights are all around us, it can become easy to overlook the people doing interesting and innovative work to make it more accessible. Our [(In)Accessible Podcast](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.N34tnv_QJJ6lQNkNuEr5I3yrVBQZhW1lagzhVJNlUA8H8zwuZcIAGjMuUMJBQuGnOs-xq2FVYzl7dD7WEdmwAbKjcV9v7UyYg-gQl__tFHP9U7mzlLwCL-XEvBkQP3GkI9wXtA68IXx7lrhEdQYQzyACLgy07HpywBY8ucw9VsBoylBGH8B6yjv-pLaOB5l5NWMAxG-Y-4NEhtNm9qHU76JyLFR09KI5-2kkjn9rC8_E9qzugoVTXtpudYzri7d6n3BAq6xOeCkJw8zxc5Z_HnYdl77uLga018TnxZobdQOva6HZpoMRGY7Fd7kgWDypjpmFbLJBlmJe1rh6lyK-xQ/4db/t8jY-SutRem-HmgEgBa_Cg/h1/h001.gNH81y5F_QuBmOAXWriwfyzXUrv8G4TaP7e6JiFwaeM) does just that! In the latest episode “When “Christian Nationalism” Meets Reproductive Rights”, host Rebecca Susman chats with Rachel Tabachnick, an independent researcher and expert on the topic. They explore the money and power behind the anti-abortion movement and what’s broadly known as Christian Nationalism (in this case Theocratic Libertarianism and other sects). This article in [English](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMQJLJbRUAuUzE4jICamY2RmkworB9jijaf4_MGQsSGC_aTQPBRCJVgtc6gOSnCFRMWU6m08VuXbr-Aj5oL45XaqSTnYGCYWnMwmCa7Sm51gL7bn0K2Kkg6qRl3vXzo5gfpcdUyPCYg1kxUhrYPp88yTtJhKjqB4QKviJVIEcvwyuZbfYIsKKnBOYozgC2tQM1BdF2frstvsWwtDZznPHXonMEbFQOIL_lhT3pryhW5Kx7lGCzd-naqDzTPwzzmCFEgkPM1VEYB_ThzPtW03G64jHrl2nQCU0tjGoOcmU0sRY-JrwYP9lRNl-P5zXgbCmoGKoX01yAVKgD2uFrQgPHxtEVDhRS9Yn8uXdqZbu6DRnPn2508qbACRRWPd86lXNR-bJxA6ja1rEoQBYpu582yC1pNcH6dKMXSd_TpWejr4ovTVwFJ-VrNgPhTqoUpjsuw/4db/t8jY-SutRem-HmgEgBa_Cg/h2/h001.7dsqfGPEhC1sMqy4ILrXey_xU0Nv9R3XwKY-shgHE8E) and [Spanish](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMQJLJbRUAuUzE4jICamY2RmkworB9jijaf4_MGQsSGC_aTQPBRCJVgtc6gOSnCFRMWoJ9gGi6_e1FfPqn2Ah9K-6IMMS9n7H5bDbUB5BBOhujo_88ByyBIx6PlvyBAdTnCZ5Hw8S5TVqk-ckM5H6IGn6J7JxqH7spwQ6wIgSIlnmJ8Fb6dg9paJRKlxMyhCnkJISc5BxUZCCYjyMIIvzFeE8EWSPENqf8pIVE35NGj3TMGD36M0iMQtGUwTCbcSPCUDGJ7Orxt9NfjxUC64ir8VSq-UrgM9Z2LR7kFTbv3Wzyv6nESSa5KzcuhWJIBsCJhhOS6WmSyfGUMbx-z2_zKa8H-8_KbJSJ2MTKZYy8Il_nVvXTndjfiRQ60AaiXGW5nkoIkaiaFU4LcQSxmMEYVmAsa5SDAX5aD0AhAK8sE-bJqesAEmOj4drqs4sWKcX8xXXCOsjrwpX-G6Hk3V1x7o/4db/t8jY-SutRem-HmgEgBa_Cg/h3/h001.qwYujOHBEYf0hnuoGJhLp9rT72op4Tzi8Si6SelNc1Q) by Public News Service provides more of an overview!
---
Conservative state legislatures aren’t wasting any time pushing for more dangerous abortion restrictions across the country:
* “Bills filed so far suggest a focus on further limiting access to medication abortion, the two-drug regimen that can safely be taken from home with virtual medical oversight if needed. Pregnant people in states with bans have relied on medication — in some cases prescribed and mailed by a health care provider in a state with abortion protections — to terminate their pregnancies.” [These states already restrict abortion. Their legislatures could push it even further.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.jKO93QIJgh5wgOzMsxCi-AwxjK789j-K8ENeHd29mYk8GiNYx554W9pdsj26Yb9v1UuNxygf6PCc0OGIq4zts9AhAnh7oP4hs-zw-C9PnKUlxQS4g_li-7oKaEMK_beciAyIRQTDJmIDY73Mxk-YHE0d-Xcey5kPF7-WuZ4LDlIlaBfoCRTmRfwu-7C2yjCMe94skULkUtxscdssFaCe2c7jAlXjA-QX_PR3Qr5KtMp_2Y3JoHXhgega9ieSM_ZmoE5F6grLjXcL9i4jo119CKbdr5gFFWgpRt7d5sEabNchMHXwcqU-_OoHFXu6UA3mAk6FUXpKfJNBSpqo4rX0v8vBx4ZvKkxHiwsPLLOQmnIlCg2pm04jssBSuwBX45uZ/4db/t8jY-SutRem-HmgEgBa_Cg/h4/h001.IuWJG2b2zvRdbfNZL-7a3LsUplT4QV80G_zDa0_oTJw)

But, in an effort to make the incredibly safe medication abortion more available, Washington state initiated a pilot program that allows pharmacists to prescribe the pills via telehealth screenings and follow-up calls. The telehealth method became commonplace and effective during the covid lockdown:
* [Abortion Pills Prescribed by Pharmacists Are Newest Effort in Abortion Fight](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdUS12fSrk6MMZIR1Ut2K6fXZAiuIlLaWTJExXi7jLNxxyFCiW1t10ZnN5kM3bdcUJm-a7UuHwYcvZwdJsOhE1hU5Ewe3rN9y3nk_hbUUt9NSDOcZaHy6hJn21TCcg43wyHPhhYrwvt2-Slemg5T7ezlNc2fLYQmfCytBV6r6FeCIuJk64-ZPy9Fz9emlgqJ4gUkADuw4BSgt9mMhdI9FNnZivIP5Pv-XAbpj0eTRUpvC5vwjm1FIx87jHwa8O7sW8XOS-YjhaO93JbM7eueWihlB9FPTVz1JdA70d9ia192pux5-ssspECrraU1j9negshQbpn8ZOVW7duXySwv0xo-SiouQUVRO-qtttMHLvyk/4db/t8jY-SutRem-HmgEgBa_Cg/h5/h001.lUFviHT7pcRNO9jbNWOd7SCvILBqYb_cCM6V6_CO0Jc)

# Showing up for Disability Justice
---
|
---
There are far too many barriers to people with disabilities having access to vote. We're working to change that! On January 22nd our Disability Justice Program Director, Mallory Hudson, will be leading a voter registration training for the Activities and Social Services departments at Brighton Rehabilitation and Wellness Center. This is a part of a series of training events she’s holding throughout Western PA at different facilities. It’s important that the staff members understand how to support residents to make sure that they all have the ability to register and request any accommodations needed to vote!
---

clean_body: Community care, being loud, and new resources. Moving forward after the inauguration! | | Protecting each other after Jan 20th | Today is a day of celebrating the life and legacy of an extraordinary person, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. We're holding his words especially close as we also face the inauguration and incoming administration, “Our lives begin to end the day we become silent about things that matter". While many of us have been dreading today's event, we recommend getting through it in whatever way is healthiest for you. We’ll all be here tomorrow to put in the work to hold the Trump administration accountable. While we know that following laws and putting the interests of everyday Pennsylvanians are both low on Trump's priority list, they’re at the top of ours! We’ve been regrouping to come back strong with a year of programming that makes sure people in traditionally marginalized communities have the support and resources to get loud and demand that their voices are heard and their votes are counted! Repro Roundup | When the attacks on reproductive rights are all around us, it can become easy to overlook the people doing interesting and innovative work to make it more accessible. Our does just that! In the latest episode “When “Christian Nationalism” Meets Reproductive Rights”, host Rebecca Susman chats with Rachel Tabachnick, an independent researcher and expert on the topic. They explore the money and power behind the anti-abortion movement and what’s broadly known as Christian Nationalism (in this case Theocratic Libertarianism and other sects). This article in and by Public News Service provides more of an overview! Conservative state legislatures aren’t wasting any time pushing for more dangerous abortion restrictions across the country: “Bills filed so far suggest a focus on further limiting access to medication abortion, the two-drug regimen that can safely be taken from home with virtual medical oversight if needed. Pregnant people in states with bans have relied on medication — in some cases prescribed and mailed by a health care provider in a state with abortion protections — to terminate their pregnancies.” But, in an effort to make the incredibly safe medication abortion more available, Washington state initiated a pilot program that allows pharmacists to prescribe the pills via telehealth screenings and follow-up calls. The telehealth method became commonplace and effective during the covid lockdown: Showing up for Disability Justice | There are far too many barriers to people with disabilities having access to vote. We're working to change that! On January 22nd our Disability Justice Program Director, Mallory Hudson, will be leading a voter registration training for the Activities and Social Services departments at Brighton Rehabilitation and Wellness Center. This is a part of a series of training events she’s holding throughout Western PA at different facilities. It’s important that the staff members understand how to support residents to make sure that they all have the ability to register and request any accommodations needed to vote! Check us out! Stay up to date for more democracy updates, events, and resources! Check out our for all of our socials and more! Don’t forget to give us a follow, like, and share! In Solidarity, The Team at Keystone Progress Education Fund + Keystone Progress | Online resources combating disinformation on-the-ground organizing with the , our reproductive rights podcast , and educational programs like the we’re uniting a progressive movement at the polls and beyond! | | | Sent via . name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: the time is now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
Today’s inauguration is a reminder that a setback is nothing more than a setup for a comeback.

name: JAG
subject: In the Victimhood Olympics, Everyone Loses
body:
When I was born in India (where my parents were working in the Peace Corps), there was a horrific and tragic practice of “doctors” mutilating children.

|
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkm0p0ik8nnpgb4trse6v35i8t7pqkqv5dns1gso_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5i6cp34cph2bs) Friend,

When I was born in India (where my parents were working in the Peace Corps), there was a horrific and tragic practice of “doctors” mutilating children. Sometimes, hands or legs were chopped off; sometimes, eyes gouged out.

“Why???” you gasp in horror. Sadism? Some demented selfishness? To the contrary. The answer is altruism: these barbaric butchers were trying to make the children more pitiful (and more profitable) beggars, playing on the sympathies for such victims as to merit a few more rupees cast their way.

You shake your head: such a thing couldn’t happen here in modern America, you reassure yourself. Here, young people strive to be rewarded for their merit, not their misfortunes, right? For their achievements, not their ailments. For their talents, not their tales of woe.

If you still believe that you’re living in the wrong century. And you need to wake up.

Go to any university campus or public school. There, you’ll find DEI activist teachers doing the work of the child butchers – but instead of physically mutilating the young, they mutilate their minds by inculcating them with narratives of victimhood.

Their subjects aren’t waving deformed limbs but waving banners of oppression. And unlike the butchered beggars of India, rather than begging, they demand. Reparations. Special privileges. Affirmative action. Safe spaces.

But the real aim of this modern mutilation – for both the perpetrators and its victims – is power.

Ayn Rand pointed out the similarities between these ancient barbaric practices and the way in which modern education deforms the mind and crushes the spirit. She did it by paraphrasing her favorite author, Victor Hugo:
_“And what did they make of these children? Monsters.
Why monsters? To rule.”_
Justice met Need, and the natural offshoot was Victimhood.

Victimhood’s unholy union with Envy is what’s driving many of the problems we face today.

The victim mentality turns people’s grief into grievances, telling them ever so seductively, _“The reason you don’t have what you want or need is because you’re a victim of..._

_A rigged system
Systemic racism
Sexism and misogyny_
... the list goes on and on.

This victim mentality spreads like a Socially Transmitted Disease, eating away at that which is best within us: optimism, reason, self-esteem, benevolence, and – most importantly – gratitude.

By pitting black and white, men and women, rich and poor, against each other in a never-ending victim-oppressor dance, Victimhood replaces one’s identity as a strong, capable individual with the label _“Victim.”_ It breeds a sense of entitlement that breaks the human spirit.

At The Atlas Society, we’re committed to inoculating young minds against this corrosive mentality by using cutting-edge media to communicate Ayn Rand’s ideals of reason, achievement, personal responsibility, and liberty to the next generation.

[_Today, I’m asking you to join me in this pursuit. When you donate $35, $50, $100, or more, you are playing an integral role in saving young people around the world from the grip of Victimhood. Click to donate and receive an exclusive FREE download of our graphic novel of _Anthem_ with your gift of $35 or more! >>_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqluh1746p76jsq0kh40lkot4i5l5vqabppohdlo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5i6cp34cph2bs)
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkd9kf7unlkkudsjgtum8vtkn01bitc4b7do24tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5i6cp34cph2bs)
As the CEO of The Atlas Society, I know that _it’s not easy to achieve your dreams_. I worked hard to get where I am today, and I am _grateful_ for the men and women who helped me be _victorious_ in achieving my goals.

I’m particularly grateful to Ayn Rand, whose philosophy gave me the weapons to fight back against envy, victimhood, and resentment. I’m committed to sharing these resources with the rising generation of young people in ways that are engaging, accessible, and inspiring.

Whether it’s through our action-packed animated book trailers, our thought-provoking Draw My Life videos, or our captivating graphic novels, The Atlas Society is using art to engage young minds with the message of a free society where everyone has the opportunity to be victorious.

Ayn Rand herself called art _“the indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal.”_ You can help us replace the victim mentality with Ayn Rand’s vision of self-determination and achievement by donating today.
[Donate to Fight the Victim Mentality >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkg4ej3f072b20drh0qtgp2arlgna5tp2hcqo948_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5i6cp34cph2bs)
By introducing young people to the ideas of Ayn Rand, we are providing them with an opportunity to build a victim-proof mindset that prizes TRUTH above all else.

Victimhood tells young people, **_“You’ll never be a _victor_ , but you can _always_ be a victim.”_**

**Ayn Rand offers a radically different message that empowers them to reach their fullest potential** by embracing reason, achievement, benevolence, and ethical self-interest as the foundation for liberty, happiness, and a flourishing society.

Ed Crane, Founder of the CATO Institute, deemed Ayn Rand the _“all-time greatest recruiter for the liberty movement”_ because her novels provide a captivating alternative to the siren song of collective victimhood.

[_Donate $35 or more to download an exclusive copy of our graphic novel adaptation of _Anthem_ and see for yourself how we’re challenging the victim mentality through the works of Ayn Rand. Click now to make your tax-deductible investment in a freer, more empowering future. >>_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv8pbo6b8s267r9mosreetvliqbvan84ip1l9tc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c5i6cp34cph2bs)

clean_body: When I was born in India (where my parents were working in the Peace Corps), there was a horrific and tragic practice of “doctors” mutilating children. | | | Friend, When I was born in India (where my parents were working in the Peace Corps), there was a horrific and tragic practice of “doctors” mutilating children. Sometimes, hands or legs were chopped off; sometimes, eyes gouged out. “Why???” you gasp in horror. Sadism? Some demented selfishness? To the contrary. The answer is altruism: these barbaric butchers were trying to make the children more pitiful (and more profitable) beggars, playing on the sympathies for such victims as to merit a few more rupees cast their way. You shake your head: such a thing couldn’t happen here in modern America, you reassure yourself. Here, young people strive to be rewarded for their merit, not their misfortunes, right? For their achievements, not their ailments. For their talents, not their tales of woe. If you still believe that you’re living in the wrong century. And you need to wake up. Go to any university campus or public school. There, you’ll find DEI activist teachers doing the work of the child butchers – but instead of physically mutilating the young, they mutilate their minds by inculcating them with narratives of victimhood. Their subjects aren’t waving deformed limbs but waving banners of oppression. And unlike the butchered beggars of India, rather than begging, they demand. Reparations. Special privileges. Affirmative action. Safe spaces. But the real aim of this modern mutilation – for both the perpetrators and its victims – is power. Ayn Rand pointed out the similarities between these ancient barbaric practices and the way in which modern education deforms the mind and crushes the spirit. She did it by paraphrasing her favorite author, Victor Hugo: “And what did they make of these children? Monsters. Why monsters? To rule.” Justice met Need, and the natural offshoot was Victimhood. Victimhood’s unholy union with Envy is what’s driving many of the problems we face today. The victim mentality turns people’s grief into grievances, telling them ever so seductively, “The reason you don’t have what you want or need is because you’re a victim of... A rigged system Systemic racism Sexism and misogyny ... the list goes on and on. This victim mentality spreads like a Socially Transmitted Disease, eating away at that which is best within us: optimism, reason, self-esteem, benevolence, and – most importantly – gratitude. By pitting black and white, men and women, rich and poor, against each other in a never-ending victim-oppressor dance, Victimhood replaces one’s identity as a strong, capable individual with the label “Victim.” It breeds a sense of entitlement that breaks the human spirit. At The Atlas Society, we’re committed to inoculating young minds against this corrosive mentality by using cutting-edge media to communicate Ayn Rand’s ideals of reason, achievement, personal responsibility, and liberty to the next generation. As the CEO of The Atlas Society, I know that it’s not easy to achieve your dreams. I worked hard to get where I am today, and I am grateful for the men and women who helped me be victorious in achieving my goals. I’m particularly grateful to Ayn Rand, whose philosophy gave me the weapons to fight back against envy, victimhood, and resentment. I’m committed to sharing these resources with the rising generation of young people in ways that are engaging, accessible, and inspiring. Whether it’s through our action-packed animated book trailers, our thought-provoking Draw My Life videos, or our captivating graphic novels, The Atlas Society is using art to engage young minds with the message of a free society where everyone has the opportunity to be victorious. Ayn Rand herself called art “the indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal.” You can help us replace the victim mentality with Ayn Rand’s vision of self-determination and achievement by donating today. By introducing young people to the ideas of Ayn Rand, we are providing them with an opportunity to build a victim-proof mindset that prizes TRUTH above all else. Victimhood tells young people, “You’ll never be a victor , but you can always be a victim.” Ayn Rand offers a radically different message that empowers them to reach their fullest potential by embracing reason, achievement, benevolence, and ethical self-interest as the foundation for liberty, happiness, and a flourishing society. Ed Crane, Founder of the CATO Institute, deemed Ayn Rand the “all-time greatest recruiter for the liberty movement” because her novels provide a captivating alternative to the siren song of collective victimhood. Ayn Rand’s novels stand as a testament to the human spirit and a celebration of the individual’s power to break through the fog of Victimhood, Envy, and Resentment and instead realize a future marked by achievement, pride, and gratitude. Along with my colleagues at The Atlas Society, I’m on a mission to reach 1 BILLION young people with Ayn Rand’s work. I hope you’ll join me! Thank you in advance for your support, Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG) CEO The Atlas Society The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. | | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Sheri, United We Dream
subject: We’ve got a long fight ahead, andyou’ll need to have our community’sback!
body:
We’ll need to stick together to protect immigrants and defy Trump’s agenda! | | | Peter, **Once again, I find myself on the doorstep of a White House that I am too familiar with.** The fight ahead won’t be easy, but this time, we know exactly what we’re up against: a Trump administration that lies, chooses billionaires over working-class people, and that threatens to carry out cruel and destructive attacks on immigrant, trans, and queer communities. Trump will go against immigrants like my mom Margarita, who juggles three jobs as a restaurant worker, or my uncle Javier, who works as a landscaper and gardener in Texas. He’ll try to remove the birthright citizenship of children born to immigrant parents — teachers, grocery store workers, and vital community members who have built their entire lives here, like my sisters Yuritzi and Yadira. He’ll stop at nothing to uproot the lives of hundreds of thousands of DACA recipients who have built their families, homes, and careers in the U.S. **Continued attacks on DACA, like last week’s Fifth Circuit Court ruling, are a reminder of everything that is at stake.** **There’s no hiding from it: with Trump officially taking office today, we’ll need all hands on deck from Day 1 to protect immigrant communities and fight for a better future for our communities! 🤝** We’re building a strong and sustainable movement to defend immigrants, and we’re counting on you to help grow our impact. **Join our Here to Stay Network today to keep our communities safe from family separation and deportation!** **[👉 FIGHT WITH US 👈](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dC91rsipD286ESFr9EvsYLUJig4VkQHgcNi6qJi15c52SbrKPk4dPM-zDLji456Mryg0k3mEDMV_VaE7iC6WqhQ3hAQmUXvoXWoPTzQmLIhdmVTLMhAVc9FhK_mO-UebOVyv9-0cr8FfpbGup86orvjFhBflq70B-kL7nK4ezhSHtNddx3LliXFzstrcTd1zBDzm35FAg0WIBL7Lfl8e5EmYY9t3odZ_lC8-IS7NAhv8kkB4qv0nN960tbS7wBgUnkphUJfYGuQaRjSpPgK-ZTbCeLYwSSg0zacBMy6YmHFLw/4db/S1MhKqjuSTCy4QRf4Le-aA/h0/h001.0bFOFiArnYKxiQo_lWB7f9Cr15BXK7fEtjZScH06LUc)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dC91rsipD286ESFr9EvsYLUJig4VkQHgcNi6qJi15c52SbrKPk4dPM-zDLji456Mrw668QJBJDUBTLtBcF9KBNnRELpeVFOJR_mXyA3rNtFgQALkU42GYrjKEc77vlqO9OdmQOdubUM58YDt0wV2yp9SgtG_HTjUBrphgS9KcznL_sJcDZ-B-0Rhc00a6RLOh30ULsoLLmYpVyf-GAtDpRfHfU7sTh7r5-yVzu2K-pD5KIPzsWxxzJVxvCgEZNBnuvun5rX6Xb9L3axiEG9RNp62rhg0_BvXkkIFOJYe0kLoQ/4db/S1MhKqjuSTCy4QRf4Le-aA/h1/h001.At_7F52M9dGMqCgnO23BoMnhBAV9YmwiLASFepkYFQM) **When you sign up to our Here to Stay Network, you’ll be the first to hear about:**
* **✅** Real ways you can step up in your daily life to protect immigrants around you.
* 💡Calls to action so we can hold elected officials accountable and deliver the changes our communities need — on both the federal and local levels.
* **🤝** Resources to share with immigrant loved ones in your life!

As we know, caring for our community can look like cooking a meal for our neighbors, tending to a community garden, or even maintaining beloved murals. **Today, as Trump is inaugurated into office, community care is summoning the courage within ourselves and each other to keep our families and communities together.** [**Ready to start taking bold action to show up for your neighbors, peers, and loved ones? Join our Here to Stay Network today!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dC91rsipD286ESFr9EvsYLUJig4VkQHgcNi6qJi15c52SbrKPk4dPM-zDLji456MrzZykU2sB2-SY1arh93wikqMJ8sTAuOaoZ6O8yyETClwmSc-T8j5kV3B16ewLAFoQeL-MFChdNYheP_L427nQbTEqUY7wAd6kgRfpLCmzjpE8X6zpr3mCxO-y_McyV4CZzWbKn9YQpSBkuILG6lB5fpY67ss_O342Fr6OtOf2LSk0E4qVIINlV3ZxL3F_-bxB5Pk56d4a-sdrt3644x43QfxORbHQD0zZbEnJbwAP4s_Q/4db/S1MhKqjuSTCy4QRf4Le-aA/h2/h001.qVuol8OEkqgZq5jYmIOZEWrgi3EDnon9xRmTUJvpJYw) In unity, Sheri and the UWD team P.S.: We’re hosting the ["Court Slams DACA, Trump Threatens Immigrants: National Call"](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHpHZzKETPINR-OZJ2BfuIgy8hLMvnC17fZmtI7qcoaE0LcwpFCQqqvCDhtPBGHlB9jScKsXYadpq5eMRL-wTawaSqe8XuIDGUJEkoK0nidHaFiN_qmjIoUtswLULFNKXgSMLBKvxbwu3puG4QiBNGQVB_rrSl0EqGHH5ssCF9Utl9iXjFcn2X5Avpk46YfjhNUZbnJeIe_aS9TriQy0ZsQkuKzYgYTLkYQ5S274VyzgiddZHWWG18KCt-d0YBNImaJUboNPwb96O31ajsudNEo2g/4db/S1MhKqjuSTCy4QRf4Le-aA/h3/h001.Vvaj1L-gaSJ75lWqtxUoIqIXKwYlNDkHpx3WT4LAJB4) on Wednesday, January 22, at 7 pm ET/ 6 pm CT to process this moment together, discuss key ways to turn our defiance into action, and breakdown what to expect from Trump’s first days in office. [I’m hoping to see you there — sign up today to save your spot!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHpHZzKETPINR-OZJ2BfuIgy8hLMvnC17fZmtI7qcoaE0LcwpFCQqqvCDhtPBGHlB9jBBxrvOosQrUBqyuTGeh-SrIoMpu4j2JknLLRvMhW8ogvD6kTlmI-sKTgajmroIO2-Qk4Xz-rh2dCG3wEnxlnjjrga-N9CWMYCfJJJkiMxXiWuR4CEs23FWEERXyZns7P6fZGjreRWjN5kFaajtdXjXqA6aUHMkTboQT5m7AcMQXfqVcASTs5yb0mL19UwMt_AnR9G2yJoI27ewm6TaJFNA/4db/S1MhKqjuSTCy4QRf4Le-aA/h4/h001.659YJqlosQhmitjmzc_ZDJRsqyiXWtCLBxj9k2PjDSo) **

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: honoring Dr. King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Dear friend,

Today we take a moment to honor the life and legacy of Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. — a leader whose courage inspired a movement for justice that shaped our nation’s history.

Dr. King’s unwavering commitment to equality, along with a steadfast belief in nonviolence, changed our world forever — and for the better. Around 60 years ago, this great activist led the fight against discrimination and voter suppression, resulting in the passage of landmark legislation in the Civil Rights Act of 1964 and the Voting Rights Act of 1965.

But today also marks the beginning of a challenging new chapter for our country. As Donald Trump is once again sworn into office, the contrast between Dr. King’s vision of justice and Trump’s divisive, dangerous agenda couldn’t be clearer. This is a reminder that the fight for equality and progress is far from over — and it’s one we cannot afford to lose.

Dr. King’s vision of justice goes beyond legal protections. We must build a society in which every person, regardless of background, can live with dignity. Today, we not only reflect on his vision and work, but also recommit ourselves to his dream — one that requires collective action.

We must remember that his tireless efforts impacted generations to come. And as we live through divided and difficult times, leaders like Dr. King give me hope that we can fight for bold changes to bring liberty and justice for all.

So, friend, we urge you to reflect on Dr. King’s life and legacy today and every day. And we will honor his legacy by continuing his work.

— Rep. Eric Swalwell

name: Team Freedom VA
subject: 💨 We’ve Been Busy… 🏃
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
https://freedomva.org/ [https://freedomva.org/]
We are officially in the second week of the 2025 Virginia General Assembly Session, after a delayed start due to weather earlier this month. It’s a short session this year, and we have been busy!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/85567/images/Screenshot%202025-01-20%20121907.png]
Senator Stella Pekarky speaks at a press conference announcing her legislation to ban hidden fees. Left to Right: Delegate Alfonso Lopez, Delegate Adele McClure, Senator Stella Pekarsky
Last week, we met at the General Assembly Building as Senator Stella Pekarsky and Delegate Adele McClure announced new legislation that would ban hidden fees on transactions from live-event ticketing to rental agreements, saving Virginians thousands of dollars each year.
“At a time when corporate profits have never been higher, some businesses are still trying to deceive Virginians into paying more and getting nothing in return for the extra. We have to prioritize Virginia consumers over big corporations.” -Senator Stella Pekarsky
Thank you to Senator Stella Pekarsky, Delegate Adele McClure, Delegate Alfonso Lopez, Jay Speer from the Virginia Poverty Law Center, and impacted Virginian Katie Fitz for joining us in support of this important legislation.
Read More Here [https://www.wvtf.org/news/2025-01-20/is-virginia-about-to-crack-down-on-junk-fees]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/85567/images/5020041447_81853582bd_o.jpg]
We have been hard at work, testifying in front of committees and speaking to legislators about a Prescription Drug Affordability Board, Paid Family and Medical Leave, Banning Hidden Fees, affordable housing, and so much more! Here are a few positive updates from this session so far:
Prescription Drug Affordability Board: HB1724 [https://lis.virginia.gov/bill-details/20251/HB1724] (Del. Karrie Delaney) has passed through the House Labor and Commerce committee and moved to House Appropriations. Contact the delegates on the House Appropriations committee to show your support for a PDAB in Virginia!
Contact Your Delegates [https://lis.virginia.gov/session-details/20251/committee-information/H02/committee-details]
Constitutional Amendments: Three constitutional amendments protecting Virginian’s right to Marriage Equality ( SJ 249 [https://lis.virginia.gov/bill-details/20251/SJ249] ), Fundamental Right to Vote ( SJ 248 [https://lis.virginia.gov/bill-details/20251/SJ248] ), and Right to Reproductive Freedom ( SJ 247 [https://lis.virginia.gov/bill-details/20251/SJ247] ) have passed through the House of Delegates and are being considered in the Senate.
We are so excited to keep fighting for a fair and affordable Virginia, and we can’t wait to see what else this session will bring.
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVA [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVA] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva] https://www.linkedin.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://www.linkedin.com/TeamFreedomVa]
Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc.
Freedom Virginia
PO Box 10102
Norfolk, VA 23513
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/q_CpamaVEkCe6YwjAflTPw2?unsubscribedata=CGkHR4MoCEr%2Bwa5JRvMl1CwnxQLbTML4WUAnC%2Fabvuoxuu5UAV7aCUmrQbAXEExEQ1H52sQu7OEm4CUijyUiF2kW51PlSb2OR5GBQTXD7saO9MYtD%2FQdIHPPBpTff7AHnLv625J0HzrZ8XGff8lYnpnhan5Z1B2zG%2F9ECCE8HkNJ8V5SXjUahGU6YN0yRcAyhLWhKy%2BgtzM09oHmvJHBo%2BXT3PD8pnkXto6s7Kj1920aS1wqMMRCZzxUq%2FODe1tgnnVAorTcVb%2F3Cn%2BxzYlnS8yIIlWNkFve7AjTQ9McmenoGM5cBbr31yy%2BvWNV4lh8TWYdQYOaYXwYjLlCvlK9luzwuiBFV8eA5QU7scaWFvOeSUMcn3f65LaW3la8MiV5SEm7PA%2BBfL%2F%2FRXyyLMxXNEa3xOzv2nOWT6MOBsz3Bl8%3D .

name: John Fetterman
subject: My Promise For 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m never backing down from fighting for what’s right.
#
Derek, it's John Fetterman.
Even though Donald Trump is officially back in the White House, I’m not backing down from fighting for what’s right. **Here are my non-negotiables:**
1️⃣ The union way of life needs to live on
2️⃣ Leave LGBTQ+ people the f*ck alone
3️⃣ Government’s job is to make your life easier, not take away your rights
I’ll work with Trump where I can to get wins for PA, but I’ll fight back *vigorously* if his administration tries to take away our rights and freedoms.
**And regardless of who’s in the White House, I’ll never turn my back on the people who need me to lift up their voices. That’s a promise.**
[**Derek, if you want to keep me in the Senate fighting for your rights, will you kick in $5 or anything you can right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250120?refcode=em20250120-9806&refcode2=9806_434096_5x_AOr&akid=9806%2E434096%2E5x_AOr)

Thanks for standing with me,
John ❤️

U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: I’m never backing down from fighting for what’s right. Derek, it's John Fetterman. Even though Donald Trump is officially back in the White House, I’m not backing down from fighting for what’s right. Here are my non-negotiables: 1️⃣ The union way of life needs to live on 2️⃣ Leave LGBTQ+ people the fck alone 3️⃣ Government’s job is to make your life easier, not take away your rights I’ll work with Trump where I can to get wins for PA, but I’ll fight back vigorously if his administration tries to take away our rights and freedoms. And regardless of who’s in the White House, I’ll never turn my back on the people who need me to lift up their voices. That’s a promise. Thanks for standing with me, John ❤️ John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Yoni Landau
subject: These last 100 days have been gut wrenching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rapid Resist Action
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/92062/images/movement%20labs%20logo.png]
Now we find god or at least each other
These last 100 days have been gut wrenching for democracy lovers. But for 230,000 more votes across 3 states, President Kamala Harris would be inaugurated today, and our world flipped upside down.
What now? We must remember who we are as a movement, and why: we are those that believe love and justice will prevail. That our country can still fulfill the promise that everyone - no matter their sex, race, or class - truly has dignity.
If you are considering stepping back and out of the struggle today, watch these three minutes. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zgVrlx68v-0] Reverend King was assassinated while helping to lead a strike for Memphis sanitation workers. Nearly 60 years later, his Poor People's Campaign [https://www.poorpeoplescampaign.org/] continues ( w a call at 7 ET today [https://web.cvent.com/event/b3da3cc3-a325-4a0e-bf74-39889bf8cb3b/summary] ). As does a disturbing level of poverty that is a major driver of the situation we're in. If our country can be so unfair, clearly the system is rigged. If the system is so rigged, our leaders must be corrupt, so decency and honesty must be in fact, deceit. So: Trump.
MLK Jr saw that there is no freedom for any until we are all free. In this, and so much, I believe that Reverend King is the true animating spirit of our movement. We will need, over the next four years, to walk to his well again and again, to drink from his wisdom and replenish.
The essence of that well is love. If that seems like a stretch for this moment, trust me that it will not be fear, or fury, or disgust that brings us out of Egypt. We're being called to bring our full selves, our whole-hearted selves, our boldest and most courageous, our most generous selves to this struggle.
“Power without love is reckless and abusive, and love without power is sentimental and anemic. Power at its best is love implementing the demands of justice, and justice at its best is power correcting everything that stands against love.” — Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.
Surrounded by the acts of cynical capitulation from public figures, it can be exceptionally hard to find the fire of love still resonant inside of us. And yet, I believe that is what's required of us.
This feels unusual for me to acknowledge. I've spent the last 8 years becoming more and more of a technocrat, even if an "innovation" focused one. And I still believe in these tools. I believe that having feedback on whether what we're doing is working is crucial. But I believe that this moment will also require us to step into a trust in something even higher than audited randomized controlled trial results. It was the powerful words of Reverend King that pulled me as a 20 year old into becoming an activist. Something like those words will be required to survive and win now.
We win when we show that love and righteousness can be the greater force than fear and cunning. When that force is wielded for justice, and with power enough to win not just for us, but to win true justice for those harmed.
For all those in this fight for the long-term, it's time to gather together, to keep that sacred fire lit through this winter. I'll be starting with a simple little MLK Jr listening, discussion, and action group on Friday [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScrLfLU7LTl_4ScUJka9P00J1lR8v-Gliwv4lInIHYH3cVJKw/viewform?usp=header] .
I hope that Movement Labs can be a support to many, many people committed to continuing to do both the bold and transformational, and the day to day work.
I see you. I love you. Thank you for digging deep and staying with us.
Yoni
Join Us Friday [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScrLfLU7LTl_4ScUJka9P00J1lR8v-Gliwv4lInIHYH3cVJKw/viewform?usp=header]
Contact Us
Rapid Resist Action
2045 W Grand Ave Ste B #31638
Chicago, IL 60612
United States
Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes.
https://www.facebook.com/movementlabsus [https://www.facebook.com/movementlabsus] https://twitter.com/movement_labs [https://twitter.com/movement_labs] https://instagram.com/movement_labs_us/ [https://instagram.com/movement_labs_us/]

body:
If you’re feeling anxious about what lies ahead, you’re not alone.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100695663/523591204/716413957?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjlmMjJlYi01OGQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NOHjsq08Wvmalu6NUEpBvNHWW194CgO_GCWyiTRLa8U=)

Peter,
If you’re feeling anxious about what lies ahead, you’re not alone.
But here’s what I want you to know: In Minnesota, we will defend our progress, protect our communities, and uphold our shared values—no matter what comes our way.
If President Trump tries to advance a hateful agenda in our state and undermine the values we hold dear, I’ll be ready. But I need you by my side.
I still believe with all my heart that we can rise above the politics of fear and division and move our state and country forward. But we can’t stop working to make it happen.
[**If you’re ready to fight for a future where no one is left behind and nobody gets told they don’t belong, stand with me and send a donation to power our work today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100695665/523591205/716413957?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjlmMjJlYi01OGQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NOHjsq08Wvmalu6NUEpBvNHWW194CgO_GCWyiTRLa8U=)

clean_body: If you’re feeling anxious about what lies ahead, you’re not alone. | = Peter, If you’re feeling anxious about what lies ahead, you’re not alone. But here’s what I want you to know: In Minnesota, we will defend our progress, protect our communities, and uphold our shared values—no matter what comes our way. If President Trump tries to advance a hateful agenda in our state and undermine the values we hold dear, I’ll be ready. But I need you by my side. I still believe with all my heart that we can rise above the politics of fear and division and move our state and country forward. But we can’t stop working to make it happen. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m grateful, Tim Walz ********=******

name: Trump Victory AR15
subject: "Holy..." -Ted Nugent's First Look at Trump AR-15
body:
Dear True American,
| | | |
---
| | | | | Fellow Patriot,
The Motor City Madman just broke the internet...
Ted Nugent walked into his local gun shop, picked up our [__MAGA Victory AR-15__](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19915/6374453/4d32d3e11fb39c4448d2852ae250c6f4740c9986/d0c691326d617666013dcca163d4986ac5e39b45), and what happened next left everyone speechless.
His unfiltered reaction was shared LIVE on his TV show - and it's unlike anything we've ever seen:
---
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19915/6374453/4d32d3e11fb39c4448d2852ae250c6f4740c9986/d0c691326d617666013dcca163d4986ac5e39b45)
---
| | |
[**_Tap here to see Ted Nugent's unfiltered reaction! >>_**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19915/6374453/4d32d3e11fb39c4448d2852ae250c6f4740c9986/d0c691326d617666013dcca163d4986ac5e39b45)
You have to see his face when he:

**✓** Inspects the custom American Flag "Victory" Cerakote finish

**✓** Shows off the sub-MOA accuracy guarantee PROOF target

**✓** Giggles with delight as he inspects the laser-engraving
**✓** And what he says after testing the trigger press
**WARNING** : Ted's exact words about the _MAGA Victory AR-15_ may be too much for this email...
But you can see his uncensored reaction right here:

Your unwavering commitment to our cause has been instrumental in driving meaningful change, and we're grateful for your partnership. | | "CLAIM MY AWARD" By "accepting your Golden Gavel Award" , you'll not only be recognized for your achievements, but you'll also be empowering us to keep fighting for the values we hold dear. Please accept your award immediately -it is available today only. | | "ACCEPT THE GOLDEN GAVEL AWARD" Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our cause. We're proud to have you on our team as we begin this new chapter in American history. | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (21818). NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. Terms and Conditions . Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
We’re counting on you.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100697173/523593447/1328794144?refcode=ea.d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNjE3NmMwLTVhZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hgG_8x9YABqnQI5-X2pATaCAdaIYUCdby1JtcIhbQfU=&emci=0cd650ba-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)
---
Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. once said, “ _We must accept finite disappointment, but never lose infinite hope._ ” As Donald Trump’s inauguration ushers in a difficult chapter for our country and the fight against the climate crisis, we hold tightly to those words. Yes, there are challenges ahead: Big Oil lobbyists walking through the front door of the White House, climate denial written into policy, and reckless, short-sighted decisions that put profits over people. But there is also hope. Hope in the power of people coming together. Hope in our ability to resist injustice and fight for a better future. **Jane is ready to keep fighting, and so are we — but we can’t do this alone.** **[That’s why we’re asking: Will you take the Resistance Pledge today and commit to fighting Trump’s dangerous agenda?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100697174/523593448/-1470451770?refcode=ea.d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNjE3NmMwLTVhZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hgG_8x9YABqnQI5-X2pATaCAdaIYUCdby1JtcIhbQfU=&emci=0cd650ba-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)** | [**TAKE THE PLEDGE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100697175/523593449/-1470451770?refcode=ea.d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNjE3NmMwLTVhZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hgG_8x9YABqnQI5-X2pATaCAdaIYUCdby1JtcIhbQfU=&emci=0cd650ba-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)
---
Last year, grassroots activists like you helped us **_elect nearly 100 climate champions in high-stakes races around the country_**. Just this month, **our first endorsed climate champion of 2025 won a critical special election in Virginia** , stopping Trump’s allies from gaining ground.
These victories are proof of what we can achieve when we stay united.
The stakes are higher now than ever before. **Over 100,000 down-ballot seats are up for grabs this year** — positions that could decide whether Trump and Big Oil succeed in their assault on climate progress at the state and local levels.
That’s why every action we take matters. **[By signing this pledge, you’re sending a clear message: You’re ready to resist. You’re ready to fight. And you’re ready to win.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100697176/523593450/-1470451770?refcode=ea.d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNjE3NmMwLTVhZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hgG_8x9YABqnQI5-X2pATaCAdaIYUCdby1JtcIhbQfU=&emci=0cd650ba-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)**
On this MLK Day, let’s honor his legacy of fighting injustice by showing Donald Trump and his fossil fuel allies that they’re not getting a free pass.
Together, we can build a firewall of climate leaders who will protect the climate policies we’ve fought so hard for — and push for bold new ones.
[**TAKE THE PLEDGE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100697177/523593451/-1470451770?refcode=ea.d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNjE3NmMwLTVhZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hgG_8x9YABqnQI5-X2pATaCAdaIYUCdby1JtcIhbQfU=&emci=0cd650ba-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d26176c0-5ad7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)
---
Let’s do this!
Team JanePAC

name: Progressive Virginians for Alex Bastani
subject: Honoring Dr. King’s Legacy: Justice for Workers Everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Virginians for Alex BastaniP
body:
Let us honor Dr. King’s dream by fighting for a world where no one is left behind, where work is valued, and where the promise of equality and justice

| | | | |
---
| | | | |

My friends,Today, as we celebrate the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., we are called to reflect on his profound commitment to civil rights, economic justice, and the dignity of all labor. Dr. King understood that the fight for racial equality and the struggle for workers’ rights are inseparable, two sides of the same coin in the pursuit of justice.
In his final days, Dr. King stood with the striking sanitation workers of Memphis, members of AFSCME Local 1733, declaring that _"all labor has dignity."_ He knew their fight for fair wages and safe working conditions was not just about work, it was about respect, humanity, and the soul of our nation.Years later, I was deeply honored to be part of inducting AFSCME Local 1733 into the Department of Labor Hall of Fame. It was a moment that underscored the enduring legacy of their courage and the profound connection between Dr. King’s vision and the labor movement. Standing there, I felt the weight of history and the responsibility we share to continue their fight for justice.

---
|

Dr. King reminded us that the labor movement is a force for transformation, a force that lifts families from poverty, builds stronger communities, and gives hope to generations. Today, we honor that legacy by recommitting ourselves to policies and actions that protect the right to organize, ensure fair wages, and secure dignity for every worker, in every corner of Virginia and beyond.
Let us honor Dr. King’s dream by fighting for a world where no one is left behind, where work is valued, and where the promise of equality and justice is fulfilled for all. His dream is not just a memory, it is a call to action.
With hope and determination,
Alex Bastani
Candidate for Lieutenant governor of Virginia

---

Happy Inauguration Day! Rob and Chelsea are in Washington to see our Commander in Chief take the Presidential Oath of Office today, and we could not be more excited. Rob had a busy week on the Hill and is happy to work with the Trump Administration to deliver results for the people of Northeastern Pennsylvania.
