Credit: PBS
**I 've divided my analysis into two parts.**
1. A high level summary of Trump's inaugural address.
2. A fact check and analysis of just some of the new executive orders he is signing today. Note, he is expected to sign more than 100 ‪executive orders, and in a later piece I will analyze those in detail. ‬

## 1\. Trump's Inauguration Rhetoric: A (False) Promise of Unity and Prosperity
In his inaugural address, Donald Trump painted a vision of national renewal, pledging to create a nation that is "proud, prosperous, and free." He framed his election victory as a mandate to undo "horrible betrayals" of the past and positioned himself as a leader uniquely tested "more than any President in history." (Lincoln, Kennedy, Garfield, & McKinley would like a word). Trump credited divine intervention, stating, "I was saved by God to make America great again." He promised to restore security for Americans of all "races, religions, and creeds," declaring January 20th as "liberation day."
Trump specifically thanked Black and Hispanic communities for their votes, committing to work with them. Meanwhile nominating only two Latinos and one Black person to his cabinet. On Martin Luther King Jr. Day, he vowed to honor King's legacy by striving to make his dream a reality. He then followed up that claim by promising a 'color blind' society. All without a single shred of self-awareness of his hypocrisy.
### **The Reality Behind Trump 's Words From His First Term**
Before diving into his EOs today, a quick reminder to not believe Trump's lies, but to instead look to his actions. Donald Trump's inaugural rhetoric may sound like a call for unity, but his record and actions tell a very different story. His first presidency was marked by division, disinformation, and policies that actively harmed marginalized communities. As a quick recap:
**Sowing Division:** During his first term, Trump made over 30,000 false or misleading claims, according to an analysis of his public remarks. These lies weren't harmless--they were a calculated strategy to sow distrust, inflame divisions, and solidify his base.
**Escalating Militarism:** Far from fostering peace, Trump's administration massively increased the U.S. military budget, funneling billions into defense contractors while neglecting investments in healthcare, education, and infrastructure.
**Racist Policies:** A snapshot reminder of Trump's racist policies include:
* He imposed a Muslim ban, targeting people based solely on their faith.
* He pursued harsh immigration policies, including separating children from their parents at the border.
* He consistently failed to condemn white supremacist violence, famously saying there were "very fine people on both sides" after the Charlottesville rally.
* He rolled back housing protections aimed at reducing racial discrimination and promoted policing policies that disproportionately harmed Black and Hispanic Americans.
* He successfully laid the groundwork to repeal affirmative action, while maintaining legacy admissions.

It's critical to recognize the gap between Trump's words and his actions. Trump's vision isn't about liberation or unity--it's about consolidating power and sowing division. His record makes that abundantly clear.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..VTHR9qrgQ3VA3WkT9FmmGkbRwvEYJCyrQOEE6GHOCnE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155264339)
## 2\. Fact Checking Trump's Planned Executive Orders During His Second Term
Trump's proposed executive orders reveal a roadmap for further division and likely violent conflict, both domestically and internationally. I do not say this lightly. His promises to "restore security" are veiled threats to double down on authoritarianism, surveillance, and militarization. His policies will not unite Americans--they will deepen the fractures. They will not bring world peace--they will create International chaos. Trump announced approximately a dozen policy changes apparently 'effective immediately.' In virtually every case, his EOs will do the exact opposite of what he verbally claims, and it is imperative we remain informed on his gaslighting.
**Trump 's Plan:** Declare a national emergency at our southern border. Enact mass deportations. Reinstate the remain in Mexico policy. End the practice of catch and release. Send troops to the southern border. Designate cartels as foreign terrorist organizations. Invoke the Alien Enemies Act of 1798 to eliminate the presence of all foreign gangs and criminal networks in the United States.
**Fact Check:** None of these actions will lead to peace. [As I just recently wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/abc23e03-dbbc-483f-9246-1222a2d58457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Trump's fixation on immigration at the southern border has defined his political existence, it is grounded in disinformation and racism, and it will not solve our immigration shortcomings. Also, notice how Trump never talks about undocumented immigration from Canada or Europe, even though studies show there are at least 600,000 undocumented immigrations from those regions of the world in the United States. It's another reminder that Trump doesn't mind immigration of people with the complexion for protection, but despises immigration from elsewhere.
Moreover, the Alien Enemies Act of 1798 was designed to allow the President to deport any male over the age of 14 who hailed from a foreign enemy nation. To arbitrarily label any nation Trump doesn't like as an "enemy nation" is potentially tantamount to declaring war on our allies. It is an absurd notion, and speaks to how Trump's rhetoric of being a peacemaker is completely at odds with his actions of declaring an enemy anyone he doesn't like.
**Trump 's Plan:** Direct all members of my cabinet to defeat record inflation and rapidly bring down costs and prices. Claims inflation was caused by overspending.
**Fact Check:** Trump offers no actual plan here. None. And in reality, we know inflation was global caused by the post-Covid economy. We also know that the United States did better than any nation on Earth in managing that inflation and bringing it down to its current level of a much more manageable 2.9%. Understand that Trump's statement about "overspending" is his excuse to eventually cut SNAP, TANF, Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security, to pay for his tax cuts for billionaires. Trump's plan will increase inflation and increase poverty in the United States.
**Trump 's Plan:** Declare national energy emergency and "drill baby drill" to bring down energy costs. Export American energy all over the world. End the Green New Deal and revoke the electric vehicle mandate.
**Fact Check:** The Green New Deal was never implemented in any meaningful way. Most MAGAs likely couldn't even tell you what it is, or what it proposes. Moreover, it isn't an actual law to be implemented, it is a policy strategy to transition away from fossil fuel energy and into renewable energy while creating high paying jobs. It is a deadly absurdity to demand more drilling, even as California literally burns in major part due to climate change caused by over reliance on fossil fuels. Finally, I wonder how Trump's owner, Elon Musk, feels about Trump ending the EV mandate?
I also found it revealing that Trump spoke about those who lost their homes in natural disasters, then adding, "even rich people, some of whom are here, lost their homes." He cannot help but blurt out how much more he cares for rich people, that "even they" lost their homes.
Trump's plan will further worsen our already out of control climate crisis, leading to more mass disaster and loss of life and property.
**Trump 's Plan:** Overhaul our trade system. Tariff and tax foreign countries to enrich our citizens. Establish the External Revenue Service ("ERS") to collect all tariffs and revenues from foreign sources.
**Fact Check:** For the umpteenth time, tariffs do not hurt foreign nations, they hurt American citizens, because they are paid by American consumers. Trump's tariffs will also hurt innovation and growth by preventing new businesses from starting up. MAGAs are about to find out the hard way that Trump's tariffs are going to devastate their businesses, particularly small businesses, and further exacerbate the historically high levels of wealth and income inequality we are already suffering.
Trump's plan will further gut our economy and further increase poverty.
**Trump 's Plan:** Establish a new Department of Government Efficiency.
**Fact Check:** It is particularly ironic given that in this speech, while screaming about smaller government, Trump announced the establishment of two new government agencies, the ERS and DOGE. Another reminder to not believe Trump's lies, but to look at his actions to the contrary. All this notwithstanding, it is deeply disturbing that this alleged DOGE department will be led by two billionaires with a history of exploiting working people, and in the case of Musk, at least 10 known allegations of sexual harassment against female employees.
**Trump 's Plan:** Sign an Executive Order to stop all government censorship and bring back free speech to America.
**Fact Check:** How such an EO would work is anyone's guess. But again, note the hypocrisy here. Just last month Trump forced ABC to settle for $15M on the ridiculous claim that they had disparaged him for pointing out that a civil judge adjudicated him as a rapist. Again, for him to claim he's anti-government censorship and pro-free speech, while using the full force of the law, and the presidency, to go after those who criticize him, exemplifies his hypocrisy.
**Trump 's Plan:** End the government policy of trying to socially engineer race and gender into every aspect of public and private life. Forge a society that is color blind and merit based. Make the official policy of USA that there are only two genders, male and female.
**Fact Check:** Trump will absolutely increase his violent tirade against LGBTQ Americans, normalizing discrimination and second-class citizenship. While he will scream about merit, he will not engage in any form of restitution or reparations for Black or Indigenous people who continue to be denied opportunities and access due to the legacy of Jim Crow and white supremacy in our systems. This policy of Trump is actually meant to prevent any meaningful accountability or change to policies that favor the wealthy and well connected.
**Trump 's Plan:** Reinstate any service members who were expelled due to rejecting covid vaccine, with full backpay. Stop all DEI in the military.
**Fact Check:** All the way back to President Washington, inoculation of soldiers was a requirement to serve in the armed forces. Once again, for as much as Trump talks about 'making America great,' he tramples on the actual things that made America a better nation -- like eradicating disease. Likewise, Trump's attacks on DEI is another reminder that he is a fragile and frightened man who does not want change that impacts his privilege. It reminds me of that old saying -- "When you've had privilege your whole life, equality feels like oppression."
**Trump 's Plan:** End all wars and prevent future wars. Build a legacy of a peacemaker and a unifier. Change the name of Gulf of Mexico to Gulf of America. "Take back" the Panama canal. Pursue our "manifest destiny" and reach Mars.
**Fact Check:** You've noticed the theme by now. Trump says one thing, then promises actions to the contrary. There is nothing peaceful about unilaterally changing the name of a major geographic location that has held that name for nearly four centuries, even before the United States existed. There is nothing peaceful about "taking back" the Panama Canal. This canal is one of the most important shipping passages in the world. Trump shockingly invoked Chinese influence--a direct shot a a global nuclear power--followed by a declaration that the United States would "take back" the Panama Canal. Threatening invasion of a sovereign foreign nation is not a call for peace of unity--it is a call for war.
And rounding out his violent intent, Trump invoked continued "Manifest Destiny." Again, understand that Manifest Destiny was the 19th century white supremacist slogan that claimed God ordained the United States to conquer Indigenous people and enslave Africans. It is a frightening and violent slogan that calls to more imperialism and colonialism--and Trump closed his 2025 inauguration address with this same violent declaration. This is who he is, and has always been.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..VTHR9qrgQ3VA3WkT9FmmGkbRwvEYJCyrQOEE6GHOCnE?&gift=true)
## Conclusion
It is worth noting that Trump also briefly mentioned the Middle East, while ignoring that Netanyahu has announced that Trump will continue to send him weapons despite the charges of war crimes and genocide against him. Again, words of alleged peace, actions of violent war.
In 2017 we saw a man who did not expect to win the presidency, win. The carnage he caused in four short years included mass death during COVID, a further expansion of wealth and income inequality to record high levels, the repeal of Roe v Wade, the repeal of affirmative action, gutting of climate justice initiatives, gutting of voting rights, breaking international alliances, mass bombings and drone strikes in Afghanistan and Syria, mass deportations and family separations, the Muslim ban, and of course the violent insurrection--and this is still a woefully incomplete list of the harm Trump caused the United States and the world.
In 2025, Trump is much better prepared to inflict his harm with the fascist Project 2025, a host of billionaires ready to beckon at his every call, and a complicit and complacent corporate media often owned by those same billionaires (Washington Post - Bezos, Twitter - Musk, Facebook - Zuckerburg, WSJ - Murdoch, for example).
So my closing message is this: the future may look bleak, yes, but I ask each of you to reflect and embrace the words of James Baldwin in these trying times, when he said:
> I never have been in despair about the world. I've been enraged by it. I don't think I'm in despair. I can't afford despair. I can't tell my nephew, my niece. You can't tell the children there's no hope.
Let us maintain hope in each other, in our Republic, and in the promise that we can form a more perfect Union by upholding justice above all else. My commitment over these next four years and beyond will be to continue to advocate for absolute justice in my writing and actions, sharing factual and honest analysis of the human rights issues that impact us all. I cannot do this alone, and am grateful for your support. Whether you can subscribe for free, or for a cup of coffee a month ($6), your support goes a long way towards helping build this movement for justice.
We have a tough road ahead, but we are not hopeless, and we will not give up our voice. Let's get to work.
**I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement.**

name: George Whitesides
subject: The fight ahead.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2025?refcode=em-header]
Peter,

With Donald Trump set to begin his second term, I'm reflecting back on all the years since he was first sworn in nearly a decade ago.

For many of us, it was Trump's first win that pushed us into public service to begin with, and staring down another four years can feel overwhelming and exhausting.

But what I remember most about Trump's first win was the incredible unity that was felt across the country in response. I’ll never forget the way hundreds of thousands of Americans took a stand to let the incoming administration know we were not going to stand by while they attacked our fundamental rights, access to health care, the environment and more.

We have a tall task ahead of us in fighting back against whatever harms this administration brings. So let's remember why we stepped into activism and public service in the first place – to protect what we believe in and fight for the values that make our country strong.

If you're ready to send a message of resolve and recommit to standing up for our shared values, please chip in $3 to my campaign today.

Thank you,

George

clean_body: [] Peter, With Donald Trump set to begin his second term, I'm reflecting back on all the years since he was first sworn in nearly a decade ago. For many of us, it was Trump's first win that pushed us into public service to begin with, and staring down another four years can feel overwhelming and exhausting. But what I remember most about Trump's first win was the incredible unity that was felt across the country in response. I’ll never forget the way hundreds of thousands of Americans took a stand to let the incoming administration know we were not going to stand by while they attacked our fundamental rights, access to health care, the environment and more. We have a tall task ahead of us in fighting back against whatever harms this administration brings. So let's remember why we stepped into activism and public service in the first place – to protect what we believe in and fight for the values that make our country strong. If you're ready to send a message of resolve and recommit to standing up for our shared values, please chip in $3 to my campaign today. Thank you, George Donate >> ? [?] ? [?] ? name: Keith
subject: Over 100 executive orders
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter, I have an urgent request:

Could you rush a donation to support my team right now?

Donald Trump was inaugurated as President a few hours ago, and his administration plans to waste no time enacting their dangerous agenda.

Trump and his allies are preparing a massive wave of over 100 executive orders. These actions will bypass Congress, putting Minnesotans’ rights and well-being at risk. As part of their “shock and awe” campaign, the Trump administration plans to issue orders to:

- Weaken protections under the Affordable Care Act that provide health care coverage to millions of Americans
- Expand detention facilities, laying the foundation for mass deportations
- Roll back actions to stop the climate crisis and protect our environment

And this is just the beginning.

Let me be 100% clear: I didn’t run for office so I could sue President Trump. But I’ve done it before, and I’ll do it again if he violates the law and interferes with your ability to afford your life and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

We’re laying the groundwork to fight back if the freedoms and civil rights of Minnesotans come under attack. But I need your help, Peter.

Remember: You’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program which reset on January 1. You can donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Will you make your fully refundable $75 contribution right now so we can continue working together to defend Minnesotans’ rights under the Trump administration?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250120ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250120ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]

CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250120ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250120ke?refcode=other]

Every contribution, no matter the size, will be a big help in the fight ahead.

Keith Ellison

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250120ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

Team USA Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC) American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC) PO Box 1682 Bellevue, WA 98009-1682 Since 1980, AmeriPAC has helped fund and elect a large number of conservative, freedom-oriented candidates to public office. We’ve played a huge role in several presidential cycles. We directed much of our time and funds from generous patriots like you to oppose radical Leftist candidates, including Bill Clinton, Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama, and Kamala Harris. At AmeriPAC, we want to personally restore our country for freedom-loving patriots like you. |

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c0122ff760a4bbf8f626bd56e42bdc7&_e=EsHzUTsnH03APPQnuew1CP0N1PYln0GRiJ7o1i5eglf7UWYwss6Ptm2QH0hMfKWpJRu0-q3ys-zKtXc7k32GFm4RrTicyJicGRLe0x5BHB1Cxk2oyRu8vIj8tIux4bzME-Ps4mCpidSHlMq6OhM2-fhXqVkk_PLJOdgRAT9xSq6BkEHaJQVu8kHWM82hP32f4DfJI99UXtRqqz_tStiDCZJkdXWZ4iFhs-t8ucnaF6io4mcDLIx2dkS9pLHWYiZuNSLj6cJW0Gjj-sg-iYmqRPpAiCJCKR56_hrgC5PuE28tH_S6t3Sb035nNt4z_0RWKy9RolbzfbO_o9NBaclsWHiFbar8NBJ4RI7u7Dg1OPuR3C3GYlzfqCDISeL941Yko1HlPBr7MyeFUqZzgZ3zQMeUwfYL1VtYfZPmr1lFen0%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c0122ff760a4bbf8f626bd56e42bdc7&_e=EsHzUTsnH03APPQnuew1CP0N1PYln0GRiJ7o1i5eglf7UWYwss6Ptm2QH0hMfKWpJRu0-q3ys-zKtXc7k32GFm4RrTicyJicGRLe0x5BHB1Cxk2oyRu8vIj8tIux4bzME-Ps4mCpidSHlMq6OhM2-fhXqVkk_PLJOdgRAT9xSq6BkEHaJQVu8kHWM82hP32f4DfJI99UXtRqqz_tStiDCZJkdXWZ4iFhs-t8ucnaF6io4mcDLIx2dkS9pLHWYiZuhtdSef5z34GQrHE0Bzwd2v5a9yvEW9t2uKWFAc1oEgsNE0MguNTeAtOx0AinRjqomDSWjOQKo0WoTN495ite2wa4Z5FmNwvdkZZbZ6WKPpsSvZAanSqL17eqqjJ3Je-zX7Vu9Jo5fPcad-CpZf761Tn17URrOesjRQjUDSmze8w%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c0122ff760a4bbf8f626bd56e42bdc7&_e=EsHzUTsnH03APPQnuew1CP0N1PYln0GRiJ7o1i5eglf7UWYwss6Ptm2QH0hMfKWpJRu0-q3ys-zKtXc7k32GFm4RrTicyJicGRLe0x5BHB1Cxk2oyRu8vIj8tIux4bzME-Ps4mCpidSHlMq6OhM2-fhXqVkk_PLJOdgRAT9xSq6BkEHaJQVu8kHWM82hP32f4DfJI99UXtRqqz_tStiDCZJkdXWZ4iFhs-t8ucnaF6io4mcDLIx2dkS9pLHWYiZugwjyTLfjJMm20di0nLr0OsZ6oGYn_aDADj18V33w7AiG7Mbs_1pvKq2vl6_TisAz6KLckZylCdhKTchGB6N_cdXEuYRVzx9IenSVBLsJbGWU15vPrhie84gN51olJ5_Tx204c-P8P6eF-fMEYXqD2yRaXme-j8gJKPtNKUE3E70%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c0122ff760a4bbf8f626bd56e42bdc7&_e=EsHzUTsnH03APPQnuew1CP0N1PYln0GRiJ7o1i5eglf7UWYwss6Ptm2QH0hMfKWpJRu0-q3ys-zKtXc7k32GFm4RrTicyJicGRLe0x5BHB1Cxk2oyRu8vIj8tIux4bzME-Ps4mCpidSHlMq6OhM2-fhXqVkk_PLJOdgRAT9xSq6BkEHaJQVu8kHWM82hP32f4DfJI99UXtRqqz_tStiDCZJkdXWZ4iFhs-t8ucnaF6io4mcDLIx2dkS9pLHWYiZuhaBKwWEdaVZIfzuw0FOjlC0J_zcnjnz5hUaW8hVkh4AVcmgdyDqiAQEaNFU2evrcwqCGHMbdvHIsQ4jt_AOkBfQITJ8i-Inxvya-bkojyqZiKP8n7-W0jQphEP418I7NDKvNHvB5mJeRzMZEdZjo5t4oX8vbQQ7CynCX15Ad83g%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Freedom Nation Today
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=1c0122ff760a4bbf8f626bd56e42bdc7&_t=fsI2RIqsp6t55CCX9Zsl_W58GL9yurIPliAdtsNBRu4FFtVCy54wNa6dhyHEkPFISuac-M0dmlimg7uBdQE4XKadkglnlEPy2AMg5hAMUT8HjEDV_OaRQVDyEIZduzF76f6oZF-pkomK-yI0xezNgnRbCUxzVfFNAJFiswh66Ks%3D)

body:
Help us show our excitement – sign our congratulations card!

| |

| | | **CONFIRMED: The Oath of Office has just been taken and Donald J. Trump is now our 47th President of the United States!**

We can't think of a better way to celebrate this milestone than to send our President a congratulatory card from his top supporters! _**[Will you take a minute out of your day to sign it?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=66fb7825c29e426886a1e0bfe2c15bbc&_e=g3lbJzCVuIxs6NtONOI0wnd0EJ5cLS3c9hyMIchgBj2yTPSVX67xXJ_4F6duyL4JzOnZpfQekmbEW-Np2E6ngMyD_Q_JGc_DYpxCncI_E7jqLxzxhSib1M5t7Qq9R3MF--07saky8cIvbWsYCj9ACYHnWkvbIJ8csfX0J3gjyjIW5m90gP5cxL5n94XDxJsFkERwFdZvvsl9kaF_buPv3fdzf1ki9OdZU2VpTtiV0BvDUILiKFgLEeBINKjHPHgrKLHXiAkHOe2Ybkx94CBqgRJAd4DailDTSeBQiBbBfV1Qe-7rFuf1XIg1eBBnmWfy2PaoSfIoBJhHsdW5kQOERHyM7dWlimRE5g6Hiy8gezS_r0Swt0LV9mzmODiwWvwU2dNfnUbRqwCC2lAqvvh4RVpjDEtUODtM_mv1LohqQ0D3RU0guKrDu_ifbtGtvt9AviutGDKeNj-56oLp6BOcMg%3D%3D "Will you take a minute out of your day to sign it?")**_ | | [SIGN OUR CARD](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=66fb7825c29e426886a1e0bfe2c15bbc&_e=g3lbJzCVuIxs6NtONOI0wnd0EJ5cLS3c9hyMIchgBj2yTPSVX67xXJ_4F6duyL4JzOnZpfQekmbEW-Np2E6ngMyD_Q_JGc_DYpxCncI_E7jqLxzxhSib1M5t7Qq9R3MF--07saky8cIvbWsYCj9ACYHnWkvbIJ8csfX0J3gjyjIW5m90gP5cxL5n94XDxJsFkERwFdZvvsl9kaF_buPv3fdzf1ki9OdZU2VpTtiV0BvDUILiKFgLEeBINKjHPHgrKLHXiAkHOe2Ybkx94CBqgRJAd4DailDTSeBQiBbBfV1Qe-7rFuf1XIg1eBBnmWfyL_7ybY1ZCDA1X_fwm5a1G_0jiusCisaRBAnZ5NLP2PV6uyM1tmvLc_o0pvsZEMSLbgLcf1IPOEYozbil-MV2F7NiO9Aja-CeQFMGNX0UR_-YW5hIZKXb6k2bpKwWx4TfIX9EWAiBsF06djrwqaDt0Q%3D%3D "SIGN OUR CARD")

TO: President Donald J. Trump
FROM: MAGA Patriots
SUBJECT: Congratulations, Mr. President!
* * *

The moment we have all been waiting for is here - you are OFFICIALLY our 47th President!

**We could not be more excited.**

Our nation's future is suddenly much brighter and my hope has been restored. I have had faith in you since day one and I trust that you will put the American people first in everything you do.

_You have my full support, President Trump! _

I am ready to fight alongside you and be there for you when you call on me for help.

It's truly an honor, Mr. President.

_MAGA!_

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Warrior Money Episode 10: General Wesley Clark
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Warrior Money Episode 10
Warrior Money , hosted on Yahoo Finance by Patrick Murphy and Dan Kunze - A show that supports and offers financial advice to the veteran community.
Peter,
This week on Warrior Money , we interview General Wesley Clark. General Clark is a distinguished graduate of West Point, a Rhodes Scholar, former Presidential candidate, and entrepreneur who runs his own consulting firm and chairs a boutique investment bank. General Clark is a true American hero who has an exceptional record of service that cultivated in receiving the Presidential Medal of Freedom.
During our conversation, General Clark shares lessoned he learned in the military, politics, and the private sector - highlighting the skills and values that helped him succeed across domains with integrity and excellence.
If you are a veteran, current member of our armed forces, or looking to lead in your organization with character and efficiency - General Clark's words are for you. Find the episode below.
Spotify: HERE [https://open.spotify.com/show/1ss9lXm3E8HxkZ4xgaqZ58?si=aca5c5afcb5d4b58]
YouTube: HERE [https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLx28zU8ctIRq4s21MFggvp9vDtChW2cM4&si=ebgQsbMI2qSU-UB4]
Apple Podcasts: HERE [https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/warrior-money/id1779749359]
Thank you,
Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Undersecretary of the Army
Former Congressman

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Progress is not guaranteed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://jenaforcolorado.com [https://jenaforcolorado.com]
Peter –Today, as we celebrate the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., we are reminded of his unwavering commitment to justice, equality, and the power of collective action. Dr. King taught us that progress is not inevitable—it results from courage, resilience, and the relentless pursuit of what is right.Dr. King’s vision challenges us to dismantle systems of inequality, confront racial and economic injustice, and build a society where all people have the opportunity to thrive. His words echo in our hearts as we expand voting rights, ensure access to quality education, and guarantee fair treatment under the law for everyone, regardless of race, gender, or background.Earlier today, I joined the annual Denver Marade march to celebrate Dr. King’s legacy. Together, we will reaffirm our commitment to the progressive principles he championed—equity, compassion, and the belief that diversity makes us stronger.I invite you to join us as we carry forward Dr. King’s dream, turning his vision into action. Whether by marching, volunteering, or having meaningful conversations with those around us, we all have a role in building the beloved community Dr. King envisioned.Let us honor his legacy by recommitting ourselves to the fight for justice and the promise of a brighter future for all.All the best,Jena GriswoldFollow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.

name: Patty Murray
subject: the one thing I need you to do today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Donald Trump was just sworn in for his second term.

I know I don’t have to tell you how dangerous and horrific these next four years could be, so I’ll keep this brief.

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in $5 to help me hold the incoming Trump administration accountable and fight back against the worst of their promises. But if you’re ready to meet this moment and do your part, you can use this button to donate now:

Contribute: https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pm-email-2025-q1

When it comes to standing up for reproductive rights and fighting back against Republicans’ nationwide abortion ban, I’ll be first in line.

When it comes to speaking out against Trump’s unqualified cabinet picks like RFK Jr., I’ll be first in line.

When it comes to fighting back against Trump’s attempts to give his billionaire friends handouts while forcing the middle class to foot the bill, I’ll be first in line.

I’ve spent my career fighting for working families in Washington state and across this country, and I’m not going to stop now.

But to keep up this fight, I need you with me. If everyone chipped in $5 now, I’d hit my $20,000 goal in no time. But I know not everyone will, so I’m asking: Will you chip in $5 now to help me suit up for the fights ahead?

Contribute: https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pm-email-2025-q1

Together,

Patty Murray

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
On this inauguration day, let’s send a powerful message: we are ready, resilient, and determined to build a better future.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100702910/523607043/-1316299240?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-01-20_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4NmFmMDQ1LTY5ZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2UzyUlz0RMNTD2W4axUpRvOD8msDFsi5VV6LiOE83Vk=)
---
| Peter,

Today marks Donald Trump’s second presidential inauguration. While this is not the outcome we worked for, it is one we are ready to fight against.

Peter, this is a time for action. The rise of MAGA extremism challenges us, but it also unites us to protect our communities and build the inclusive, equitable future we envision.

At Emerge, we see that future coming to life every day. More than 1,200 dynamic, fearless Emerge women are serving in Congress, statehouses, and local governments. They’re standing strong on the frontlines, protecting freedoms and improving lives in their communities. Last year alone, over 400 Emerge candidates won their races, bringing new energy and vision to public office.

This is what hope in action looks like. These wins are possible because of supporters like you. And while MAGA Republicans are working to enforce their agenda, we’re growing the ranks of courageous leaders ready to meet them head-on. Together, we’re ensuring that no level of government—local, state, or national—is overlooked. With more than 520,000 elected offices across the country, there’s incredible potential for transformative change, and we’re tapping into it.

**On this inauguration day, let’s send a powerful message: we are ready, resilient, and determined to build a better future.

[_Your support is critical to expanding our programs, training more women to lead, and achieving even more Democratic victories in 2025 and beyond. Will you join us by chipping in today to fuel this momentum?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100702911/523607044/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-01-20_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4NmFmMDQ1LTY5ZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2UzyUlz0RMNTD2W4axUpRvOD8msDFsi5VV6LiOE83Vk=)**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100702912/523607045/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-01-20_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4NmFmMDQ1LTY5ZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2UzyUlz0RMNTD2W4axUpRvOD8msDFsi5VV6LiOE83Vk=)
---
Let’s rise together. With determination and hope, we will meet this moment and create a future that reflects the values we hold dear.

In solidarity,
A’shanti F. Gholar
President, Emerge

* * *
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100702913/523607046/-1316299240?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-01-20_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4NmFmMDQ1LTY5ZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2UzyUlz0RMNTD2W4axUpRvOD8msDFsi5VV6LiOE83Vk=)

name: Wes Moore
subject: Today, we honor Dr. King’s legacy
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100703483/523608648/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjBhZTAzYS02YmQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Po7wh6zd0ZkrgDgGn3LM89S9sXtGp7HvWK1rXiOVFE=&emci=4f311c9d-66d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=760ae03a-6bd7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=24635485)
Friend, _“Life’s most persistent and urgent question is what are you doing for others”_ We honor Dr. King’s legacy through our persistent fight for what is right and an unwavering heart and spirit in service of our nation’s most vulnerable. When we reflect on Dr. Martin Luther King’s legacy, it’s not because we are looking backward. We reflect on Dr. King’s legacy because the principles he stood for can help us light the path to a brighter future. Today is a reminder of the work that needs to be done to make good on Dr. King's dream by making it within reach for our families and communities, our most vulnerable and most neglected. We must address the longstanding systems that hold people back and work together to create generational change to make sure every Marylander has the opportunity to succeed. As we reflect on Dr. King’s work today, remember his message that doing what is commendable is not enough. Removing the barriers to justice is our life’s work. Not just today, but every day. Elevate, Wes

clean_body: Friend, “Life’s most persistent and urgent question is what are you doing for others” We honor Dr. King’s legacy through our persistent fight for what is right and an unwavering heart and spirit in service of our nation’s most vulnerable. When we reflect on Dr. Martin Luther King’s legacy, it’s not because we are looking backward. We reflect on Dr. King’s legacy because the principles he stood for can help us light the path to a brighter future. Today is a reminder of the work that needs to be done to make good on Dr. King's dream by making it within reach for our families and communities, our most vulnerable and most neglected. We must address the longstanding systems that hold people back and work together to create generational change to make sure every Marylander has the opportunity to succeed. As we reflect on Dr. King’s work today, remember his message that doing what is commendable is not enough. Removing the barriers to justice is our life’s work. Not just today, but every day. Elevate, Wes

name: Tina Smith
subject: Onwards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team — Donald Trump was sworn into his second term in office today. We’ve been through the challenges that come with a Trump Administration before — and although the challenges were many, there were also bright spots. We saw palpable grassroots energy around Democratic candidates and progressive causes. People who used to sit on the sidelines of our political world got involved — running for office, volunteering on campaigns, making their voices heard. The road ahead will not be easy, and like so many of you, the uncertainty of Trump’s second term is frightening. A lot of people stand to lose rights and freedoms they hold dear. In moments like this, all we can do is move forward. We’ve faced challenges before and persevered. So onward we go, to defend the values we stand for. My pledge to you, is to keep up the fight for our rights. To work with anyone willing to make a difference for hardworking people. To pass legislation to lower costs, expand affordable housing access, protect Social Security, and more. And as the Late Sen. Paul Wellstone said, **“We all do better when we all do better.”** So let us use this moment as an opportunity to all do better, together. Onwards,
Tina P.S. One fight I’m ready to take on? The battle to retake the Democratic Senate Majority — [**and our work to flip the Senate starts now. This seat will be on the ballot in 2026, along with Georgia, New Hampshire, and Michigan. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: How I’m spending Inauguration Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I am spending the day right here at home, with my constituents, serving food to the hungry.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250120-4686-footer&t=1&akid=4686%2E420207%2Ep7sFnP)
Peter,
Today, as we celebrate the life and legacy of the great Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., I know all of us are also deeply worried about what the next four years will bring with Donald Trump back in the White House.
**I won’t be in Washington, D.C. today for Trump’s inauguration.** Instead, I am spending the day right here at home, with my constituents, serving food to the hungry — honoring the work, life, legacy, and lessons of Dr. King.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/join-our-fight-inauguration-day-20250120?source=em20250120-4686&akid=4686%2E420207%2Ep7sFnP)
Dr. King committed his life to the fight for racial and economic justice. And over the next four years, we’re going to have our work cut out for us to defend the progress he helped to make and to keep up the fight.
It’s crucial that we don’t become complacent or intimidated into silence. Trump and his MAGA allies have threatened our democracy and some of our most fundamental rights, and as of today they’re now in a position to start acting on those threats.
As a Member of Congress, I’ll work each and every day to defend our rights and make life better for working families in Seattle and throughout this country. But I can’t do it alone.
**Just like last time, it’s going to take a mass nationwide movement to successfully push back against the kind of MAGA extremism that Trump and the Republicans are pushing.[Peter, will you add your name to make it clear you’re with us in this fight?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/join-our-fight-inauguration-day-20250120?source=em20250120-4686&akid=4686%2E420207%2Ep7sFnP)**
**[Add Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/join-our-fight-inauguration-day-20250120?source=em20250120-4686&akid=4686%2E420207%2Ep7sFnP)**
Before I sign off, I want to leave you with this. The night before he was assassinated, Dr. King noted to a crowd of striking workers that _“The world is all messed up. Trouble is in the land. Confusion all around. But I know, somehow, that only when it is dark enough, can you see the stars.”_
He was right then. He is right now. We will make it through this together.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250120-4686-footer&t=2&refcode2=4686_420207_p7sFnP&akid=4686%2E420207%2Ep7sFnP)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: Martin Luther King Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
Today, we honor the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. — a man who dedicated his life to the fight for equality, justice, and the liberation of all people. Dr. King’s dream of a nation free from the chains of bigotry, poverty, and systemic oppression remains a guiding light for our work.
Yet today, as we reflect on Dr. King's extraordinary vision, we also grapple with an event that starkly contrasts his ideals: the inauguration of Donald Trump. His presidency represents an agenda that tears at the very fabric of everything Dr. King stood for — justice, compassion, and equity. We’ve witnessed four years of attacks on marginalized communities, from rolling back civil rights protections to emboldening hate groups.
But let me be clear: this only strengthens our resolve.
Dr. King reminded us that:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_012025_MLKDay [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_012025_MLKDay]
It doesn’t bend on its own; it takes all of us — our collective voices, our shared determination, and our unwavering commitment to justice — to push it forward.
So, today, as we reflect on Dr. King’s dream and face the reality of our current political moment, I’m asking you to recommit to the fight. Whether it’s through grassroots organizing, volunteering, or making your voice heard at the ballot box, we need your energy and determination now more than ever.
Let’s turn this moment of reflection into a call to action. Together, we will continue the fight for the beloved community Dr. King envisioned — a community rooted in love, justice, and equality for all.
Thank you,
Lateefah
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_012025_MLKDay [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_012025_MLKDay] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit LateefahSimon.com [http://lateefahsimon.com/]

subject: 6 foods PROVEN to eliminate inflammation
body:
Please read the following message.
* * *

| | Turmeric is probably the most well-known food PROVEN to fight inflammation and joint pain.

However, when you [combine turmeric with these 5 foods](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueahuIteknop5I3ITm65sst6l&s=KJDIAKJPNAJBAHOC) they form a private squad of firefighters in your body that help control the raging flame of inflammation and joint pain.

Not only will the joint pain in your knees, back and hips become a thing of the past but you'll regain mobility that you haven't seen in years.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF MICHAEL HENRY
body:
Not only is he declining a presidential salary...

Friend,
---
President Trump decided to TURN DOWN his $400,000 annual salary as President of the United States.
---
Most Americans see this as an honorable sacrifice and as an act of good faith to put our _country_ FIRST.
---
_But the same cannot be said of New York’s Attorney General, Tish James, who is continuing to wage legal warfare against President Trump and put politics before our country._
---
**On top of foregoing his salary, President Trump will ALSO incur a _DAILY_ FINE of $112,000 at the hands of Attorney General Tish James.**
---
In other words, it will cost President Trump $112,000 per day to serve as President – all because Tish James has weaponized the Office of Attorney General.
---
**That’s why I’m running to FIRE Tish James and lead as an Attorney General whose sole mission is to uphold the law.**
---
_But with President Trump now sworn in, we cannot wait until my own inauguration as Attorney General. We have to fight back against this lawfare right now._
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop Hollywood from reaching into your living room
body:
Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=919b3a5d96554876a9f76a3b27b62aa3&_e=MPQuDkZB4N-iuyPy5XFG_gr6avGjWqV7OL4rZm0ACsOv6n2-WcVXgNR2wGq7cUSJ5W44byY_pZWR0pp5tK8e4AOY0aFShLvZp1lNUZIB8GpRLDHldTsY6-hGhBR82SS33TBC0WUUmY5RtJyc7IDaWcdC2U8YpX2Eo_U_kYIzJy0vUpoCMMFd4J4qEg71zeZYfSyl1QCEe8mmtp7XHRsGHkaadVUjba1sV35N3asSLu2jJ_xTztcF6MRe_S4Z1yVkPMBVI1VqiVR0QpnSsJfDURJDq5Ndmo3ldvsIYNu7ss5TTbFZjwOc7bSUPZt5dvx7ANezekdylpDkjvPsNHxF3VJlXvMxBFsOBLMrPM1jt4wpXB8AqnF97rnq9VRqW5uu648hRgU0HCr-OIDJzUqMIA%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=919b3a5d96554876a9f76a3b27b62aa3&_e=MPQuDkZB4N-iuyPy5XFG_gr6avGjWqV7OL4rZm0ACsOv6n2-WcVXgNR2wGq7cUSJ5W44byY_pZWR0pp5tK8e4AOY0aFShLvZp1lNUZIB8GpRLDHldTsY6-hGhBR82SS33TBC0WUUmY5RtJyc7IDaWcdC2U8YpX2Eo_U_kYIzJy0vUpoCMMFd4J4qEg71zeZYfSyl1QCEe8mmtp7XHRsGHkaadVUjba1sV35N3asSLu3OYnxplfuO4Bt3VXqdFv6ofU_jJysY44vNfWDYmHww7qZo2V9dPRDm2eOuGr991qMBf3-MdPIr4rVkGr8BlIW8G4EsTgm2RJzHunLOaZV2Nw-Enpge3gyRyBiggzeq7HYnxtIp7C68UdRj_BkfN_A6gamqig6HalAxqgsbIHw2IQ%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=919b3a5d96554876a9f76a3b27b62aa3&_e=MPQuDkZB4N-iuyPy5XFG_gr6avGjWqV7OL4rZm0ACsOv6n2-WcVXgNR2wGq7cUSJ5W44byY_pZWR0pp5tK8e4AOY0aFShLvZp1lNUZIB8GpRLDHldTsY6-hGhBR82SS33TBC0WUUmY5RtJyc7IDaWcdC2U8YpX2Eo_U_kYIzJy0vUpoCMMFd4J4qEg71zeZYfSyl1QCEe8mmtp7XHRsGHkaadVUjba1sV35N3asSLu2XE7BDdD5tdyFVqgdQKdJGWmtM_r0CiR3T7_GmwNq30K0Yhr6L4pEoq3p0ntrMC0n1R9NWrLhK2Khp-hQdagcUanrHX17LPuktKVHIVozkRNP6momcC5BSe9bwLIUgIiM0jVyi4Ba--bgxqiaDbpkHyz2I21xjUuHP328h7T14eQ%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=919b3a5d96554876a9f76a3b27b62aa3&_e=MPQuDkZB4N-iuyPy5XFG_gr6avGjWqV7OL4rZm0ACsOv6n2-WcVXgNR2wGq7cUSJ5W44byY_pZWR0pp5tK8e4AOY0aFShLvZp1lNUZIB8GpRLDHldTsY6-hGhBR82SS33TBC0WUUmY5RtJyc7IDaWcdC2U8YpX2Eo_U_kYIzJy0vUpoCMMFd4J4qEg71zeZYfSyl1QCEe8mmtp7XHRsGHkaadVUjba1sV35N3asSLu0jKLuat5qmK8MIgiFMigxTPGEsL9JFnK4a-7kP9r1QafhrXFZfCj2np4gkAHk-A0_4X7ZJwWdkBlfcJFP3reWcxKGM363w0EA4ooNmfzxJU9UiNFM88FS6LzWT9yMvcRQgV8haCagStmGEZs6-QvBPt7fxiptOxpvTv9pvj7_J3Q%3D%3D)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=919b3a5d96554876a9f76a3b27b62aa3&_e=MPQuDkZB4N-iuyPy5XFG_gr6avGjWqV7OL4rZm0ACsOv6n2-WcVXgNR2wGq7cUSJ5W44byY_pZWR0pp5tK8e4AOY0aFShLvZp1lNUZIB8GpRLDHldTsY6-hGhBR82SS33TBC0WUUmY5RtJyc7IDaWcdC2U8YpX2Eo_U_kYIzJy0vUpoCMMFd4J4qEg71zeZYfSyl1QCEe8mmtp7XHRsGHkaadVUjba1sV35N3asSLu2oIVxzSLg9KlnKHsRKPfvTg_ocSbYERKLxlT7YXYndeNGnNsYsyoPGZLdy1XlRTznqX90o1j0XutJipNjSlj6neZD0NJG9yEkA0HmLyUnRqhh8vrZgCcBS4YbzqmizyvDerwk4nO4bYPSuPq2pZsJG_Q4AGXfdBuj_7z6gDGhYaw%3D%3D)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=919b3a5d96554876a9f76a3b27b62aa3&_e=MPQuDkZB4N-iuyPy5XFG_gr6avGjWqV7OL4rZm0ACsOv6n2-WcVXgNR2wGq7cUSJ5W44byY_pZWR0pp5tK8e4AOY0aFShLvZp1lNUZIB8GpRLDHldTsY6-hGhBR82SS33TBC0WUUmY5RtJyc7IDaWcdC2U8YpX2Eo_U_kYIzJy0vUpoCMMFd4J4qEg71zeZYfSyl1QCEe8mmtp7XHRsGHkaadVUjba1sV35N3asSLu0JFAUqAwTQjROFR11dYx2Z7pHyuBVRf3JI80ik_RFN_tIJLW5jSH0y3z5qxVWHEuXHu7WWZNGeeWnKCErqR-O_5mva-udzNJ28Q0YdxQ3ZpOZX2n-Po1zNlP3PVcVLK6Xz-K7XuMMk_Sp35_SmCYmqALTdhSZ81mIRRpub61PTtg%3D%3D)

**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: A day to honor Dr. King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter,

Today, we honor Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. Dr. King’s call for a just world has resonated through the generations, and today represents an opportunity to reflect on how we can continue his fight to dismantle the intertwined evils of racism and systemic poverty.

Dr. King organized communities throughout the nation in a broad social movement aimed at specific policy changes. Their movement built the necessary momentum to pass the Civil Rights Act and the Voting Rights Act, ensuring for the first time that equal rights would be extended to all Americans regardless of skin color. The struggle for policies that strike at the heart of enduring systemic injustice continue: far-right courts have hollowed out much of the 1965 Voting Rights Act, and Congress has an obligation to respond by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.

We can truly honor Dr. King’s legacy by doing good work in our communities, rejecting white nationalism and racism in all forms, and considering how we can collectively exercise our political power in service of a more perfect union.

Be well,

Dr. Ami Bera
---

# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER

| Dear Hello What an exciting day for freedom loving Americans, the swearing in of President Donald J Trump and Vice President JD Vance. This was a long awaited victory by weary patriots who love our country and want to see our country win again after years of oppression and persecution for simply wanting to live in a world that made sense.
We thought this day would never come. A stolen election in 2020, numerous fake scandals, J6, unrelenting persecution politically, personally and financially, not just to President Trump, but to those of us who supported him, including yours truly.
Peace and prosperity are on the horizon. Our President didn't waste any time in signing over 200 executive orders to reverse some of the insanity. In fact, as I write, President Trump is talking to the press casually in the Oval Office, signing more executive orders.
We will sleep much better tonight knowing that our borders will be secured and Biden and his criminal organization are out of office.
Now we need to turn our eyes to Virginia, where Democrats still control the legislature and Governor Glenn Youngkin will be the "red wall" that stops these insane bills being passed out of both the House and the Senate.
I've included a list of all of the bills coming up in committee and subcommittee for your review. Remember, until crossover, I'm only focusing on Senate bills. Then we will focus on House bills that actually passed the House.

While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you.
Any contribution is greatly appreciated to offset the cost of providing it. Thank you in advance.
We must now save Virginia. Let's do this.

Ecclesiastes 3:1-8 tells us _" For everything there is a season, and a time for every purpose under heaven..."_
Today marks the beginning of a new season in America. We all know there is a tremendous amount of work to be done. Now is the season in which to do it.
May God continue to bless and keep our beloved country. And, through the works of our hands and the words of our mouths, may everything we do be to our good and His Glory.
Celebrate today! You never quit. You kept the faith. Now, a new season, a new journey, is just beginning. Let’s goooooo!
Ever onward -

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Inauguration Day: a rallying cry
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
This morning the flag over the White House flew at half-mast.
It was meant to honor President Carter, but we can’t ignore the symbolism it represented for so many of us. Today felt like a mourning shroud for democracy.
Talking about symbolism, I found it interesting that Trump didn’t place his left hand on the Bibles Melania held for him.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250120_inauguration_image [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250120_inauguration_image]
Hours later, in one of his first acts at the inauguration signing ceremony, Donald Trump signed a proclamation declaring that all future Inauguration Days, including this one, the flag must fly at full mast.
A petty, self-serving move that perfectly sets the tone for the dangerous and self-centered regime now in power.
In his inauguration speech Trump ranted about “restoring order” while openly calling for investigations into his political enemies.
He boldly claimed he would bring “peace” to the world, yet his speech was filled with threats of invading countries and promises to disregard diplomacy and existing treaties.
And if that wasn’t surreal enough, he declared that we’re all going to "win" as a country, while openly demonizing nearly every minority group that makes this nation great.
This was not a call for unity or leadership—it was a roadmap for chaos and harm.
Meanwhile, the seats of power by his side were filled with oligarchs and tech billionaires who are ready to turn their unchecked influence into unchecked power.
Social media platforms are already a battleground of lies and propaganda, with no regard for truth.
Their goal is clear: solidify control and silence opposition. And Trump’s #1 enabler, Jim Jordan, is ready to be the megaphone for their chaos.
We’re gearing up to launch a bold, hard-edged initiative that will hold this administration at every turn. You’ll be the first to know what’s coming, but we need your help to hit the ground running. Will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to fuel our work? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250120_inauguration_link1]
The tech billionaires and ULTRA-MAGA cronies sitting beside Trump today don’t care about you or your family.
Their focus is on consolidating power, funneling wealth upwards, and erasing the voices of everyday Americans.
These are the same people who’ve spent years fighting against fair wages, affordable healthcare, and protections for working people.
Their vision of America is one where greed reigns supreme, and the rest of us are left scrambling to survive.
We’ve seen this playbook before.
The promises of prosperity, the rhetoric of “winning”—it’s all a smokescreen for policies that harm the most vulnerable among us.
Jim Jordan has spent his entire career propping up these lies and turning his back on the people he’s supposed to represent.
But we won’t let him or his allies continue with their unchecked chaos.
Together, we will hold them accountable. We will fight for a better, fairer future—one that puts people, not power-hungry elites, first.
Will you chip in now to power our movement and help us show that the people—not the powerful—are what make this country great? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250120_inauguration_link2]
When you're done, please forward this email to 3-5 likeminded friends who might be interested in joining our movement.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

In his inauguration speech Trump ranted about “restoring order” while openly calling for investigations into his political enemies. He boldly claimed he would bring “peace” to the world, yet his speech was filled with threats of invading countries and promises to disregard diplomacy and existing treaties. And if that wasn’t surreal enough, he declared that we’re all going to "win" as a country, while openly demonizing nearly every minority group that makes this nation great. This was not a call for unity or leadership—it was a roadmap for chaos and harm. Meanwhile, the seats of power by his side were filled with oligarchs and tech billionaires who are ready to turn their unchecked influence into unchecked power. Social media platforms are already a battleground of lies and propaganda, with no regard for truth. Their goal is clear: solidify control and silence opposition. And Trump’s #1 enabler, Jim Jordan, is ready to be the megaphone for their chaos. We’re gearing up to launch a bold, hard-edged initiative that will hold this administration at every turn. You’ll be the first to know what’s coming, but we need your help to hit the ground running. Will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to fuel our work? [] The tech billionaires and ULTRA-MAGA cronies sitting beside Trump today don’t care about you or your family. Their focus is on consolidating power, funneling wealth upwards, and erasing the voices of everyday Americans. These are the same people who’ve spent years fighting against fair wages, affordable healthcare, and protections for working people. Their vision of America is one where greed reigns supreme, and the rest of us are left scrambling to survive. We’ve seen this playbook before. The promises of prosperity, the rhetoric of “winning”—it’s all a smokescreen for policies that harm the most vulnerable among us. Jim Jordan has spent his entire career propping up these lies and turning his back on the people he’s supposed to represent. But we won’t let him or his allies continue with their unchecked chaos. Together, we will hold them accountable. We will fight for a better, fairer future—one that puts people, not power-hungry elites, first. Will you chip in now to power our movement and help us show that the people—not the powerful—are what make this country great? [] When you're done, please forward this email to 3-5 likeminded friends who might be interested in joining our movement. Working for US, Tamie Wilson alt [] Donate to Tamie Today [] ©2024 Tamie Wilson for US, all rights reserved To contribute via check, please address to: Tamie Wilson For US 273 Saratoga St Delaware, OH 43015 United States www.tamiewilson.com [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe:

Saludos, Four years ago, Donald Trump incited an insurrection to overturn the results of the 2020 Presidential election, claiming widespread fraud and spurring the biggest attack on American democracy since the Civil War. Today, in the very building his supporters attacked on January 6th, 2021, Donald Trump took the oath of office and officially became the 47th President of the United States. To say that we’re entering into an unprecedented moment in American history is a gross understatement. Donald Trump has taken every opportunity to disparage the truth, undermine our democratic systems, and disregard the rule of law to prop up his own interests. We witnessed it firsthand for four years, and we’re bound to see more of it in the days to come. I know the despair you’re likely feeling — we’re all feeling it — but hear me when I say that _we can’t give in._ Now more than ever, we must stay true to our values of truth, progress, equality, and most of all, hope. That’s exactly what I’m going to do in Congress, and I hope I can count on you to join me. [If you can, consider chipping in $10 to help me stand strongly against Donald Trump in Washington and defend the future we’ve fought so hard to achieve. body:

body:
Senate Democrats are going to try anything and everything to coerce and bully any Republican who shows weakness into tanking this critical appointment.

| |

| | Fellow Patriot, The Senate confirmation hearing for Pete Hegseth just concluded and the real work begins **now** to get him confirmed!Senate Democrats are going to try anything and everything to coerce and bully any Republican who shows weakness into tanking this critical appointment. We refuse to let that happen. _**[_**That's why I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=26df70b1bc2c4ebbb37cce7d2abd4a1b&_e=BtaFv2El09V42sy_7QQM7rttbdR-wh7WlELPSKP8ynCaiNLZ7IGIL7qATRhYZXl2k7xtHTB_99jY1Q4cYlVwRbdOWwL-NxJTrj1hTIdCvVQQj_i8QX2I8nk-Q4hBR9N6_3Mol7cW3x9t5kjQ64zfikECVT85XMzJMpSeKubGmfwbA14xHAMlMPHzQknh2qCCWiAEBSWDyRQZGSazrO03VxHBBSMkAqD2Hz-W6TChxq8cg0TkJH6s7ws2Q74jpxdscEjf2LO-5ZOXPSzvHtwfC8Fft84jMY5zRYHtfFCsmd3ehhcnEqPbU4mxa_gbFoxbx6kcIxxe5CfehjBxms9m_KVDr2R2jOsLf4kyOv6lc_c%3D)**_ Pete Hegseth is a decorated veteran, a proven leader, and a loyal defender of the America First agenda. He has what it takes to stand up to the deep state, protect our troops, and restore the integrity of our military—something sorely lacking under the Biden administration. America and her military are still reeling from the failed leadership of **Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin** , the architect of the disastrous **_Afghanistan withdrawal._** Under Austin’s watch, America endured one of the most humiliating moments in modern history:
---
| |
* **13 brave service members killed in Kabul.**
* **Thousands of Americans and allies left behind in enemy territory.**
* **Billions of dollars’ worth of U.S. military equipment handed over to the Taliban.**

---
My friend, **our military deserves better.** President Trump understands that. That’s why he’s nominated Pete Hegseth—a battle-hardened warrior who knows what it means to serve his country and will never bow to woke ideologues or globalist interests.But we know what’s coming: Democrats will unite to block his confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment.If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak Republicans could help the Democrats tank this nomination.We can’t let that happen. We won’t let RINOs undermine President Trump again! _**[_**If you agree that Pete Hegseth MUST BE CONFIRMED as Secretary of Defense, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH Response Form right away!**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=26df70b1bc2c4ebbb37cce7d2abd4a1b&_e=BtaFv2El09V42sy_7QQM7rttbdR-wh7WlELPSKP8ynCaiNLZ7IGIL7qATRhYZXl2k7xtHTB_99jY1Q4cYlVwRbdOWwL-NxJTrj1hTIdCvVQQj_i8QX2I8nk-Q4hBR9N6_3Mol7cW3x9t5kjQ64zfikECVT85XMzJMpSeKubGmfwbA14xHAMlMPHzQknh2qCCWiAEBSWDyRQZGSazrO03V6mJz7XsrWBV-V38qHvK9k1Sm5rOSDUcyFAK5ormdNS83rNiNvlGc4BtoWJNbMg9atLmKXKa-64yWg88bvcjdUPVbKhwaGmZVbxUCfP_CwblHpY3E6j0h7Ko9jCW5E2crCJoZ8eqlAlv6g19CCp_WLg%3D)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Pete Hegseth. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**. If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen!AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – **but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**
---
[ ** CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH** ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=26df70b1bc2c4ebbb37cce7d2abd4a1b&_e=BtaFv2El09V42sy_7QQM7rttbdR-wh7WlELPSKP8ynCaiNLZ7IGIL7qATRhYZXl2k7xtHTB_99jY1Q4cYlVwRbdOWwL-NxJTrj1hTIdCvVQQj_i8QX2I8nk-Q4hBR9N6_3Mol7cW3x9t5kjQ64zfikECVT85XMzJMpSeKubGmfwbA14xHAMlMPHzQknh2qCCWiAEBSWDyRQZGSazrO03V3ASbWlKTWkJzBSl_a6cv6RiGb8r5jWvfuU7pehZuNI6F2iyKMFcTgCmtBeNsrg32b4UEWA17QcmNA_WsFePp-pvTLOILrFevxo3kAjD0Bx_E-ufYfQ0IRALohlB0LKY4-1Wwo-_48MLiNT-EuxJzfk%3D)
