Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only _razor-thin margins_ , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second. It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen. And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you.And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Pete Hegseth will take time, money, and resources. **[That’s why I’m asking you to join AMAC Action with your very best CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH emergency contribution today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=26df70b1bc2c4ebbb37cce7d2abd4a1b&_e=BtaFv2El09V42sy_7QQM7rttbdR-wh7WlELPSKP8ynCaiNLZ7IGIL7qATRhYZXl2k7xtHTB_99jY1Q4cYlVwRbdOWwL-NxJTrj1hTIdCvVQQj_i8QX2I8nk-Q4hBR9N6_3Mol7cW3x9t5kjQ64zfikECVT85XMzJMpSeKubGmfwbA14xHAMlMPHzQknh2qCCWiAEBSWDyRQZGSazrO03V8JQ4pFdZr_zk6U1JD_W6mrXpzugjLnsdM122Mslk4DpIfZE0TpqRfaPZjkdsmM1w9owcT8PqP9mfS5IDuuF4KqQOo7e11Sfn8x8P_5Znn6chb3u819xHM0Po0-yIZSOIQgVL9AMauNMwFK3PTMveLs%3D)** Let’s send a clear message:
---
* **The American people will not be denied.**
* **Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement.**
* **And Pete Hegseth will be confirmed as Secretary of Defense.**

---
No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.**_But we have got to move quickly. We have just weeks – maybe days –_**** _ to get out ahead of the radical Left and the RINOs – _****_So please don’t delay!_** Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning.
---
| | Thank you, friend!
---
For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber****AMAC Action**

clean_body: Senate Democrats are going to try anything and everything to coerce and bully any Republican who shows weakness into tanking this critical appointment. | | | | Today I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION! | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, The Senate confirmation hearing for Pete Hegseth just concluded and the real work begins now to get him confirmed!Senate Democrats are going to try anything and everything to coerce and bully any Republican who shows weakness into tanking this critical appointment. We refuse to let that happen. Pete Hegseth is a decorated veteran, a proven leader, and a loyal defender of the America First agenda. He has what it takes to stand up to the deep state, protect our troops, and restore the integrity of our military—something sorely lacking under the Biden administration. America and her military are still reeling from the failed leadership of Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin , the architect of the disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal. Under Austin’s watch, America endured one of the most humiliating moments in modern history: | | 13 brave service members killed in Kabul. Thousands of Americans and allies left behind in enemy territory. Billions of dollars’ worth of U.S. military equipment handed over to the Taliban. My friend, our military deserves better. President Trump understands that. That’s why he’s nominated Pete Hegseth—a battle-hardened warrior who knows what it means to serve his country and will never bow to woke ideologues or globalist interests.But we know what’s coming: Democrats will unite to block his confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment.If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak Republicans could help the Democrats tank this nomination.We can’t let that happen. We won’t let RINOs undermine President Trump again! And my friend, this isn’t just about Pete Hegseth. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of We the People. If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen!AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – but we need every conservative voice backing us up. Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only razor-thin margins , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second. It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen. And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you.And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Pete Hegseth will take time, money, and resources. Let’s send a clear message: The American people will not be denied. Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement. And Pete Hegseth will be confirmed as Secretary of Defense. No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.But we have got to move quickly. We have just weeks – maybe days – to get out ahead of the radical Left and the RINOs – So please don’t delay! Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning. | | Thank you, friend! For Freedom, Rebecca WeberAMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 1904 Thomas Avenue, Suite 103,Leesburg, FL 34748 | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# President Donald Trump

| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)

| Jan 20

| | Fellow Patriot, The Senate confirmation hearing for Pete Hegseth just concluded and the real work begins **now** to get him confirmed! Senate Democrats are going to try anything and everything to coerce and bully any Republican who shows weakness into tanking this critical appointment. We refuse to let that happen. _**[_**That's why I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a7ebfc2493b45d6a00116e7545c8831&_e=xGWubNSzP968h95stJ-5pGl-l6d2fIQkR2R1BflGD48uhSQKTheIKSAkRc6Qp9ATjAxsBs3_83lCnBdgNiyo-eRpc0SCgiFs37gDgVl7CdCA_AGd3GmpBvBVeklR-RJO6k9ZqUFm7anKueB966N8wEGSGpFktH_9am1-mwnThLs-y45u06owQ-lwDO9JnFLHFzaT4I1v3riVB1ZVL88uiMUr9lzCxltKeEifeuCyGuu9HikqFJX_X7wEwiqnhpoQWjPCExoLHu4Mjkaf3iV8fJhmKL38B1l04JI-BxFo-XlPkhMepeGtrKcV04kieBGCa3PS5EdbFCOJi4PUcqgt4U5_bXEd_XuXSOE955K4d28%3D)**_ Pete Hegseth is a decorated veteran, a proven leader, and a loyal defender of the America First agenda. He has what it takes to stand up to the deep state, protect our troops, and restore the integrity of our military--something sorely lacking under the Biden administration. America and her military are still reeling from the failed leadership of **Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin** , the architect of the disastrous **_Afghanistan withdrawal._** Under Austin's watch, America endured one of the most humiliating moments in modern history:
---
| |
* **13 brave service members killed in Kabul.**
* **Thousands of Americans and allies left behind in enemy territory.**
* **Billions of dollars ' worth of U.S. military equipment handed over to the Taliban.**

---
My friend, **our military deserves better.** President Trump understands that. That's why he's nominated Pete Hegseth--a battle-hardened warrior who knows what it means to serve his country and will never bow to woke ideologues or globalist interests. But we know what's coming: Democrats will unite to block his confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. name: Tina Kotek
subject: Re: Trump’s inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Peter,

Earlier today, Donald Trump was sworn in as President of the United States. I will work with anyone who wants to join our efforts to make real progress for Oregonians.

But let me be clear – I will also work to hold him and his administration accountable if they undermine our values or pursue policies that will hurt people in Oregon .

I spoke with a lot of folks after the November election. People were scared, sad, or both. I get it. This feels topsy-turvy again. But, regardless of how I feel, my job is to stay calm and level-headed in these uncertain times.

Now that the dust has settled and Donald Trump is president, it’s time to recommit ourselves to working together to build a better future for every person in our state. In every corner of our state, good people are fighting for lower costs, better schools, and more resources to address our state’s most pressing issues.

I stand ready to come together with others, build on this resolve, and stay committed to collaboration for the common good — and I hope you are too, Peter.

Oregonians have shown they will continue to lead with compassion, courage, and conviction — protecting a place where everyone can live freely and authentically.

We all need to fight for these values — no matter the challenges ahead, or what the Trump Administration does to attempt to infringe upon these values.

I’m thankful for Oregon and what we’ve built in our state. And I’m thankful to be your Governor in these challenging times.

We are strong, resilient, and unified by our shared belief in a brighter tomorrow. And, as your Governor, I will always have your back and work hard to uplift and protect our wonderful state.

Best wishes,

Tina

Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services.
Can you chip in any amount now to support her work?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-biobox]
Tina for Oregon
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
tinafororegon.com [https://www.tinafororegon.com/] | info@tinafororegon.com [info@tinafororegon.com]
Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

name: JAG
subject: In the Victimhood Olympics, Everyone Loses
body:
When I was born in India (where my parents were working in the Peace Corps), there was a horrific and tragic practice of “doctors” mutilating children.

|
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e32a347fe14424aa2826c0896120181&_e=ZX8VB8rV2WfQh0FHsUH9Zre6WoMLBJkPbYXjX-wDofYTZJfaZhztjhBkAwDgVXj6DHo5Nr-dOc8UkjVXnQMy94e8KDM3mwKo6jg2CDew6ycP_4nGwmF75Cvawdx7lyaDb-ZEIOdrTVoZOwbX5izgPg5V-Ran1_FKOJn0LA1L3TMIzDk0GQqPsi6JXXeCd6dB6clWb3avEv2ISIq49LxA6lewMH9umtaNkAI6aqy4oB-zy_z3A9MaPFe0kfsVRBE4I61SGCmx2L8gWdBNF1Du0DWQ_X7OD_UFbg4vlY5FImo%3D) Friend,

When I was born in India (where my parents were working in the Peace Corps), there was a horrific and tragic practice of “doctors” mutilating children. Sometimes, hands or legs were chopped off; sometimes, eyes gouged out.

“Why???” you gasp in horror. Sadism? Some demented selfishness? To the contrary. The answer is altruism: these barbaric butchers were trying to make the children more pitiful (and more profitable) beggars, playing on the sympathies for such victims as to merit a few more rupees cast their way.

You shake your head: such a thing couldn’t happen here in modern America, you reassure yourself. Here, young people strive to be rewarded for their merit, not their misfortunes, right? For their achievements, not their ailments. For their talents, not their tales of woe.

If you still believe that you’re living in the wrong century. And you need to wake up.

Go to any university campus or public school. There, you’ll find DEI activist teachers doing the work of the child butchers – but instead of physically mutilating the young, they mutilate their minds by inculcating them with narratives of victimhood.

Their subjects aren’t waving deformed limbs but waving banners of oppression. And unlike the butchered beggars of India, rather than begging, they demand. Reparations. Special privileges. Affirmative action. Safe spaces.

But the real aim of this modern mutilation – for both the perpetrators and its victims – is power.

Ayn Rand pointed out the similarities between these ancient barbaric practices and the way in which modern education deforms the mind and crushes the spirit. She did it by paraphrasing her favorite author, Victor Hugo:
_“And what did they make of these children? Monsters.
Why monsters? To rule.”_
Justice met Need, and the natural offshoot was Victimhood.

Victimhood’s unholy union with Envy is what’s driving many of the problems we face today.

The victim mentality turns people’s grief into grievances, telling them ever so seductively, _“The reason you don’t have what you want or need is because you’re a victim of..._

_A rigged system
Systemic racism
Sexism and misogyny_
... the list goes on and on.

This victim mentality spreads like a Socially Transmitted Disease, eating away at that which is best within us: optimism, reason, self-esteem, benevolence, and – most importantly – gratitude.

By pitting black and white, men and women, rich and poor, against each other in a never-ending victim-oppressor dance, Victimhood replaces one’s identity as a strong, capable individual with the label _“Victim.”_ It breeds a sense of entitlement that breaks the human spirit.

At The Atlas Society, we’re committed to inoculating young minds against this corrosive mentality by using cutting-edge media to communicate Ayn Rand’s ideals of reason, achievement, personal responsibility, and liberty to the next generation.

[_Today, I’m asking you to join me in this pursuit. When you donate $35, $50, $100, or more, you are playing an integral role in saving young people around the world from the grip of Victimhood. Click to donate and receive an exclusive FREE download of our graphic novel of _Anthem_ with your gift of $35 or more! >>_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e32a347fe14424aa2826c0896120181&_e=ZX8VB8rV2WfQh0FHsUH9Zre6WoMLBJkPbYXjX-wDofYTZJfaZhztjhBkAwDgVXj6DHo5Nr-dOc8UkjVXnQMy94e8KDM3mwKo6jg2CDew6ycP_4nGwmF75Cvawdx7lyaDb-ZEIOdrTVoZOwbX5izgPjC5hjBdXCP8jZmKcQZvDs7QNw4QGr26RxGQPYAaulE-Fgfx8LG7n3P3dj6jSosrmSgmlHJZJRRnGWodxm7AMu-jWay8Sp5QPMcZp0SMnBPKD2Pc4W6ZOraje_FGTWMlDsiEc55r0Leo8MFDjlqwGb4%3D)
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e32a347fe14424aa2826c0896120181&_e=ZX8VB8rV2WfQh0FHsUH9Zre6WoMLBJkPbYXjX-wDofYTZJfaZhztjhBkAwDgVXj6DHo5Nr-dOc8UkjVXnQMy94e8KDM3mwKo6jg2CDew6ycP_4nGwmF75Cvawdx7lyaDb-ZEIOdrTVoZOwbX5izgPmuFkrzlBAhA-kPhG9WM0miDP-UQVOYRdhjBnB1YP9XB1b5c10ssHOGRAF-XHvyxee1xkOgLNzZT5grXKVrF5Ssa8_SS_OIBvtw44iVXHXcfQKZQ46lf85PfN0Bq3_7PRnvwNZA4gwF5aEYKeFTZp4g%3D)
As the CEO of The Atlas Society, I know that _it’s not easy to achieve your dreams_. I worked hard to get where I am today, and I am _grateful_ for the men and women who helped me be _victorious_ in achieving my goals.

I’m particularly grateful to Ayn Rand, whose philosophy gave me the weapons to fight back against envy, victimhood, and resentment. I’m committed to sharing these resources with the rising generation of young people in ways that are engaging, accessible, and inspiring.

Whether it’s through our action-packed animated book trailers, our thought-provoking Draw My Life videos, or our captivating graphic novels, The Atlas Society is using art to engage young minds with the message of a free society where everyone has the opportunity to be victorious.

Ayn Rand herself called art _“the indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal.”_ You can help us replace the victim mentality with Ayn Rand’s vision of self-determination and achievement by donating today.
[Donate to Fight the Victim Mentality >>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e32a347fe14424aa2826c0896120181&_e=ZX8VB8rV2WfQh0FHsUH9Zre6WoMLBJkPbYXjX-wDofYTZJfaZhztjhBkAwDgVXj6DHo5Nr-dOc8UkjVXnQMy94e8KDM3mwKo6jg2CDew6ycP_4nGwmF75Cvawdx7lyaDb-ZEIOdrTVoZOwbX5izgPjBgqMDPMAWU7CSZJW8xUy4XNN_YSeeffZl6ie2cKYVpJhjzr8QfC1Sk_kXSq2MGrB-Jb4j2p57zUbS5uUXXUFsr5ksT9pkw9VsPhWMt4eGBLDBssBfDi_rRD8PWh4IhgOqPio1c9ZbYYHMNAOij-H4%3D)
By introducing young people to the ideas of Ayn Rand, we are providing them with an opportunity to build a victim-proof mindset that prizes TRUTH above all else.

Victimhood tells young people, **_“You’ll never be a _victor_ , but you can _always_ be a victim.”_**

**Ayn Rand offers a radically different message that empowers them to reach their fullest potential** by embracing reason, achievement, benevolence, and ethical self-interest as the foundation for liberty, happiness, and a flourishing society.

Ed Crane, Founder of the CATO Institute, deemed Ayn Rand the _“all-time greatest recruiter for the liberty movement”_ because her novels provide a captivating alternative to the siren song of collective victimhood.

[_Donate $35 or more to download an exclusive copy of our graphic novel adaptation of _Anthem_ and see for yourself how we’re challenging the victim mentality through the works of Ayn Rand. clean_body: When I was born in India (where my parents were working in the Peace Corps), there was a horrific and tragic practice of “doctors” mutilating children. | | | Friend, When I was born in India (where my parents were working in the Peace Corps), there was a horrific and tragic practice of “doctors” mutilating children. Sometimes, hands or legs were chopped off; sometimes, eyes gouged out. “Why???” you gasp in horror. Sadism? Some demented selfishness? To the contrary. The answer is altruism: these barbaric butchers were trying to make the children more pitiful (and more profitable) beggars, playing on the sympathies for such victims as to merit a few more rupees cast their way. You shake your head: such a thing couldn’t happen here in modern America, you reassure yourself. Here, young people strive to be rewarded for their merit, not their misfortunes, right? For their achievements, not their ailments. For their talents, not their tales of woe. If you still believe that you’re living in the wrong century. And you need to wake up. Go to any university campus or public school. There, you’ll find DEI activist teachers doing the work of the child butchers – but instead of physically mutilating the young, they mutilate their minds by inculcating them with narratives of victimhood. Their subjects aren’t waving deformed limbs but waving banners of oppression. And unlike the butchered beggars of India, rather than begging, they demand. Reparations. Special privileges. Affirmative action. Safe spaces. But the real aim of this modern mutilation – for both the perpetrators and its victims – is power. Ayn Rand pointed out the similarities between these ancient barbaric practices and the way in which modern education deforms the mind and crushes the spirit. She did it by paraphrasing her favorite author, Victor Hugo: “And what did they make of these children? Monsters. Why monsters? To rule.” Justice met Need, and the natural offshoot was Victimhood. Victimhood’s unholy union with Envy is what’s driving many of the problems we face today. The victim mentality turns people’s grief into grievances, telling them ever so seductively, “The reason you don’t have what you want or need is because you’re a victim of... A rigged system Systemic racism Sexism and misogyny ... the list goes on and on. This victim mentality spreads like a Socially Transmitted Disease, eating away at that which is best within us: optimism, reason, self-esteem, benevolence, and – most importantly – gratitude. By pitting black and white, men and women, rich and poor, against each other in a never-ending victim-oppressor dance, Victimhood replaces one’s identity as a strong, capable individual with the label “Victim.” It breeds a sense of entitlement that breaks the human spirit. At The Atlas Society, we’re committed to inoculating young minds against this corrosive mentality by using cutting-edge media to communicate Ayn Rand’s ideals of reason, achievement, personal responsibility, and liberty to the next generation. As the CEO of The Atlas Society, I know that it’s not easy to achieve your dreams. I worked hard to get where I am today, and I am grateful for the men and women who helped me be victorious in achieving my goals. I’m particularly grateful to Ayn Rand, whose philosophy gave me the weapons to fight back against envy, victimhood, and resentment. I’m committed to sharing these resources with the rising generation of young people in ways that are engaging, accessible, and inspiring. Whether it’s through our action-packed animated book trailers, our thought-provoking Draw My Life videos, or our captivating graphic novels, The Atlas Society is using art to engage young minds with the message of a free society where everyone has the opportunity to be victorious. Ayn Rand herself called art “the indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal.” You can help us replace the victim mentality with Ayn Rand’s vision of self-determination and achievement by donating today. By introducing young people to the ideas of Ayn Rand, we are providing them with an opportunity to build a victim-proof mindset that prizes TRUTH above all else. Victimhood tells young people, “You’ll never be a victor , but you can always be a victim.” Ayn Rand offers a radically different message that empowers them to reach their fullest potential by embracing reason, achievement, benevolence, and ethical self-interest as the foundation for liberty, happiness, and a flourishing society. Ed Crane, Founder of the CATO Institute, deemed Ayn Rand the “all-time greatest recruiter for the liberty movement” because her novels provide a captivating alternative to the siren song of collective victimhood. Ayn Rand’s novels stand as a testament to the human spirit and a celebration of the individual’s power to break through the fog of Victimhood, Envy, and Resentment and instead realize a future marked by achievement, pride, and gratitude. Along with my colleagues at The Atlas Society, I’m on a mission to reach 1 BILLION young people with Ayn Rand’s work. I hope you’ll join me! Thank you in advance for your support, Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG) CEO The Atlas Society The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. | | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100706161/523614900/1241549265?refcode=WUENE147_20250120_Cecile_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055621&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTIzM2RiYi03N2Q3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HFiEHYwVSDjQWt6C10tVBJG9x2nVAq4BDg6Eq_3Am7M=&emci=776c782e-75d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=21233dbb-77d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=5177934) Peter,

This morning, reproductive freedom champion, organizer, and former Planned Parenthood President Cecile Richards died after spending the last year fighting a rare and incurable form of brain cancer.

It should not surprise anyone who knew Cecile or has watched her decades-long career in activism that, despite a diagnosis that would have slowed down just about anybody else, she remained steadfast in the fight for fundamental human rights — especially the right to control our own bodies. She spent the last several months continuing her work, even speaking at the Democratic National Convention — a true testament to her strength and determination.

EMILYs List has proudly partnered with Planned Parenthood and with Cecile many, many times over the years. We are so deeply grateful for her partnership, and her decades of service to the American people.

Now it's our turn to honor Cecile. We've made a card giving this community a chance to thank her for her years of fierce advocacy and activism. The reproductive freedom movement in America absolutely would not be where it is today without Cecile Richards. [**To add your name and a message honoring Cecile, sign on here:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100706162/523614901/1241549265?refcode=WUENE147_20250120_Cecile_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055621&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTIzM2RiYi03N2Q3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HFiEHYwVSDjQWt6C10tVBJG9x2nVAq4BDg6Eq_3Am7M=&emci=776c782e-75d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=21233dbb-77d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=5177934) | [SIGN THE CARD](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100706163/523614902/1241549265?refcode=WUENE147_20250120_Cecile_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055621&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTIzM2RiYi03N2Q3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HFiEHYwVSDjQWt6C10tVBJG9x2nVAq4BDg6Eq_3Am7M=&emci=776c782e-75d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=21233dbb-77d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=5177934)

Thank you for your support.

And thank you, Cecile. For everything.

\- the EMILYs List team

clean_body: | Peter, This morning, reproductive freedom champion, organizer, and former Planned Parenthood President Cecile Richards died after spending the last year fighting a rare and incurable form of brain cancer. It should not surprise anyone who knew Cecile or has watched her decades-long career in activism that, despite a diagnosis that would have slowed down just about anybody else, she remained steadfast in the fight for fundamental human rights — especially the right to control our own bodies. She spent the last several months continuing her work, even speaking at the Democratic National Convention — a true testament to her strength and determination. EMILYs List has proudly partnered with Planned Parenthood and with Cecile many, many times over the years. We are so deeply grateful for her partnership, and her decades of service to the American people. Now it's our turn to honor Cecile. We've made a card giving this community a chance to thank her for her years of fierce advocacy and activism. The reproductive freedom movement in America absolutely would not be where it is today without Cecile Richards. | Thank you for your support. And thank you, Cecile. For everything. \- the EMILYs List team EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. = = Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: AMAC Action
subject: Democrats and RINOs CAN’T tank this nomination!
body:
Senate Democrats are going to try anything and everything to coerce and bully any Republican who shows weakness into tanking this critical appointment.

| |
---
| | Today I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!
---
| |

| |
---
[](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkLEOmzAQQL_GbCD7zoZk8EALpAtphVA6Wo7tJJYwIGPS369o073jPelO793PXvXaT35-XnVwMsWk4qbuVumgTW5dWPLo50UBBZFTlgNVmFnJK7BYZk6yCivO-OlMs5dk1mBp78yUotRWPEAgteJMAQTXDjHz8rhDGVBgvBJQ8Ar4g3E0zJ0s2opwqicX01akl4tu3e-TN3pOTofCLCGb5CuldSNYE-gIdIelNskvcxHd-12YhUC3aopAzw8QnJ6MI9jtKaht2eMxNF-aSz60NwLlgYOzfg8Em7b_EKPDqv1zJtj8tWWVqvt6VF-_X7-1F1BDe1M_6nwcxs9GMgSbcRjzf3VZlHb95afJb-XR9AzaT38C0n---C3hdwAAAP__PLl9mg)

| | Fellow Patriot, The Senate confirmation hearing for Pete Hegseth just concluded and the real work begins **now** to get him confirmed!Senate Democrats are going to try anything and everything to coerce and bully any Republican who shows weakness into tanking this critical appointment. We refuse to let that happen. _**[_**That's why I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!**_](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkLEOmzAQQL_GbCD7zoZk8EALpAtphVA6Wo7tJJYwIGPS369o073jPelO793PXvXaT35-XnVwMsWk4qbuVumgTW5dWPLo50UBBZFTlgNVmFnJK7BYZk6yCivO-OlMs5dk1mBp78yUotRWPEAgteJMAQTXDjHz8rhDGVBgvBJQ8Ar4g3E0zJ0s2opwqicX01akl4tu3e-TN3pOTofCLCGb5CuldSNYE-gIdIelNskvcxHd-12YhUC3aopAzw8QnJ6MI9jtKaht2eMxNF-aSz60NwLlgYOzfg8Em7b_EKPDqv1zJtj8tWWVqvt6VF-_X7-1F1BDe1M_6nwcxs9GMgSbcRjzf3VZlHb95afJb-XR9AzaT38C0n---C3hdwAAAP__PLl9mg)**_ Pete Hegseth is a decorated veteran, a proven leader, and a loyal defender of the America First agenda. He has what it takes to stand up to the deep state, protect our troops, and restore the integrity of our military—something sorely lacking under the Biden administration. America and her military are still reeling from the failed leadership of **Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin** , the architect of the disastrous **_Afghanistan withdrawal._** Under Austin’s watch, America endured one of the most humiliating moments in modern history:
---
| |
* **13 brave service members killed in Kabul.**
* **Thousands of Americans and allies left behind in enemy territory.**
* **Billions of dollars’ worth of U.S. military equipment handed over to the Taliban.**

---
My friend, **our military deserves better.** President Trump understands that. That’s why he’s nominated Pete Hegseth—a battle-hardened warrior who knows what it means to serve his country and will never bow to woke ideologues or globalist interests.But we know what’s coming: Democrats will unite to block his confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment.If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak Republicans could help the Democrats tank this nomination.We can’t let that happen. We won’t let RINOs undermine President Trump again! _**[_**If you agree that Pete Hegseth MUST BE CONFIRMED as Secretary of Defense, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH Response Form right away!**_](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkLEOmzAQQL_GbCD7zoZk8EALpAtphVA6Wo7tJJYwIGPS369o073jPelO793PXvXaT35-XnVwMsWk4qbuVumgTW5dWPLo50UBBZFTlgNVmFnJK7BYZk6yCivO-OlMs5dk1mBp78yUotRWPEAgteJMAQTXDjHz8rhDGVBgvBJQ8Ar4g3E0zJ0s2opwqicX01akl4tu3e-TN3pOTofCLCGb5CuldSNYE-gIdIelNskvcxHd-12YhUC3aopAzw8QnJ6MI9jtKaht2eMxNF-aSz60NwLlgYOzfg8Em7b_EKPDqv1zJtj8tWWVqvt6VF-_X7-1F1BDe1M_6nwcxs9GMgSbcRjzf3VZlHb95afJb-XR9AzaT38C0n---C3hdwAAAP__PLl9mg)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Pete Hegseth. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**. If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen!AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – **but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**
---
[ ** CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH** ](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkLEOmzAQQL_GbCD7zoZk8EALpAtphVA6Wo7tJJYwIGPS369o073jPelO793PXvXaT35-XnVwMsWk4qbuVumgTW5dWPLo50UBBZFTlgNVmFnJK7BYZk6yCivO-OlMs5dk1mBp78yUotRWPEAgteJMAQTXDjHz8rhDGVBgvBJQ8Ar4g3E0zJ0s2opwqicX01akl4tu3e-TN3pOTofCLCGb5CuldSNYE-gIdIelNskvcxHd-12YhUC3aopAzw8QnJ6MI9jtKaht2eMxNF-aSz60NwLlgYOzfg8Em7b_EKPDqv1zJtj8tWWVqvt6VF-_X7-1F1BDe1M_6nwcxs9GMgSbcRjzf3VZlHb95afJb-XR9AzaT38C0n---C3hdwAAAP__PLl9mg)
---
Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only _razor-thin margins_ , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second. It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen. And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you.And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Pete Hegseth will take time, money, and resources. **[That’s why I’m asking you to join AMAC Action with your very best CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH emergency contribution today.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkLEOmzAQQL_GbCD7zoZk8EALpAtphVA6Wo7tJJYwIGPS369o073jPelO793PXvXaT35-XnVwMsWk4qbuVumgTW5dWPLo50UBBZFTlgNVmFnJK7BYZk6yCivO-OlMs5dk1mBp78yUotRWPEAgteJMAQTXDjHz8rhDGVBgvBJQ8Ar4g3E0zJ0s2opwqicX01akl4tu3e-TN3pOTofCLCGb5CuldSNYE-gIdIelNskvcxHd-12YhUC3aopAzw8QnJ6MI9jtKaht2eMxNF-aSz60NwLlgYOzfg8Em7b_EKPDqv1zJtj8tWWVqvt6VF-_X7-1F1BDe1M_6nwcxs9GMgSbcRjzf3VZlHb95afJb-XR9AzaT38C0n---C3hdwAAAP__PLl9mg)** Let’s send a clear message:
---
* **The American people will not be denied.**
* **Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement.**
* **And Pete Hegseth will be confirmed as Secretary of Defense.**

---
No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.**_But we have got to move quickly. We have just weeks – maybe days –_**** _ to get out ahead of the radical Left and the RINOs – _****_So please don’t delay!_****** Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning.
---
| | Thank you, friend!
---
For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber****AMAC Action**
---

Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning. | | Thank you, friend! For Freedom, Rebecca Weber**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 1904 Thomas Avenue, Suite 103,Leesburg, FL 34748 | The Republican Team PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: What gives me hope today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Today, Donald Trump was sworn in as President of the United States.

I know this is a difficult moment for many of us who have fought so hard
for a different future for Texas and for America.

But I want to share something with you that gives me hope, even on this
challenging day. Throughout 2024, our Powered by People volunteers worked
tirelessly across Texas, meeting, registering, and staying in touch with
young Texans through genuine person-to-person connections on college
campuses and in their communities.

Our volunteers met these voters in person, and then followed up with them
in personal peer-to-peer text conversations, over 285,000 individual
messages that helped first-time voters navigate polling locations,
answered questions about voter ID requirements, and offered encouragement
in the face of Texas's notorious voter suppression tactics.

Today marks a choice. We can give in to despair, or we can choose action.
And if there's one thing I've learned in all my years of organizing in
Texas, it's that action is the antidote to despair.

The challenges ahead are significant. Trump and his allies have made it
clear they want to drag our country backward – threatening reproductive
rights, blocking common-sense gun reform, and undermining the very
foundations of our democracy. But remember: they want us to give up.
They're counting on our discouragement.

Instead, we're going to build on the infrastructure and relationships we
created in 2024. We're going to expand our reach, deepen our connections,
and continue the patient, persistent work of organizing – voter by voter,
conversation by conversation.

This isn't just about opposing Trump. It's about fighting for our vision
of what Texas and America can be. It's about protecting the rights and
dignity of every person in our state. It's about building a future worthy
of our children's highest aspirations.

I know the
road ahead looks daunting. But I've seen the power of what we can
accomplish when we stay focused, stay committed, and stay in the fight
together. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250120.dXYcH7&refcode=ema20250120-239950&t=1001&akid=239950%2E444211%2E6KlKet ]Will you join us in continuing this vital work?

The next four years will test us in ways we can hardly imagine. But I've
never been more certain that the future belongs to those willing to do the
patient, persistent work of building it. And I've never been more grateful
to be in this fight alongside you.

Let's get to work,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=239950%2E444211%2E6KlKet

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Our fight continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Friend,
I know many of us have been dreading today since the election, and I don’t blame you. The new administration means four years of unknowns at best, and grave attacks on democracy at worst. Many Americans are afraid, but I know that we can be better than that. And that’s why instead of focusing on the bad today, I’m thinking about the good: All of the organizations and people who are fighting for our rights, and who will hold this administration accountable at every single turn.
I hope you will join me in supporting a few of these organizations that are on the frontlines of the fight for our democracy and our rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inaugurationsplit?refcode=012025]
We know the Trump administration will be a friend to the gun lobby. We know they will attack women’s rights at every turn. And we know they will roll back any progress made to stop the climate crisis. But there are so many organizations that will stand in their way.
Organizations like Giffords, who work every single day to end the gun violence crisis in our country. I know first hand what it’s like to lose a loved one to gun violence — something that too many Americans have also felt. And when the Trump administration tries to roll back critical safeguards and put more guns on the street, Giffords will be fighting it from state legislatures all the way to Washington, DC.
Organizations like Planned Parenthood Action Fund, who have been preparing for this threat to our rights since the day Roe v. Wade was overturned, and who are ready to fight in the courts and in Congress to make sure women’s reproductive freedoms are protected.
Organizations like EDF Action PAC, who are fighting to protect our environment and support candidates who will fight back against the Trump administration’s plans to gut climate legislation.
The next four years will not be easy, but we will not give up the critical work of preserving our democracy and our freedoms. I hope you’ll join me in supporting these organizations in that fight.
DONATE: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inaugurationsplit?refcode=012025]
Thank you,
Debbie
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7CGTHFDMeUWW_Wz2yFDujA2?unsubscribedata=M4t1n85HBRJ8QuRrOa8M6B5kCadhGRGrvJcMBIgDD3tXAQigwC7JSgxiKmbAMjhj9NCyZZfHLk47WB75U3N9qJJstPfafjsnj9JBHpAZttB7Qz270ETvYfnkBR2t8EIZDJcY6FuuuniOZZ3c5gXwddL%2FipgC%2F0V96CsgGY91qAF6%2BpgAFG1ikNgrhT5w%2Bi6sqyMmAjaaBWqZqBGoSUnBk2KKH4p2EFy6C1DUDMusLk2RbP%2FvsD%2FJz5pw6vGqrwU4Mkd7VE%2BbuN%2B7BOPxPxjwXrqmgtUhZ3Yb8mjqT9XAIGSUdE4qo7RPEX4HohY58XlRAenr2gbz7HCVe6vS1sccbLQmwYt0BJy7GFZEOAmnsoPN822M9JEpc8yQlY1AiiQe0be9YHzMyhrO8QSbfb472v%2BL%2FdBPogDfrS8plw9vW7WRIirrrX0uqPiDlNqDGZq1 from Debbie's email list.
Paid for by Debbie for Florida.Debbie for Florida
PO Box 432250
South Miami, FL 33243
United States

name: Alan Cohn
subject: Stop the Far-Right MAGA Majority
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100707550/523619580/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjVhYWU3NDctODJkNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LG1xrIFyVhuEavSqBLZgVnsMw1HTc8Yxj2eeC4YM7XQ=&emci=a893f2c0-71d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f5aae747-82d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
Sometimes, a picture says a million words.
That’s President Trump today thanking Chief Justice John Roberts for creating immunity from prosecution for him. A decision that allowed Trump to skate on charges he interfered with the last election was responsible for the January 6th insurrection and the charges related to stealing classified documents.
This is what happens when you have lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and no accountability.
That ends today.
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court. We’re the national campaign working with 75 members of Congress, from Adam Schiff to Hakeem Jeffries, to enact 18-year terms for Supreme Court Justices.
We need majorities in the House and Senate. We’re raising what’s needed to back candidates pledging to support the TERM ACT and mount a public pressure campaign to get it voted on.
We can get it done with your help!
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100707551/523619592/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjVhYWU3NDctODJkNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LG1xrIFyVhuEavSqBLZgVnsMw1HTc8Yxj2eeC4YM7XQ=)
The stakes are clear. Trump is positioned to lock in the radical right-wing MAGA majority on SCOTUS for decades to come.
**[>>>Unless we act and unless we win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100707552/523619614/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjVhYWU3NDctODJkNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LG1xrIFyVhuEavSqBLZgVnsMw1HTc8Yxj2eeC4YM7XQ=)**
Join us!
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100707554/523619617/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjVhYWU3NDctODJkNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LG1xrIFyVhuEavSqBLZgVnsMw1HTc8Yxj2eeC4YM7XQ=)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100707555/523619624/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjVhYWU3NDctODJkNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LG1xrIFyVhuEavSqBLZgVnsMw1HTc8Yxj2eeC4YM7XQ=)

name: Our Revolution
subject: SURVEY: Trump's shock and awe strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, Trump
returned to the White House today, and we are in a dangerous, new
political era. But we are not powerless in this moment of uncertainty and
fear.

We are seeing the beginning of Trump’s shock and awe strategy of rhetoric
and executive actions that lay the groundwork for destroying our
democracy, economy, and environment. And this time around, he’s doing it
with the support of the Oligarchs from Big Tech, the media, Oil & Gas,
Wall Street, and a MAGA Congress ready to march behind him in lock-step.

As we prepare to fight back with our Citizen Action Team, we need to hear
your top concerns. Can you take a quick minute to fill out our
inauguration survey?

First question: [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21150?source=email-20250120&t=1011&akid=7562%2E5885482%2EM5hVD8 ]How did Trump’s Inauguration speech make you feel?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21150?source=email-20250120&t=1012&akid=7562%2E5885482%2EM5hVD8 ]ANGRY
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21150?source=email-20250120&t=1013&akid=7562%2E5885482%2EM5hVD8 ]SAD
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21150?source=email-20250120&t=1014&akid=7562%2E5885482%2EM5hVD8 ]SCARED
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21150?source=email-20250120&t=1015&akid=7562%2E5885482%2EM5hVD8 ]WORRIED
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21150?source=email-20250120&t=1016&akid=7562%2E5885482%2EM5hVD8 ]MOTIVATED

We all know Trump and MAGA have weaknesses — including a thin majority in
Congress. That means we can have an impact. We’re building a grassroots
Citizen Army to organize, mobilize, and protest in every congressional
district in the country and on Capitol Hill to fight back.

And we need your input to make sure our work is as strategic and effective
as possible.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21150?source=email-20250120&t=1017&akid=7562%2E5885482%2EM5hVD8 ]Can you share how you’re feeling about Trump’s inauguration and our
plan to fight back?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

The juxtaposition of today's holiday dedicated to the late Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. with the re-inauguration of President Donald Trump could not offer a more compelling contrast or irony.
Our country and our species stand at the precipice of a future that offers any number of reasons for fear, yet at least a few issues have emerged offering encouraging possibilities.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b73ac84-6ffb-4134-8c07-1bb3855e6bbb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### **Our most meaningful national holiday**
America's holidays tend to reflect on histories that remain relatively settled. But today's, commemorating the life of an American prophet and socialist visionary driven to an early grave by his [advocacy and organizing](https://substack.com/redirect/5777e3a6-f711-4f99-a5f4-4ff89d48f42d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for civil rights and an [end to America's predatory militarism](https://substack.com/redirect/f293564e-432a-466b-a293-49e732fba26a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), offers a continuing relevance that remains lost on most observers.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this post._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=155289360&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1Mjg5MzYwLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc0MTQxODIsImV4cCI6MTc0MDAwNjE4MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sLi4bAjRHhpFM5srWx2UO3tSv3-TgR6hLDq64r59KRM)
I wrote in 2023 to explore Dr. King's profound legacy, including [his forgotten message to the liberal establishment](https://substack.com/redirect/0d9e3ab7-b68e-4f19-9843-71ca512e1d08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and his prescient identification of [capitalism, militarism, and racism as "intersecting evils"](https://substack.com/redirect/75ad4249-d91e-44be-b7bb-763393b60920?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) poised to destroy America's soul.
## [Reclaiming the radical legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.](https://substack.com/redirect/6a41976a-bbb9-4714-be10-e050a44ca69a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/profile/10904314-shahid-buttar)| | *
---|---|---
| January 16, 2023
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6a41976a-bbb9-4714-be10-e050a44ca69a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[[This post is also accessible as a podcast]](https://substack.com/redirect/6a41976a-bbb9-4714-be10-e050a44ca69a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/6a41976a-bbb9-4714-be10-e050a44ca69a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Had more Americans grappled with his words and their [continuing significance](https://substack.com/redirect/f92b4c9a-9ece-49bb-9de9-ad43aa4539c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), rather than lionizing him as a martyr for [a struggle they imagined to have been victorious](https://substack.com/redirect/7db58872-8f8e-4800-9cf4-1968caad15f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the social crises that today threaten the future we all share could have been averted.
One area in which few journalists, historians, or academics have recognized the applicability of King's prescient warnings relates to the mounting global climate catastrophe. While it itself was not the particular of King's stated concerns, he [identified](https://substack.com/redirect/f293564e-432a-466b-a293-49e732fba26a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the social factors that enabled it--only to be ignored, assassinated, and then reduced to a pale shadow of his true legacy despite being lauded as a national (and even international) hero.
## [Martin Luther King, Jr. tried to warn us](https://substack.com/redirect/f293564e-432a-466b-a293-49e732fba26a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/profile/15484941-shahid-buttar)| | *
---|---|---
| January 15, 2024
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f293564e-432a-466b-a293-49e732fba26a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Few figures in U.S. history are as widely recognized as the late Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. But while every American has heard his name, and most celebrate today's annual holiday commemorated in his honor, disturbingly few realize the profundity of his remarkable legacy](https://substack.com/redirect/f293564e-432a-466b-a293-49e732fba26a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/f293564e-432a-466b-a293-49e732fba26a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### **A turn to the past obscures some rare good news from Washington**
Today's inauguration of Donald Trump as our nation's 47th president is, with a view towards history, effectively a day of national mourning. The weather in Washington is so severe that it forced the inauguration indoors--ironically, to one of the very same spaces occupied during the January 6 2021 attack on the capitol.
It feels like a meteorological reflection of the misery that today portends for the future.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers. To receive new posts,**sign up for a free subscription!** To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..71Qzube2Ox8hTq6AoNLHJl7a44psolbA16UDoBgt3io?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=155289360)
Across the country, communities share a terrified anticipation of Trump's return to Washington after winning the popular vote. Many of us fear an impending [crackdown on immigrant workers and their families](https://open.substack.com/pub/randyfertel/p/resisting-trumps-stormtroopers?r=97w99&utm_medium=ios). Similarly, the wholesale of [abandonment of any pretense for climate justice](https://substack.com/redirect/dcaa8add-b65c-4fe6-aa54-f8bea24c9940?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is predictable under the new administration.
These fears grew only sharper upon the spectacle of Elon Musk, while speaking from the podium at the inauguration, issuing what appeared to be [a full-fledged Nazi salute](https://substack.com/redirect/35e1f436-9226-4521-a63d-4b1023acb97b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--twice. The shamelessness and insensitivity of the gesture can not possibly be overemphasized. Despite Trump's overt pledges to cultivate autocracy, few expected the new administration's support for fascism to appear both so overt and so immediate.
Despite the gloom shared by nostalgists for the era of neoliberalism and those who challenged it from the Left, there are at least a few less disturbing surprises to consider. Two, in particular, offer encouraging signs of (even if unlikely) progress. One relates to government transparency, and another to food, health, and public safety.
### **Agriculture, food safety, and the crisis in rural America**
The [appointment of Joel Salatin](https://substack.com/redirect/44dece54-b5c4-4155-b467-facf43a18de3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as an Advisor to the Secretary of the USDA may reflect the emerging influence of a transpartisan movement united by food safety and public health. It scored a recent victory on the eve of the presidential transition, when the FDA finally [banned the use of red dye No. 3 in foods](https://substack.com/redirect/182a8221-6849-4892-9f86-d86739be32e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), decades after it had been banned from cosmetics in recognition of its carcinogenic properties.
On the one hand, advisors lack formal authority, and can at best offer ideas or insight that appointed agency officials remain at liberty to modify, water down, or ignore entirely.
On the other hand, Salatin has a long history as a pioneer of biodynamic farming, and could be poised in his new role to help challenge the [factory farming paradigm](https://substack.com/redirect/9950fe77-2670-4d3e-823a-cc51d20411b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to which a corrupted Congress committed our country decades ago. If nothing else, there will be a voice in the proverbial room that has never been there before.
Dominated by policymakers representing farmbelt states, Congress has repeatedly lavished [subsidies](https://substack.com/redirect/37964a37-0e5a-444a-becd-1664a034dda5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) encouraging not only the overproduction of goods from grains to livestock, but also some of the most environmentally destructive ways to do it.
Ironically, the constituents--and supposed beneficiaries--of those policymakers have suffered more than most consumers. The struggles to maintain family farms have [driven most of them out of business](https://substack.com/redirect/35d4fa75-ee7b-4de2-942c-0e031b20e1d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and into the arms of predatory banks. [Suicide rates among farmers](https://substack.com/redirect/f7dbd507-051b-400a-9610-21a43f0bc571?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) are among the highest of any profession.
Rural disaffection with farm consolidation is one lens through which to [explain](https://substack.com/redirect/707fdaed-2a6b-4bfa-a4d2-6302f1e9366c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Trump's victory in last November's election (although there are [others](https://substack.com/redirect/ca4bece6-b888-4576-860d-f1a05347ce83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). While in office, Democrats did little to address the plight of working Americans as their policies enabled a [relentless siphon of our society's wealth ](https://substack.com/redirect/d8c8a040-4629-4a09-a34a-e2dba59007b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)into the hands of financiers and the entrepreneurs they lionize. Farmers got abandoned, along with the rest of us.
Of course, farmers aren't the only people suffering under this paradigm. High-fructose corn syrup offers an expansive example.
High-fructose corn syrup is among many products manufactured from corn, which is [vastly overproduced due to short-sighted government subsidies](https://substack.com/redirect/925132d6-66a7-4fc8-9be5-d7dc65df1404?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) enshrined by Congress. Those subsidies are the epitome of corporate welfare decried by conservatives, yet remain politically entrenched by the [structural overrepresentation](https://substack.com/redirect/ef564821-1d8c-4f54-9b64-c4256085dfcd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of rural states in the Senate, coupled with the [corporate corruption of elections](https://substack.com/redirect/d8b80e80-dbeb-4ed6-abb6-32adfdea9b6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) invited by _Citizens United_ and painfully visible in every election cycle since then.
Since subsidies ensure that corn is abundant, uses for that corn had to be found--which is one reason high-fructose corn syrup has found its way into virtually every processed food, from sodas and snacks to fast food and even [medicines](https://substack.com/redirect/8b6ae297-6f8f-406c-b8da-a77147f617e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Consumed by Americans in staggering quantities, it tends to predispose people who eat it to risks ranging from [obesity to diabetes](https://substack.com/redirect/ba2c61e3-9c9b-4090-b1d0-b5a161545b0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and possibly even [some forms of cancer](https://substack.com/redirect/627b2bb3-021d-47d0-96e6-270ed22c2fb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The pattern exemplified by high-fructose corn syrup is visible across other products. It is also possible only under the industrial agribusiness sector entrenched by Washington's longstanding (and thoroughly bipartisan) approach to farm subsidies.
In the context of this history, Saladin's appointment was a surprise, and possibly a reflection of populist influence within the new administration.
Saladin is himself a farmer, and something of a spokesperson for the movement to dislodge the industrial agribusiness cartel and instead cultivate organic and regenerative agriculture. Even if his advisory influence proves limited, his appointment indicates possibilities under the new administration to expand an awareness of regenerative agriculture practices that could improve everything from public health to the prospects for rural communities going forward.
### **Spilling the tea**
As an advocate for government transparency, I have [long](https://substack.com/redirect/f0477ce6-69f6-4c2e-9cdb-8aa189e3c2b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (and [repeatedly](https://substack.com/redirect/2dbe9edb-6dcd-49eb-adad-81de63f2003e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) observed the frankly scandalous suppression of government reports about everything from the [CIA's recent policy of torture, rape, and murder of military detainees](https://substack.com/redirect/a99bbc37-23cc-4d5d-8c8a-b92e6240628b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the political [assassinations of the 1960s](https://substack.com/redirect/efeaf96b-4ac9-40c9-b5fa-62df3f81fe8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
How can a country claiming freedom and democracy suppress government reports about investigations of assassinations targeting figures as prolific as a sitting president, a major party's presidential nominee, and a figure to whom a national holiday and monument were subsequently dedicated?
It is such a flagrant reflection of our country's hypocrisy that it has long been difficult for me to overlook. Congress is supposed to be a body committed to transparency in the service of serving the American people. Yet it has repeatedly allowed the executive branch to hide its criminal trail.
When [I was arrested in the U.S. Senate](https://substack.com/redirect/1e89b337-d32c-4238-a15a-1d8a1b142bc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 2015, my "crime" was asking a question following the conclusion of a Senate hearing. It was this history I aimed to probe by inviting a powerful Democrat to explain why he was never charged with perjury despite lying to the Senate under oath. His lawyer had at least admitted (in an exchange broadcast by C-SPAN from a conference a few months before) that he had given his boss bad legal advice. But his boss declined to answer any questions, and walked out of the room with an entourage while I walked out in handcuffs.
A similar event happened recently, when journalist Sam Husseini was [forcibly removed](https://substack.com/redirect/9efab6bf-9d37-47bc-9d50-84e13cc4a399?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from a press briefing with Secretary of State Anthony Blinken in response for his critiques of the Biden administration's [flagrant hypocrisy and support](https://substack.com/redirect/0a11c1d4-b017-483b-a0a0-240095a2323d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the Israeli genocide in Gaza. I consider Sam a personal friend: when I worked in Washington in the early 2010s, I often appeared on radio programs that he advised.
On the one hand, Trump's promised to release the files about the assassination of JFK, RFK, and MLK won't do much to necessarily challenge the contemporary surveillance state. But it could expose serious crimes committed in the past by agencies dedicated to what they call "national security," which in fact represents a little more than the careers of various officials responsible for subverting the Bill of Rights.
In his first term, Trump made a lot of noise about the so-called deep state in Washington. It's worth noting that it absolutely is a real concern: the three-letter agencies (eg, FBI, CIA, NSA) do seem to stand above the White House, and the [militarism that defines U.S. foreign policy over the last 75 years](https://substack.com/redirect/70418ebf-f2db-4d5d-ba3f-37e4f30d3e2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) suggests that presidents have a lot less influence than most Americans seem to think.
But as a president, Trump tended to allow the agencies carte blanche. He made that promise at the CIA headquarters in [a significant speech soon after his first inauguration in 2021](https://substack.com/redirect/ac1013e7-de7c-4c18-9c33-2de7e75c4b19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), before a [series](https://substack.com/redirect/4ab04777-33d6-477d-95f5-84f23e9960a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of attempted [coups](https://substack.com/redirect/b4a7615f-d956-403a-8537-8f8c7218a0d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) unfolded across Latin America matching a [long pattern visible across the CIA's history](https://substack.com/redirect/eeb87f86-5d23-430d-bf4d-d7f5bd898e4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Might Trump's inclination to expose the agencies' secrets extend beyond the limited historical context of the 1960s? Only time will tell.
_Paid subscribers can read a personal lament, and an update on some forthcoming posts on subjects including the continuing wildfires in Los Angeles; a recent proposal to ban insider trading by Members of Congress; and the ceasefire recently announced between Israel and Hamas..._

Trump's inauguration portends escalating crisis, while hope emerges in a few surprising places | | | Jan 20| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | The juxtaposition of today's holiday dedicated to the late Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. with the re-inauguration of President Donald Trump could not offer a more compelling contrast or irony. Our country and our species stand at the precipice of a future that offers any number of reasons for fear, yet at least a few issues have emerged offering encouraging possibilities. | | ---|---|--- Our most meaningful national holiday America's holidays tend to reflect on histories that remain relatively settled. But today's, commemorating the life of an American prophet and socialist visionary driven to an early grave by his for civil rights and an , offers a continuing relevance that remains lost on most observers. Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this post. I wrote in 2023 to explore Dr. King's profound legacy, including and his prescient identification of poised to destroy America's soul. | | | | ---|---|--- | January 16, 2023 [[This post is also accessible as a podcast]]() | Had more Americans grappled with his words and their , rather than lionizing him as a martyr for , the social crises that today threaten the future we all share could have been averted. One area in which few journalists, historians, or academics have recognized the applicability of King's prescient warnings relates to the mounting global climate catastrophe. While it itself was not the particular of King's stated concerns, he the social factors that enabled it--only to be ignored, assassinated, and then reduced to a pale shadow of his true legacy despite being lauded as a national (and even international) hero. | | | | ---|---|--- | January 15, 2024 | A turn to the past obscures some rare good news from Washington Today's inauguration of Donald Trump as our nation's 47th president is, with a view towards history, effectively a day of national mourning. The weather in Washington is so severe that it forced the inauguration indoors--ironically, to one of the very same spaces occupied during the January 6 2021 attack on the capitol. It feels like a meteorological reflection of the misery that today portends for the future. Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers. To receive new posts,sign up for a free subscription! To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber. Across the country, communities share a terrified anticipation of Trump's return to Washington after winning the popular vote. Many of us fear an impending . Similarly, the wholesale of is predictable under the new administration. These fears grew only sharper upon the spectacle of Elon Musk, while speaking from the podium at the inauguration, issuing what appeared to be . The shamelessness and insensitivity of the gesture can not possibly be overemphasized. Despite Trump's overt pledges to cultivate autocracy, few expected the new administration's support for fascism to appear both so overt and so immediate. Despite the gloom shared by nostalgists for the era of neoliberalism and those who challenged it from the Left, there are at least a few less disturbing surprises to consider. Two, in particular, offer encouraging signs of (even if unlikely) progress. One relates to government transparency, and another to food, health, and public safety. Agriculture, food safety, and the crisis in rural America The as an Advisor to the Secretary of the USDA may reflect the emerging influence of a transpartisan movement united by food safety and public health. It scored a recent victory on the eve of the presidential transition, when the FDA finally , decades after it had been banned from cosmetics in recognition of its carcinogenic properties. On the one hand, advisors lack formal authority, and can at best offer ideas or insight that appointed agency officials remain at liberty to modify, water down, or ignore entirely. On the other hand, Salatin has a long history as a pioneer of biodynamic farming, and could be poised in his new role to help challenge the to which a corrupted Congress committed our country decades ago. If nothing else, there will be a voice in the proverbial room that has never been there before. Dominated by policymakers representing farmbelt states, Congress has repeatedly lavished encouraging not only the overproduction of goods from grains to livestock, but also some of the most environmentally destructive ways to do it. Ironically, the constituents--and supposed beneficiaries--of those policymakers have suffered more than most consumers. The struggles to maintain family farms have and into the arms of predatory banks. are among the highest of any profession. Rural disaffection with farm consolidation is one lens through which to Trump's victory in last November's election (although there are ). While in office, Democrats did little to address the plight of working Americans as their policies enabled a the hands of financiers and the entrepreneurs they lionize. Farmers got abandoned, along with the rest of us. Of course, farmers aren't the only people suffering under this paradigm. High-fructose corn syrup offers an expansive example. High-fructose corn syrup is among many products manufactured from corn, which is enshrined by Congress. Those subsidies are the epitome of corporate welfare decried by conservatives, yet remain politically entrenched by the of rural states in the Senate, coupled with the invited by Citizens United and painfully visible in every election cycle since then. Since subsidies ensure that corn is abundant, uses for that corn had to be found--which is one reason high-fructose corn syrup has found its way into virtually every processed food, from sodas and snacks to fast food and even . Consumed by Americans in staggering quantities, it tends to predispose people who eat it to risks ranging from , and possibly even . The pattern exemplified by high-fructose corn syrup is visible across other products. It is also possible only under the industrial agribusiness sector entrenched by Washington's longstanding (and thoroughly bipartisan) approach to farm subsidies. In the context of this history, Saladin's appointment was a surprise, and possibly a reflection of populist influence within the new administration. Saladin is himself a farmer, and something of a spokesperson for the movement to dislodge the industrial agribusiness cartel and instead cultivate organic and regenerative agriculture. Even if his advisory influence proves limited, his appointment indicates possibilities under the new administration to expand an awareness of regenerative agriculture practices that could improve everything from public health to the prospects for rural communities going forward. Spilling the tea As an advocate for government transparency, I have (and ) observed the frankly scandalous suppression of government reports about everything from the to the political . How can a country claiming freedom and democracy suppress government reports about investigations of assassinations targeting figures as prolific as a sitting president, a major party's presidential nominee, and a figure to whom a national holiday and monument were subsequently dedicated? It is such a flagrant reflection of our country's hypocrisy that it has long been difficult for me to overlook. Congress is supposed to be a body committed to transparency in the service of serving the American people. Yet it has repeatedly allowed the executive branch to hide its criminal trail. When in 2015, my "crime" was asking a question following the conclusion of a Senate hearing. It was this history I aimed to probe by inviting a powerful Democrat to explain why he was never charged with perjury despite lying to the Senate under oath. His lawyer had at least admitted (in an exchange broadcast by C-SPAN from a conference a few months before) that he had given his boss bad legal advice. But his boss declined to answer any questions, and walked out of the room with an entourage while I walked out in handcuffs. A similar event happened recently, when journalist Sam Husseini was from a press briefing with Secretary of State Anthony Blinken in response for his critiques of the Biden administration's for the Israeli genocide in Gaza. I consider Sam a personal friend: when I worked in Washington in the early 2010s, I often appeared on radio programs that he advised. On the one hand, Trump's promised to release the files about the assassination of JFK, RFK, and MLK won't do much to necessarily challenge the contemporary surveillance state. But it could expose serious crimes committed in the past by agencies dedicated to what they call "national security," which in fact represents a little more than the careers of various officials responsible for subverting the Bill of Rights. In his first term, Trump made a lot of noise about the so-called deep state in Washington. It's worth noting that it absolutely is a real concern: the three-letter agencies (eg, FBI, CIA, NSA) do seem to stand above the White House, and the suggests that presidents have a lot less influence than most Americans seem to think. But as a president, Trump tended to allow the agencies carte blanche. He made that promise at the CIA headquarters in , before a of attempted unfolded across Latin America matching a . Might Trump's inclination to expose the agencies' secrets extend beyond the limited historical context of the 1960s? Only time will tell. body:
On Inauguration Day, fuel the fight for our democracy
|
---

This is a tough day, Peter.
Right now we’re at the start of a presidency that will seek to do so much harm in so many aspects of people’s lives across the country. It’s a sad moment in our history, but we cannot become stuck in despair. We cannot succumb to fear. We cannot give up.
**Together, we must get (and stay) ready to stop attacks on our democracy that will aim to make it harder to achieve fair representation.**
[**If you’re still in this fight — if you’re still committed to ensuring fair maps and fair representation across the country — then Day One of Trump’s presidency is the perfect moment to make a contribution to power our efforts defending democracy in the months ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100707768/523620128/358328389?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_Inaug_email_20250120-AOTL-Tier1-Inaug-Biz_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250120-AOTL-Tier1-Inaug-Biz_&utm_campaign=Inaug&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5YWFlNzQ3LTgyZDctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NJswWp7NLLdxIf8cLqxEQM1bIvfYSDIJNdEm9svVnb8=)

From organizing for fair congressional maps to protecting the U.S. Census from Project 2025 attacks, we know what it takes to push back on the anti-democratic policies of Trump and his allies.
**Now, it’s just a matter of gathering the resources and putting in the work.**
On difficult days like today, it’s the energy and dedication of our nationwide movement — from my colleagues here at All On the Line and our affiliates to grassroots fair maps activists like you — that keeps me going.
Thanks for everything you do. I look forward to fighting alongside you in the months ahead.
Onward,
Biz
John Bisognano
President, All On the Line
