clean_body: On Inauguration Day, fuel the fight for our democracy | This is a tough day, Peter. Right now we’re at the start of a presidency that will seek to do so much harm in so many aspects of people’s lives across the country. It’s a sad moment in our history, but we cannot become stuck in despair. We cannot succumb to fear. We cannot give up. Together, we must get (and stay) ready to stop attacks on our democracy that will aim to make it harder to achieve fair representation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = From organizing for fair congressional maps to protecting the U.S. Census from Project 2025 attacks, we know what it takes to push back on the anti-democratic policies of Trump and his allies. Now, it’s just a matter of gathering the resources and putting in the work. On difficult days like today, it’s the energy and dedication of our nationwide movement — from my colleagues here at All On the Line and our affiliates to grassroots fair maps activists like you — that keeps me going. Thanks for everything you do. I look forward to fighting alongside you in the months ahead. Onward, Biz John Bisognano President, All On the Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: Robert Garcia
subject: Day One
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
The fight begins today.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100708289/523622163/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmYwNWIzZS04OWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oqU6eNoHliUwIjdch1vET5xGaUwnIiV34C05dfTDN7Q=)
Team,
The Donald Trump presidency began today. Already, we’re seeing what we can expect: no plans to help working families, but plenty of efforts to stoke division and deliver handouts to billionaires.
Between Trump and his Co-President Elon Musk, they’ll say and do whatever it takes to inflame tensions, with no regard for the truth. Lies and misinformation will be used to distract the country while the wealthiest Americans get every break imaginable, leaving average families with nothing.
Robert Garcia and his Democratic colleagues will need to fight every single day to counter the worst of their policies and ensure Americans get the truth. But this fight takes resources.
[Will you contribute today to help Robert and his colleagues push back against the extreme Trump/Musk agenda in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100708290/523622164/-1908375243?refcode2=8bf05b3e-89d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&refcode=em250120&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmYwNWIzZS04OWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oqU6eNoHliUwIjdch1vET5xGaUwnIiV34C05dfTDN7Q=)
We’ve been here before, and we know how damaging Trump’s presidency can be. But this time, he’s coming with more experience and a team of loyalists committed to advancing his extreme, anti-American agenda.
But Robert Garcia is fighting back. He’s standing up to their lies and holding them accountable. Elon Musk has even already called for Robert’s removal from Congress, but Robert isn’t backing down. He’s ready to call out Trump and Musk every single time. Standing up to the richest and most powerful forces in the world requires significant resources.
[Will you make sure Robert is ready to defend his seat against right wing attacks and contribute what you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100708291/523622165/-1908375243?refcode2=8bf05b3e-89d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&refcode=em250120&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmYwNWIzZS04OWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oqU6eNoHliUwIjdch1vET5xGaUwnIiV34C05dfTDN7Q=)

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100708292/523622166/-1908375243?refcode2=8bf05b3e-89d7-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&refcode=em250120&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmYwNWIzZS04OWQ3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oqU6eNoHliUwIjdch1vET5xGaUwnIiV34C05dfTDN7Q=)

The next few years will be challenging. Together, we must push back against the lies, protect the most vulnerable, and prepare to win back the majority in 2026. But we can only do it with your support.
Thank you for standing with us.
Onward,
Team Robert

* * *

**Goal** : $50,000
**Deadline** : 24 Hours **[Rush $7 to counter
the MAGA movement →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPfr0A4dBpd_CC4Uqnpn8KTZlH38kZJTDWz7LCYSMG-sNr2h8H0Ea1Tdkb-0zdjmsapoWEvsJBlOcwZAFZ83AFda0-f2uTbLNbsPg5IqbI9kPVn9XOlG4qUR1ufJ551ayEw2PW-2LLyY98lHzB2D2avHNQ1dWOdP08XfR4uOakk8XPzQND1qBTeR65xIhbZ9uE7dHnrCuvO0phF_aLC0GI4IjDur6jR_2EMotAwyGNHUnZP337mZm6LtruKJJ9Af7lGt5_7dBLP1l28IrMev_Z3vgW7f_3gmiW3awUHAIR8v7TPWEBQgV1azQ2LO4ewSWlaPH5mo5NoYdq1XlKl8decDJ9gPglW9GQDZuQje1vjnCZTtqZbh9zRl5W2eQ1d3pXeWI0RcOVqvoIyvtqSnGla0w/4db/eDWL3S8PQbuqOSTiSr6D3Q/h1/h001.MSqkmwbX5yTu8ip3qvYTCwsygvsUtWVIP9Z5zGbyl30)**
State Democrats have already won BIG this year, holding onto our majorities in the Virginia House and Senate in crucial special elections – but we can’t take our foot off the gas yet, not when we have _a slew of special elections_ over the next three months.
